name: GOTV PAC
subject: Meet Jeff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Elon Musk gets the headlines, but did you know there’s a Republican mega-donor who might wield even more power?
Jeff Yass might not be a household name, but here’s what you need to know: he’s the richest man in Pennsylvania, a TikTok billionaire, and the single largest political donor in America right now. To date, he’s dropped over $200 million to buy politicians, dismantle public schools, and tilt the courts in MAGA’s favor.
If this sounds familiar, it’s because we’ve seen this play before.
Remember when Elon Musk tried to buy himself a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat in April? Grassroots donors like you stood up, fought back, and because of you, we beat Elon and kept the court in Democratic hands.
But now Jeff Yass is attempting something even bigger than what Elon tried. He's spending millions to flip not one -- but three Pennsylvania Supreme Court seats to protect Donald Trump’s agenda.
That’s why GOTV PAC is going all-in to stop yet another hostile takeover of our courts. But we can only do it if grassroots supporters chip in today – because Yass has already written checks with more zeroes than we can count. Can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us beat back Jeff Yass’s dark money machine and defend Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08222025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: Frontrunner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie’s support is surging—and she’s the clear Democratic frontrunner.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40059%2E3422442%2Edy6URc)
**Katie Porter is leading the California governor’s race in a new poll, Peter.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250822_1_ak?refcode=em20250822-40059&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40059_3422442_dy6URc&akid=40059%2E3422442%2Edy6URc)
Katie’s support is surging—and she’s the clear Democratic frontrunner as this race heats up.
But we can’t take anything for granted. Extremist Republicans are gaining ground and sit at second and third in this poll. If we’re going to keep California blue, Katie needs to stay in the lead and continue building support all the way through Election Day.
The stakes couldn’t be higher. Katie is running to protect our democracy and lower costs for California families—and we need your help to keep gaining momentum.
**[Can you pitch in $5 to help us grow our lead and win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250822_1_ak?refcode=em20250822-40059&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40059_3422442_dy6URc&akid=40059%2E3422442%2Edy6URc)**

subject: Ken Paxton: Impeached. Indicted. Defeated.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Ken Paxton has now been:
> * Impeached;
> * Indicted;
> * Beaten in court—by us.
>

It’s a stunning track record for someone who thinks he deserves a promotion to the U.S. Senate.
And while Paxton tries to abuse his office to silence us, we’re not backing down. We just beat him in court, and now we’re working to make sure he—and every Republican enabling him—is held accountable at the ballot box.
We’re doubling down on grassroots organizing across Texas to stop far-right extremists like Paxton. That means training volunteers, registering voters, and building the power it takes to win.
But these attacks from Paxton and his allies? They’re escalating—and we need your help to keep up the fight.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hundreds of Illegal Alien Gangbangers Arrested
body:
HHS Providing Care for Thousands of Biden-era Alien Minors

[INSIDE JW]

OVER 350 CONVICTED ILLEGAL ALIEN GANGBANGERS WITH MULTIPLE CONVICTIONS
ARRESTED IN TEXAS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35909&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1MdkcwUVItZXJaOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9b7c2bd2f5df61e887572d5050b3119e2887bb85dc3f649049a5cfce0a6e492d]

The Biden administration’s destructive open borders policy has
lasting repercussions. Fortunately, the Trump administration is taking
action to clean up this disaster, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog
explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35910&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ2FuZ2JhbmdlcnMtZW50ZXJlZC11cy1pbGxlZ2FsbHkvXTo/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de5efa68c5897deb1ae6c104811b08a012847dbb481cc7bae163e50d40168ea0

> In yet another important immigration story ignored by the mainstream
> media, federal authorities in Texas arrested more than 350 gang
> members
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35911&F=T&&hash=37b44381827ec6774ce40726cdbcd816029643790943586d0c44d5a38ac4cb7a]
> with a distressing 1,700 criminal convictions who entered the United
> States illegally over 1,400 times. The unbelievable figures speak
> loudly about the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border
> policies that welcomed a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens,
> including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and
> more than 1.7 million
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=33711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVycm9yaXN0LXRocmVhdC10by11cy1za3lyb2NrZXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=828002323ae63fc7b3db509f5bc0dd39ec6c22908b2c7a62cc34bec64e867624]
> from countries that the Department of Homeland Security (DHS)
> determined pose a national security threat to the U.S. Fortunately,
> the Trump administration is working to clean up the mess by cracking
> down on criminal aliens with an aggressive nationwide initiative
> known as Operation Take Back America
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35912&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvZGFnL21lZGlhLzEzOTM3NDYvZGw/aW5saW5lXXRoYXQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5af12104cb9ebd9949566b85f99a2883a16a9a332686668765ae8d886c73023c
aims to
> repel the invasion of illegal immigration and protect American
> communities from perpetrators of violent crimes.

> The administration assures it is targeting the “worst of the worst
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35913&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaWNlLmdvdi9Xb1ddLOKAnWNyaW1pbmFsP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2a5b69a0aa35e63cea5be0a5bd74fbbc640c9f54bf6cfd639ef2f20044f3fe84
aliens for arrest and removal
> even as most media outlets spin the narrative to focus exclusively
> on heartless polices that separate families and victimize
> hard-working migrants. In this recent Texas case, Immigration and
> Customs Enforcement (ICE) conducted a six-month operation that
> nabbed hundreds of illegal aliens convicted of a “wide variety of
> offenses,” including homicide, sexual assault of a child,
> promotion of child pornography, burglary, drug and sex trafficking,
> arson, unlawful possession of a firearm and domestic violence, among
> other crimes. Most are members of violent gangs, including the
> renowned Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), Tren de Aragua, Latin Kings, 15th
> Street Gang, Sureños, Paisas and Tango Blast. “Despite attempts
> by some to undermine the courageous work being done by our officers,
> the brave men and women of ICE continue to put their lives on the
> line every day to arrest violent transnational gang members, foreign
> fugitives and dangerous criminal aliens,” said Gabriel Martinez,
> the acting director of ICEs Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO)
> in Houston. Martinez added that in the past couple of years gang
> members in Houston brutally raped and murdered a 12-year-old girl on
> her way to the store. “Our officers know their efforts can help
> prevent atrocities like that from every occurring again and they
> won’t rest until they’re all gone,” the Houston ICE ERO
> director said.

> Federal authorities are providing mug shots and detailed criminal
> histories of the worst offenders, making it easy to report this
> critical story that clearly illustrates the urgency to enforce
> immigration laws after four years of devastating open border
> policies. Among those rounded up in the recent Houston operation is
> Milton Alexander Magana Fuentes, a 31-year-old child predator from
> El Salvador and member of the Paisas gang convicted of sexual
> indecency with a child, failure to register as a sex offender and
> illegal reentry into the U.S. Ronald Alberto Rivas-Aguilar, a
> 28-year-old MS-13 gang member from El Salvador, has been convicted
> of homicide yet illegally entered the U.S. twice. A 45-year-old
> Paisas gang member (Humberto Romero Avila), who entered the U.S.
> illegally 10 times, has four convictions for driving while
> intoxicated (DWI) as well as convictions for larceny and is wanted
> in his native Mexico for homicide. A 35-year-old Mexican Paisas
> gangbanger, Juan Pablo Hernandez Ramos, has convictions for
> possessing and promoting child pornography, sexual assault, and
> aggravated assault.

> The disturbing list goes on and on with another Mexican Paisas gang
> member, 39-year-old Jose Angel Martinez, convicted of sexual
> indecency with a minor, aggravated assault and burglary and a
> 43-year-old Tango Blast gang member from Mexico with four DWI
> convictions, two hit-and-run convictions, burglary, drug possession,
> assault and larceny. Other members of dangerous gangs recently
> deported have convictions for drug possession and trafficking,
> aggravated assault, DWI, domestic violence, unlawful possession of a
> firearm and an array of other felonies. Many of the alien criminals
> illegally entered the U.S. a multitude of times and kept coming back
> through the formerly porous southwest border, ICE figures show.
> Among them is a Mexican Paisas gang member who entered the country
> illegally a whopping 40 times, a Mexican Sureños gangbanger who
> sneaked in 29 times and a Mexican Paisas gang member who managed to
> enter illegally 26 times.

HHS TO PROVIDE ILLEGAL ALIEN MINORS WITH ‘HIGH-QUALITY’
RESIDENTIAL SERVICES

Judicial Watch has covered our border disaster like no one else, and
the crisis isn’t going away. While dangerous illegal alien truck
drivers dominate the news, thousands of children who came across the
border under the Biden administration’s careless management are
still at great risk of abuse. Some have simply disappeared. Our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the latest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35914&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvNTAwLW1pbC10by1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLW1pbm9ycy9dOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6f46594cabb2252dd758a906b88ff2db1668575cc10d6d53f6484232779fc6a2

> Illegal immigration may be at an all-time low, but American
> taxpayers are still getting stuck with the exorbitant cost of caring
> for the hundreds of thousands of alien minors that entered the
> country under the Biden administration. The government calls them
> Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC), though the overwhelming majority
> are not really children but rather young adults in their teens and
> some have criminal histories.

> Under U.S. law the Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), which is a
> branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), is
> responsible for caring for UAC, which are overwhelmingly males over
> the age of 14, according to government figures
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=34653&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hY2YuZ292L29yci9mYWN0LXNoZWV0L3Byb2dyYW1zL3VjL2ZhY3Qtc2hlZXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d0332f8df738f207fd9e20d9e2ea9a19f369178ef7cd6b6105ad955b348ee666].
They come
> from Guatemala (32%), Honduras (20%), Mexico (20%), El Salvador
> (8%), and “other” (19%). More than half a million entered the
> country during the Biden administration and Uncle Sam has spent a
> fortune to provide them with housing, food, an education, medical
> care, and recreational activities before and after they are released
> to sponsors throughout the nation.

> The expenses will evidently continue for years to come. This month,
> HHS announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76139&L=35915&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JhbnRzLmdvdi9zZWFyY2gtcmVzdWx0cy1kZXRhaWwvMzU3MjIwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4a4d2e1a4ed2ebb4a8ea6dc989211d4791fdc2dc931ced219eda577aac0f0abd]
> that it is awarding up to $500 million in grants to provide
> “high-quality” residential services for UAC throughout the
> United States. The cash will go to group homes that specialize in
> caring for specific populations such as teen mothers, shelters that
> provide a child-friendly setting for kids of all ages and
> transitional foster care for those under the age of 13, including
> sibling groups, pregnant or parenting teens and children with
> specific individualized needs. The UAC will receive educational and
> clinical services as well as medical care, recreation, and
> individual counseling. Grant recipients must provide private spaces
> for meetings with attorneys and a separate bedroom for isolation or
> quarantine for those infected with a communicable disease.
> “Ideally, there should be at least one isolation-capable bedroom,
> for every 25 children, equipped with a door that closes while
> allowing line-of-sight through a small window,” according to the
> recently published grant announcement, which describes the
> “distinct illnesses” of this population to include varicella and
> influenza.

> On a positive note, HHS is requiring that grant recipients properly
> screen and train staff on sexual harassment and inappropriate sexual
> behavior as well as procedures for reporting knowledge or suspicion
> of sexual abuse. That is because sexual and physical abuse at UAC
> shelters has been a huge problem for years. In fact, back in 2021
> Judicial Watch obtained records
>

clean_body: HHS Providing Care for Thousands of Biden-era Alien Minors [INSIDE JW] OVER 350 CONVICTED ILLEGAL ALIEN GANGBANGERS WITH MULTIPLE CONVICTIONS ARRESTED IN TEXAS [] The Biden administration’s destructive open borders policy has lasting repercussions. Fortunately, the Trump administration is taking action to clean up this disaster, as our Corruption Chronicles blog explains [ In yet another important immigration story ignored by the mainstream media, federal authorities in Texas arrested more than 350 gang members [] with a distressing 1,700 criminal convictions who entered the United States illegally over 1,400 times. The unbelievable figures speak loudly about the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies that welcomed a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and more than 1.7 million [] from countries that the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) determined pose a national security threat to the U.S. Fortunately, the Trump administration is working to clean up the mess by cracking down on criminal aliens with an aggressive nationwide initiative known as Operation Take Back America [ aims to repel the invasion of illegal immigration and protect American communities from perpetrators of violent crimes. The administration assures it is targeting the “worst of the worst [ aliens for arrest and removal even as most media outlets spin the narrative to focus exclusively on heartless polices that separate families and victimize hard-working migrants. In this recent Texas case, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) conducted a six-month operation that nabbed hundreds of illegal aliens convicted of a “wide variety of offenses,” including homicide, sexual assault of a child, promotion of child pornography, burglary, drug and sex trafficking, arson, unlawful possession of a firearm and domestic violence, among other crimes. Most are members of violent gangs, including the renowned Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), Tren de Aragua, Latin Kings, 15th Street Gang, Sureños, Paisas and Tango Blast. “Despite attempts by some to undermine the courageous work being done by our officers, the brave men and women of ICE continue to put their lives on the line every day to arrest violent transnational gang members, foreign fugitives and dangerous criminal aliens,” said Gabriel Martinez, the acting director of ICEs Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) in Houston. Martinez added that in the past couple of years gang members in Houston brutally raped and murdered a 12-year-old girl on her way to the store. “Our officers know their efforts can help prevent atrocities like that from every occurring again and they won’t rest until they’re all gone,” the Houston ICE ERO director said. Federal authorities are providing mug shots and detailed criminal histories of the worst offenders, making it easy to report this critical story that clearly illustrates the urgency to enforce immigration laws after four years of devastating open border policies. Among those rounded up in the recent Houston operation is Milton Alexander Magana Fuentes, a 31-year-old child predator from El Salvador and member of the Paisas gang convicted of sexual indecency with a child, failure to register as a sex offender and illegal reentry into the U.S. Ronald Alberto Rivas-Aguilar, a 28-year-old MS-13 gang member from El Salvador, has been convicted of homicide yet illegally entered the U.S. twice. A 45-year-old Paisas gang member (Humberto Romero Avila), who entered the U.S. illegally 10 times, has four convictions for driving while intoxicated (DWI) as well as convictions for larceny and is wanted in his native Mexico for homicide. A 35-year-old Mexican Paisas gangbanger, Juan Pablo Hernandez Ramos, has convictions for possessing and promoting child pornography, sexual assault, and aggravated assault. The disturbing list goes on and on with another Mexican Paisas gang member, 39-year-old Jose Angel Martinez, convicted of sexual indecency with a minor, aggravated assault and burglary and a 43-year-old Tango Blast gang member from Mexico with four DWI convictions, two hit-and-run convictions, burglary, drug possession, assault and larceny. Other members of dangerous gangs recently deported have convictions for drug possession and trafficking, aggravated assault, DWI, domestic violence, unlawful possession of a firearm and an array of other felonies. Many of the alien criminals illegally entered the U.S. a multitude of times and kept coming back through the formerly porous southwest border, ICE figures show. Among them is a Mexican Paisas gang member who entered the country illegally a whopping 40 times, a Mexican Sureños gangbanger who sneaked in 29 times and a Mexican Paisas gang member who managed to enter illegally 26 times. HHS TO PROVIDE ILLEGAL ALIEN MINORS WITH ‘HIGH-QUALITY’ RESIDENTIAL SERVICES Judicial Watch has covered our border disaster like no one else, and the crisis isn’t going away. While dangerous illegal alien truck drivers dominate the news, thousands of children who came across the border under the Biden administration’s careless management are still at great risk of abuse. Some have simply disappeared. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the latest [ Illegal immigration may be at an all-time low, but American taxpayers are still getting stuck with the exorbitant cost of caring for the hundreds of thousands of alien minors that entered the country under the Biden administration. The government calls them Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC), though the overwhelming majority are not really children but rather young adults in their teens and some have criminal histories. Under U.S. law the Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), which is a branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), is responsible for caring for UAC, which are overwhelmingly males over the age of 14, according to government figures []. They come from Guatemala (32%), Honduras (20%), Mexico (20%), El Salvador (8%), and “other” (19%). More than half a million entered the country during the Biden administration and Uncle Sam has spent a fortune to provide them with housing, food, an education, medical care, and recreational activities before and after they are released to sponsors throughout the nation. The expenses will evidently continue for years to come. This month, HHS announced [] that it is awarding up to $500 million in grants to provide “high-quality” residential services for UAC throughout the United States. The cash will go to group homes that specialize in caring for specific populations such as teen mothers, shelters that provide a child-friendly setting for kids of all ages and transitional foster care for those under the age of 13, including sibling groups, pregnant or parenting teens and children with specific individualized needs. The UAC will receive educational and clinical services as well as medical care, recreation, and individual counseling. Grant recipients must provide private spaces for meetings with attorneys and a separate bedroom for isolation or quarantine for those infected with a communicable disease. “Ideally, there should be at least one isolation-capable bedroom, for every 25 children, equipped with a door that closes while allowing line-of-sight through a small window,” according to the recently published grant announcement, which describes the “distinct illnesses” of this population to include varicella and influenza. On a positive note, HHS is requiring that grant recipients properly screen and train staff on sexual harassment and inappropriate sexual behavior as well as procedures for reporting knowledge or suspicion of sexual abuse. That is because sexual and physical abuse at UAC shelters has been a huge problem for years. In fact, back in 2021 Judicial Watch obtained records [] [ HHS documenting 33 incidents of physical and sexual abuse during a one-month period at one UAC shelter. Last summer the Biden administration sue [ [] the government’s largest housing provider for illegal immigrant minors, which has received billions of dollars from American taxpayers, for raping, sexually abusing and harassing the children Uncle Sam paid it to shelter. The Texas-based nonprofit that has raked in enormous amounts of public funds is called Southwest Key and it once operated 29 shelters that provided temporary housing for migrants under the age of 18. The Trump administration dropped the lawsuit against Southwest Key, but also said the government would no longer use its services. The UAC program has also been rocked by another big scandal, the government’s failure to monitor hundreds of thousands of the underage migrants, many of which were placed with dangerous sponsors where they were victims of abuse and forced labor. Tens of thousands of UAC have simply vanished from the government’s radar, according to a federal audit []. Earlier this year the Trump administration announced a plan to locate the young migrants to, among other things, prevent them from being trafficked or exploited. The administration has reportedly ordered Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to sort UAC into three groups—risk, public safety, and border security—with officers told to prioritize flight risk minors, which include those with deportation orders for failing to appear in court hearings. Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request asking the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and its components to provide records of communications about the plan, titled “Unaccompanied Alien Children Joint Initiative Field Implementation,” to find UAC who have been released with no follow up by the feds as is required by law. body:
Here’s what I just said on MSNBC: |

Peter, **After Donald Trump missed the House Oversight Committee’s subpoena deadline to turn over the full Epstein files, we just received the first batch of documents.** I spoke with Antonia Hylton on _MSNBC’s The Beat_ about the Trump administration’s lack of transparency and what comes next. name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 8.22.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-v/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,This week, the Republican Party of Wisconsin officially named Stephen Mueller as our new Executive Director. His experience in multiple states, and here in Wisconsin over the last year, has shown his ability to lead the team.Additionally, over the past week, we received the report from the Post-Election Commission. Our team is dedicated to making the needed changes and implementing the items the committee recommended to turn April's loss into WINS in 2026. Check out the summary of the report below! **Post-Election Commission Summary** State Treasurer John Leiber announced the release of the Post-Election Commission's final report, stating,** "Over the past several months, our Commission has meticulously analyzed the 2025 Spring Election outcomes. We are proud to present our findings and recommendations, urging all stakeholders committed to Republican victories to carefully consider these insights."**The Commission conducted an in-depth review of the 2025 spring elections, evaluating the Republican Party of Wisconsin (RPW), County Parties, Candidates and Campaigns, and Third-Party Groups. The analysis included extensive data review, surveys of grassroots activists and County Chairs, and candidate interviews. Below is a summary of the actionable recommendations designed to strengthen Republican efforts for future elections.
## Recommendations for the Republican Party of Wisconsin
* **Enhance Fundraising** : Expand the fundraising framework by hosting an annual signature event and increasing out-of-state contributions.
* **Strengthen Communications** : Bolster the Communications department to amplify messaging and outreach.
* **Sustain Research Efforts** : Retain an in-house opposition researcher to maintain strategic advantages.
* **Develop Leadership** : Establish a mentoring program to cultivate Republican leadership.
* **Amplify Legislative Messaging** : Increase focus on Wisconsin legislative priorities in communications.
* **Support County Parties** : Provide digital and graphics support to County Parties to enhance their outreach.
* **Empower Local Messaging** : Supply County Parties with tailored messaging points to align with state goals.

## Recommendations for County Parties
* **Grow Membership** : Intensify efforts to recruit and retain members, with a focus on engaging younger volunteers.
* **Boost Voter Contact** : Prioritize social media engagement and direct voter outreach through phone calls and doorknocking.
* **Secure Funding** : Expand funding to sustain year-round operations.
* **Recruit Candidates** : Actively identify and support local candidates.
* **Enhance Training** : Increase training and mentoring opportunities for County Party chairs.
* **Improve Collaboration** : Foster better integration between campaigns and County Parties.
* **Strengthen Leadership Ties** : Build stronger relationships with district leadership.

## Recommendations for Candidates and Campaigns
* **Secure Early Funding** : Ensure candidates receive financial support early in the campaign cycle.
* **Optimize Donations** : Emphasize to donors that contributions to campaigns or RPW are the most cost-effective way to support Republican victories.

## Recommendations for Third-Party Involvement
* **Support, Don 't Supplant**: Ensure third-party groups reinforce, rather than overshadow, candidate and party messaging.
* **Promote Efficient Spending** : Encourage donors to prioritize direct contributions to campaigns or RPW, which can secure lower ad rates compared to third-party expenditures.

Chairman Brian Schimming emphasized the RPW's commitment to action, stating, **" The Republican Party of Wisconsin is committed to turning this year's setbacks into next year's victories. The 2026 elections are pivotal, and with the collective effort of our grassroots activists, County Chairs, and these strategic recommendations, Republicans are poised to deliver wins."**Following the report's completion, RPW, in collaboration with grassroots activists and County Chairs, has already taken significant steps. These include hosting leadership trainings for County Parties, launching a voter contact initiative to identify and engage voters, continuing to use opposition research to inform strategy, continuing to provide messaging to leadership across the state, and implementing the Commission's recommendations in preparation for the 2026 elections. **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-y/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [BECOME A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-j/)
# **In Case You Missed It**
[**ICYMI: Justice Rebecca Bradley blasts Judge Chris Taylor over opposition to Marsy 's Law**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-t/)
In case you missed it, the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel last week laid bare Chris Taylor's shocking disregard for crime victims, exposing how she voted NO on Marsy's Law--not once, but TWICE--as a far-left Madison Democrat in the state Legislature in 2017 and 2019. Even worse, Taylor's own campaign treasurer for her Supreme Court bid was a key player in the legal challenge against this vital victims' rights amendment, which Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly approved by a staggering 75% margin in 2020.[**WisGOP Urges Republicans to Join the Front Lines of Election Integrity on National Poll Worker Recruitment Day**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-i/)
WisGOP is calling on dedicated patriots across the state to step up and serve as poll workers for National Poll Worker Recruitment Day. Poll workers play a critical role in safeguarding the integrity of the voting process, preventing irregularities, and upholding the trust that is essential to our republic.[**WisGOP Responds to New Far-left Democrat Congressional Candidate**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-d/)
"Just weeks after his complaint of felony fraud was rejected by the state, Berman enters the race to determine which political activist is more radically left, him or Randy Bryce," stated WisGOP Spokesperson Anika Rickard. "Steil is running for reelection, and he will win. Just like last cycle when Peter Barca was propped up by millions of dollars in out-of-state dark money, and Steil still won by more than 10 points."[**WisGOP Names Executive Director**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qthtjjt-didthutlhu-h/)
The Republican Party of Wisconsin has named Stephen Mueller as its new Executive Director. Mueller will direct the RPW's operations and strategy for the 2026 cycle.
# **Worth the Read**

clean_body: No images? Patriot,This week, the Republican Party of Wisconsin officially named Stephen Mueller as our new Executive Director. His experience in multiple states, and here in Wisconsin over the last year, has shown his ability to lead the team.Additionally, over the past week, we received the report from the Post-Election Commission. Our team is dedicated to making the needed changes and implementing the items the committee recommended to turn April's loss into WINS in 2026. Check out the summary of the report below! Post-Election Commission Summary State Treasurer John Leiber announced the release of the Post-Election Commission's final report, stating, "Over the past several months, our Commission has meticulously analyzed the 2025 Spring Election outcomes. We are proud to present our findings and recommendations, urging all stakeholders committed to Republican victories to carefully consider these insights."The Commission conducted an in-depth review of the 2025 spring elections, evaluating the Republican Party of Wisconsin (RPW), County Parties, Candidates and Campaigns, and Third-Party Groups. The analysis included extensive data review, surveys of grassroots activists and County Chairs, and candidate interviews. Below is a summary of the actionable recommendations designed to strengthen Republican efforts for future elections. Recommendations for the Republican Party of Wisconsin Enhance Fundraising : Expand the fundraising framework by hosting an annual signature event and increasing out-of-state contributions. Strengthen Communications : Bolster the Communications department to amplify messaging and outreach. Sustain Research Efforts : Retain an in-house opposition researcher to maintain strategic advantages. Develop Leadership : Establish a mentoring program to cultivate Republican leadership. Amplify Legislative Messaging : Increase focus on Wisconsin legislative priorities in communications. Support County Parties : Provide digital and graphics support to County Parties to enhance their outreach. Empower Local Messaging : Supply County Parties with tailored messaging points to align with state goals. Recommendations for County Parties Grow Membership : Intensify efforts to recruit and retain members, with a focus on engaging younger volunteers. Boost Voter Contact : Prioritize social media engagement and direct voter outreach through phone calls and doorknocking. Secure Funding : Expand funding to sustain year-round operations. Recruit Candidates : Actively identify and support local candidates. Enhance Training : Increase training and mentoring opportunities for County Party chairs. Improve Collaboration : Foster better integration between campaigns and County Parties. Strengthen Leadership Ties : Build stronger relationships with district leadership. Recommendations for Candidates and Campaigns Secure Early Funding : Ensure candidates receive financial support early in the campaign cycle. Optimize Donations : Emphasize to donors that contributions to campaigns or RPW are the most cost-effective way to support Republican victories. Recommendations for Third-Party Involvement Support, Don 't Supplant: Ensure third-party groups reinforce, rather than overshadow, candidate and party messaging. Promote Efficient Spending : Encourage donors to prioritize direct contributions to campaigns or RPW, which can secure lower ad rates compared to third-party expenditures. Chairman Brian Schimming emphasized the RPW's commitment to action, stating, " The Republican Party of Wisconsin is committed to turning this year's setbacks into next year's victories. The 2026 elections are pivotal, and with the collective effort of our grassroots activists, County Chairs, and these strategic recommendations, Republicans are poised to deliver wins."Following the report's completion, RPW, in collaboration with grassroots activists and County Chairs, has already taken significant steps. These include hosting leadership trainings for County Parties, launching a voter contact initiative to identify and engage voters, continuing to use opposition research to inform strategy, continuing to provide messaging to leadership across the state, and implementing the Commission's recommendations in preparation for the 2026 elections. Take Action!We need Letter to the Editor Signers! Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at mailto:arickard@wisgop.org. Become a Poll Worker! Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! In Case You Missed It In case you missed it, the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel last week laid bare Chris Taylor's shocking disregard for crime victims, exposing how she voted NO on Marsy's Law--not once, but TWICE--as a far-left Madison Democrat in the state Legislature in 2017 and 2019. Even worse, Taylor's own campaign treasurer for her Supreme Court bid was a key player in the legal challenge against this vital victims' rights amendment, which Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly approved by a staggering 75% margin in 2020. WisGOP is calling on dedicated patriots across the state to step up and serve as poll workers for National Poll Worker Recruitment Day. Poll workers play a critical role in safeguarding the integrity of the voting process, preventing irregularities, and upholding the trust that is essential to our republic. "Just weeks after his complaint of felony fraud was rejected by the state, Berman enters the race to determine which political activist is more radically left, him or Randy Bryce," stated WisGOP Spokesperson Anika Rickard. "Steil is running for reelection, and he will win. Just like last cycle when Peter Barca was propped up by millions of dollars in out-of-state dark money, and Steil still won by more than 10 points." The Republican Party of Wisconsin has named Stephen Mueller as its new Executive Director. Mueller will direct the RPW's operations and strategy for the 2026 cycle. body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmont0g27td12mo6hi2uibdpmcusos7a1khd6ku0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmcoj7c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgh8uvof8t91najujbhjse66h11ibo2v9mfv6d90_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmcoj7c3h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zii6os6m72jpgmrt7n8fg2m2rg5q9q642dnmm9r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmcoj7c3h2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zov5g0c81aq818q76oh7a5q5c5jbo806lutdgvn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmcoj7c3h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zijb9i6nq2h0mv700t6fnh7jip836ksi2att7po0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmcoj7c3h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Congressional Director caught
disclaimer_text: paid for by our tax dollars
body:
When I reviewed the footage with Bhatt, my jaw was on the floor. Watch for yourself here. The CPC, an office of the federal government, is pressuring local governments NOT TO cooperate with the federal government. How is this even allowed in Congress?

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvptum611mg1dnm57qsfgrl7kmqekv9jlrt3o1t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)
Dear Patriot,

One of OMG's brave undercover journalists was able to sit down over dinner with Keane Bhatt, the Policy Director for the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC).

Now the CPC is an official caucus of the House of Representatives with its own staff, **paid for by our tax dollars.**

To give you an idea of their politics, **the Deputy Chairwoman of the CPC is none other than Ilhan Omar.**

When I reviewed the footage with Bhatt, my jaw was on the floor.

[**Watch for yourself here, and please, keep us going by donating today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt5s0dda0m9jfikocetk06ojbrmg12svonrtk160_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)

[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3rdo152oc134bb3lfbgssa4bgg5bh49a7poaln8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)
So Bhatt, a government employee, not only called Trump supporters his "**racist, right-wing base** ," but he also bragged about getting court injunctions to stop deportation flights while working to pressure local governments not to cooperate with the federal government.

Yep, read that right. The CPC, **an office of the federal government, is pressuring local governments NOT TO cooperate with the federal government**.

How is this even allowed in Congress?

[**Watch the full investigation here, and remember, we don 't exist without your support.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zubq115agnunveoeo86u9d1sp6qf1qdh5sak0eq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)

August is always a tough month to make ends meet. Families are back to school and distractions abound, [**so we are running behind and have a stack of bills to pay**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zebeu7ko6q6dsg9fjo7358frh4tm3je27t06922g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)and a growing staff who need to feed their families on their meager salaries.

[**I appreciate any support you can provide**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7im56dn7su3ltui3kb3sg0d66fbmclq11nmjub8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs).

I want to give a shout-out to the men and women working at OMG**. I have never had a better team.** They are powerhouse workers who are committed to exposing the truth.

Just this past Friday, we were in a secret location with a team until 2 am, which had just arrived from our undercover reporters.

**Their dedication is unparalleled and I am grateful for all of them.**

So please, [**help my team keep going by donating today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zltnu4ife35m0i826dpv6rpfquqe854ra8dkh4io_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)

Thanks for standing with us,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9sua83s2285q7d25fkut3t9potmc9e2r76a3518_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)

| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmnei1qsmq3c1hr7jkvibg0mtbrf04rmff3ofedg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu1pg8em72kqsrv3sgjnm6hcnoif5ejcq3g3ba90_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgm6o74cth2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: First Look News
subject: Thomas Sowell Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi5ga7fa4mh92d6i2ofl60fdpenk3c1s1r9knl78_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmepr6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z487jh1e7dllu2df523i6k52dslq77asgmv7db90_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmepr6cjh2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj8q57a8sq0ts6j93iri07mg8gq36q3i74985b60_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmepr6cjh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcsou0sh7vlr1sqm88g3lkthfhdgbkn9555frchg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmepr6cjh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb6oho05ai2ktv5316clqqpep7g0588bvc3t89v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjgmepr6cjh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

---|---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# Policy in Action:
Empowering the Latino Voice
---
---
| | I was so glad to join real estate, lending and building professionals at the National Association of Hispanic Real Estate Professionals' (NAHREP) Policy in Action: Empowering the Latino Voice event. The NAHREP's mission is to advance Hispanic homeownership and to help more people secure this key aspect of the American Dream. This is made even more possible by events like these, where folks come together and use their platforms to discover new ways they can serve as advocates for their communities. **Key Statistics Presented Regarding Latino Homeownership in Indiana: **
* Latino Homeownership Rates in Indiana: **59.6%**
* General Population Homeownership Rates in Indiana: **70.4% **
* In Indiana, Latinos were responsible for **21.5%** of homeownership growth over the last 10 years
* Latino Civilian Labor Force Participation Rate in Indiana: **71.5% **

Whether it is advocating for additional supports for first-time homebuyers, addressing a housing shortage or supporting our renters so that they can be better positioned for homeownership, there is opportunity for the General Assembly to help more folks get into homes. I am committed to supporting legislation that makes this a reality for more Hoosiers. It is important that people truly understand the weight their voice holds, and events that champion this idea are essential in accomplishing that.

* * *
---
---
> ## Who Pays for a Special Session? You.
> While Indiana families struggle with rising costs and underfunded schools, Republican legislators are entertaining a costly, unnecessary special session, all to redraw our congressional maps mid-decade at Donald Trump's request. They're not even pretending this is about Hoosiers anymore. It's a political stunt. A power grab. And you're footing the bill.
> ### The Price of Cheating
> How much would it cost Hoosier taxpayers to call Indiana's 150 state legislators in for a politically-motivated special session?
> * **$213 a day** for housing and food allowance x 150 legislators. **That's nearly $32,000 a day!**
> * **Mileage reimbursement** from every corner of the state to Indianapolis
> * **Outside legal counsel** hired with _your_ tax dollars to defend the GOP's manipulation
>
At a time where our state budget is already crunched, _this is irresponsible._
> ### What's the Goal Here?
> Trump and MAGA Republicans want to redraw maps early--not because of population changes, but because they think it'll help them win more seats in Congress. They want to silence your voice and stack the deck, plain and simple. And as of now, most Republican senators and representatives haven't said a single word to oppose this. Silence is complicity. You sent them to represent you. Not to help Trump cheat.
> ## What Could We Do With That Money Instead?
> Instead of wasting nearly a million dollars of your taxpayer money on political map drawing games, we could:
> * Invest in child care that working families can actually afford
> * Increase road funding to fix our potholes
> * Boost access to healthcare
>
But none of that can happen when Indiana Republicans are more interested in clinging to power than serving Hoosiers.
> ## Tell Them: We Don't Support Wasting Our Money
> We can't afford to be quiet--not when they're counting on it. 🔴 **Call the Senate: (317) 232‐9400** 🔴 **Call the House: (317) 232‐9600** **🔴 Call the Governor: (317) 232‐4567**
---
* * *
# First Committee Meeting of the Interim
---
| | | |
---
| | **Interim Committees have officially started. ** As we continue to gear up for the 2026 Legislative Session, these committees will help us inform legislation ideas for next year. In this week's [Government Reform Task Force](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=76c5e8d2dffb8b175f6a389db734a315da304640dd5b91734190314b5f4fe66e68b76895d281c3058d77a47b8193f1ad66006e19821131b2) meeting, we took a look at the boards, commissions and advisory boards throughout our state. Did you know that Indiana has** 224 Boards** and Commissions with Governor-appointed positions? That's... _a lot. _ While some of these serve critical functions, others haven't met in years, lack public transparency, or exist in name only: that is not acceptable. This committee is tasked with finding ways to increase transparency and ensure proper oversight of these entities and the tax dollars they receive. I am looking forward to working with a bipartisan group of legislators to address these issues head-on and help work towards a government that is more transparent and accountable to the taxpayers. **The list of interim committees, additional information and live streams can be found [here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=76c5e8d2dffb8b1700188fd598abed4625eca3aeddb7dca8878b4ccaa62af465cd681ed68f5788afd73a329bef728854908ce51db5c751e9).**

* * *
---
| | | |
---
| |
# Don't Miss this Opportunity to Make your Voice Heard
Indy, AES is trying to raise our electric bills _again_.

**They went up this year. **

**They are already scheduled to go up next year. **

And in 2027, **they want to raise them another $30.**

I have heard from too many folks struggling to keep up with rising utility bill prices.

With the summers getting warmer every year, we need to ensure that people are not priced out of keeping the AC running during dangerous temperatures.

**This will not be possible if bills keep rising at historic rates. **

There is still time to share any concerns about the rate increase with the [Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=76c5e8d2dffb8b17a90317fdd4d57a267ac3740e7d0914f90954a76368b7f547f323fed96b6d93907f2310150038c5dfa7b11a777a3fc9f5 " Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission") (IURC), the body that will determine the outcome of this rate case.

There are two more upcoming opportunities to give in-person public comment:
* **August 25 at 6 PM - New Augusta Public Academy North Middle School**
* **August 27 at 6 PM - Fort Benjamin Harrison Event Center (There will be an ASL interpreter for this meeting)**

**Additionally, written public comment is open until Sept. 2, 2025.** To comment: **Mail:** OUCC Consumer Services 115 West Washington Street, Suite 1500 South, Indianapolis, Indiana 46204 **Email:** uccinfo@oucc.in.gov **Online** : [www.in.gov/oucc/2361.htm](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=82553546e4d299772fe7f19cf021152a84f8c2e914b175613da60b84e24d44c5b9161733754d874858d3154ce1bc8b5ccac72ccb8a11856b)

### Thank you for your advocacy and effort to shape our community.
---
* * *
# 🏮See You at Feast of Lanterns🏮
---
| | | |
---
| | **Feast of Lanterns is TODAY. ** Events like this serve as a reminder of the rich, creative and community-centered culture that exists in our city. **Going to the Feast of Lanterns?[Click here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=82553546e4d29977cdde746322eb2f07ab79ef810088e2211e2323a3be2cf618a61c4c5697cffa85f8669ea2d40c3536239d1342f2ffb858) to view the event guide with parking and vendor locations, traffic closure and more** A huge thank you to the Near Eastside neighbors and the volunteers who make this event possible. **Interested in volunteering? [Click here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=82553546e4d29977d885a1bab9d87d558f9a215270da27c26d35b1fca4cae42ff264034ce29e332f18cad690d5f3bf69537251a1c72c9292) to view available positions. **
---
* * *
# Focused on Protecting _People_ ,
Not Billionaires
---
| | | |
---
| | **Trump 's budget bill is the single largest transfer of wealth from middle and low-income families to the wealthy. ** Thank you to Common Cause for creating the space to support and educate one another while we continue to advocate for the working families who make this state great, not the interests of billionaires. **_Some Key Updates:_**
* Families making $24,000 or less will lose around $1,200 a year from Medicaid, SNAP and other program cuts.
* Meanwhile, families making $700,000+ per year will see an increase of $13,600 -- almost entirely from tax cuts.
* The reconciliation bill is the largest ever reduction of federal entitlement programs, all while increasing deficits by $3.4 trillion over the next 10 years.

**_Medicaid_**
* Recipients of Medicaid or those covered by the Affordable Care Act (ACA) expansion must work at least 80 hours per month.
* Indiana will be required to reverify eligibility every 6 months for adults on Medicaid expansion programs.
* Leading to increased administrative workload and potential for errors that could cause Hoosiers to lose coverage
* An estimated 260,000+ Hoosiers will lose their health insurance

**_SNAP_**
* The bill reduces the federal government's share of SNAP administrative funding from 50% to 25%, meaning Indiana would be responsible for covering the remaining 75% of those costs -- an increase of approximately $46-50 million per year in state spending.
* Paired with new benefit cost sharing, Indiana will be on the hook for an estimated $190 million, which will likely result in reductions of SNAP benefits or other government services.

**_Rural Hospitals Staring Down Crisis_** Rural hospitals often see a higher percentage of patients who are on Medicaid. The cuts from this legislation would put 12 Rural Hospitals in Indiana at risk for closing due to seeing fewer patients. Closures of this degree would have severe consequences on the health and economic outlook of rural communities all over our state.
---
| |
# **My Interim Committee Assignments**
---
|
---
| | |

In this week's meeting, we took a look at the boards, commissions and advisory boards throughout our state. Did you know that Indiana has 224 Boards and Commissions with Governor-appointed positions? That's... a lot. While some of these serve critical functions, others haven't met in years, lack public transparency, or exist in name only: that is not acceptable. This committee is tasked with finding ways to increase transparency and ensure proper oversight of these entities and the tax dollars they receive. I am looking forward to working with a bipartisan group of legislators to address these issues head-on and help work towards a government that is more transparent and accountable to the taxpayers. The list of interim committees, additional information and live streams can be found . | | | | | | Don't Miss this Opportunity to Make your Voice Heard Indy, AES is trying to raise our electric bills again. They went up this year. They are already scheduled to go up next year. And in 2027, they want to raise them another $30. I have heard from too many folks struggling to keep up with rising utility bill prices. With the summers getting warmer every year, we need to ensure that people are not priced out of keeping the AC running during dangerous temperatures. This will not be possible if bills keep rising at historic rates. There is still time to share any concerns about the rate increase with the " Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission" (IURC), the body that will determine the outcome of this rate case. There are two more upcoming opportunities to give in-person public comment: August 25 at 6 PM - New Augusta Public Academy North Middle School August 27 at 6 PM - Fort Benjamin Harrison Event Center (There will be an ASL interpreter for this meeting) Additionally, written public comment is open until Sept. 2, 2025. To comment: Mail: OUCC Consumer Services 115 West Washington Street, Suite 1500 South, Indianapolis, Indiana 46204 Email: uccinfo@oucc.in.gov Online : Thank you for your advocacy and effort to shape our community. 🏮See You at Feast of Lanterns🏮 | | | | | | Feast of Lanterns is TODAY. Events like this serve as a reminder of the rich, creative and community-centered culture that exists in our city. Going to the Feast of Lanterns? to view the event guide with parking and vendor locations, traffic closure and more A huge thank you to the Near Eastside neighbors and the volunteers who make this event possible. Interested in volunteering? to view available positions. Focused on Protecting People , Not Billionaires | | | | | | Trump 's budget bill is the single largest transfer of wealth from middle and low-income families to the wealthy. Thank you to Common Cause for creating the space to support and educate one another while we continue to advocate for the working families who make this state great, not the interests of billionaires. Some Key Updates: Families making $24,000 or less will lose around $1,200 a year from Medicaid, SNAP and other program cuts. Meanwhile, families making $700,000+ per year will see an increase of $13,600 -- almost entirely from tax cuts. The reconciliation bill is the largest ever reduction of federal entitlement programs, all while increasing deficits by $3.4 trillion over the next 10 years. Medicaid Recipients of Medicaid or those covered by the Affordable Care Act (ACA) expansion must work at least 80 hours per month. Indiana will be required to reverify eligibility every 6 months for adults on Medicaid expansion programs. Leading to increased administrative workload and potential for errors that could cause Hoosiers to lose coverage An estimated 260,000+ Hoosiers will lose their health insurance SNAP The bill reduces the federal government's share of SNAP administrative funding from 50% to 25%, meaning Indiana would be responsible for covering the remaining 75% of those costs -- an increase of approximately $46-50 million per year in state spending. Paired with new benefit cost sharing, Indiana will be on the hook for an estimated $190 million, which will likely result in reductions of SNAP benefits or other government services. Rural Hospitals Staring Down Crisis Rural hospitals often see a higher percentage of patients who are on Medicaid. The cuts from this legislation would put 12 Rural Hospitals in Indiana at risk for closing due to seeing fewer patients. Closures of this degree would have severe consequences on the health and economic outlook of rural communities all over our state. | | My Interim Committee Assignments | | | | News Around Our State | | | "" "" "" "" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

name: American Action News
subject: Thomas Sowell Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgchssb0i7pq86gnjp97k6cqlidjo82nliameb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjim0ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0slehif3cu0rosc2hcbfc3epbv105efjektfme8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjim0ob1c1h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znannebsrj0od0jde830rdj4hm8emvbe8rak6en0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjim0ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z46315mhcp1hai4t4c3o3vhseli3gug5f08ihf00_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjim0ob1c1h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcidoeiio0ct1l7om7vv8rjnoi9eun2bh6gpvjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cjim0ob1c1h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

## Powell Speech Sparks Broad Market Rally
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell signaled in a much-anticipated speech that the central bank [could cut interest rates next month](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAUBODTmA5k_ANs4SIN3aZNiR728-LsAyPbAXH7iFwh3UgjfSPN13N6QqCwvT5hRVN8nDY8M2EpmKY9nkiUd0jvnIDo8nNIEFyeBBe65kMt5OQg0DWpyhmPKFBWaNpe64eSulPVYqz2_WNAzWcNEn2nQLm5E_3gsdWit1Uwt8YHIVvOOy6b2Tnw8_DwvYLOWcUURxdKTM13DFtZ0NMVD0yNjWtFZillz0x-MDEyMZ7n2dhttnfJxHjTTIx8uHPLxJhLtO96hfTGUpfo4KopHFj_7A4K5mYpK1XJuP0MRCF3PVP8tUKgv7Xyr4sOI34DAAD__-eSet4), sparking a stock market rally that saw the Dow Jones Average jump 800 points on Friday. In his speech, Powell noted the high level of uncertainty in the U.S. economy due to changes in tax, trade, and immigration policies, but added that _“the baseline outlook and the shifting balance of risks[may warrant adjusting our policy stance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd1gYjD1TUKRxt2lTWs_w2HkJBgvejuW_j5x8wnZXutLRvefXx_oBlCh__oQdHceyZjxbQmas61FOTKkdUP-0CildcaMKFNqqlbZSPaQ2awBK1zp2wUVEjaZDN8zWPkdjp7F7ORysts8tqGEG462eFajhaeZtCJPdJt-Ru2nqoc2g1KRMv4UAcXs84zzCFPwoRoWBuNT-d6HML4zpKm-svS97l9yL-WjC_BB6EXo5z7P3efN3KfRyo4Ve1OPOWujl_ydJOZAHxiZ9yYGYSm5yh0ueUCtklpQZKzaWFRil_-ImocmIQR61eMTQpIeK8Sulq3_xnrrqwnFSStSmWYzqcwdK_ybyt7y-nf4bAAD__zoMjrs)."_ Investors saw that remark as a possible endorsement of rate cuts when the Fed meets again on Sept. 16-17, and it was enough to send stocks soaring, particularly shares of giant technology companies including Nvidia, Amazon, Alphabet (Google's parent), and Meta Platforms (Facebook and Instagram).
## FBI Raids John Bolton's Home
The FBI [searched former National Security Adviser](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ_GdCDfYv4KF2noLm1KtLbXhy97GNnOId4-Iq-QbqSRZvR9X_fljoHD9vjEF-ni47LRkZlKobTs8SDmvGP6zgmZT29CwuDyAhK6Wo41tIvDwOeiKqc9EVBbkb4NXTeptutVtWqUrvOAAzglceitIaSeJiS0g5nsWAV9rckR2puUvWwb4xx6M05-UNg7q4SS5EKJqXnGsJWVPJ_xTamx8VWxXkvZs2g_BMwC5uM4GmvyRXH1AuYrCpi9CXUmTHalXD_jutUmcolbrtf4k0nAXCXt9iMwh9wPQsnHCwP_nZR_mXlr-A0AAP__pKZ6qA) John Bolton’s Maryland home and the Washington, D.C., offices of his political action committee Friday morning, calling it a “court-authorized law enforcement activity.” Agents were seen carrying boxes into Bolton’s home and bags into his office building, where he was later seen speaking with them in the lobby. Sources said Friday’s [raid was tied to classified documents](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQxfGnwZ0jPMYfFBS3cZfbbmlhM4TJjsEClChvv_K-wtZH-ku_83Vf75aY4uO_PdBUn9aI78JYK-b1TG9kLqfN3yVb5o_fKFtyZQUJQyvnFvrVWeLPqhpnPCJg36DppmHQqh9G1QQz-G7UWsqp0_vs922esLMIWqsdoevnhsxVkzP0nZSj7G-bc9Zvs_aTsqPblVASHdWUb89EsQb0_EkvzLc9HQ2bUOtZRP9PwCJgqQEDMV-bgCWkAy-QgMW6gyKVmm2lFAUsgxqHbpzaZwqx3RLXFFu_UXsJBSxNNu58EzOVcRJKPg5Lv9mm_umnl4GfAAAA__-BIXz6) included in Bolton’s tell-all book about his tenure as national security adviser during the first Trump administration. A previous investigation into the claim was later dropped by the Biden administration. In addition to serving as President Trump’s national security adviser, Bolton was the [U.S. ambassador](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOwzzRHAKim3sZtstDchjZPYpBtkh_v3G_YXtbnKTc3PP12N62Ehxe37aFU0JadqwHoSlYJ72VJHo2G3-PrIlOoOL2UZ_TCCg52Lg0E3eRjon2XgTEAG7Bs1N9_1ddr2SzWL0rCw4rdTd37yCYQiuF05rlHoWMsgmmosmBuhuQijRtc57G9xwD1pa5WfJpEAfS8rtK8WtLBjoTG_M7ZzWhsxSyn6w7oPByGCstbbz5uarZDBeaAajGK4MDMbgIr8-8FdaNu4SlbTxkn_Wne-2ILVLWanJxu81EsVDaSbFc7WR_ubKvxy9DfwGAAD__-GUepo) to the United Nations under President George W. Bush.
## Democrats Get Memo: Watch Your Words
Third Way, a prominent liberal think tank, issued a blacklist of terms it’s [asking Democrats to stop using](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL9GdHjkkxC4UJGGzmlTMgc6mUsOxEgae_z3GfILqXd2d977uk93ZOH98Ykb-RrTtNOrCNVKeTrSi0TKgfmnZBR5x5kzcigTaOhaPbRgpoAs78k2wUciINOQv_Zdd7Omc7ZZPfQQo-7pRoZcN4R-vkaD1oKbtaNZN-zPNT2AuWrttLnMIWCch1vsLbqwWGU1Ba4pX74T73WlKO_0pHxZ0taIX2s9ijIfCkYFY11pZZEzUzCuaaMTSMG44HYgP3YFY2ddZwbXBtrSkrGWFp-JQ3sk4coLSruknGmpO5Wz2mQfjheLcHG9svqxIf89NPVfyp4efgMAAP__emmB2Q) as they try to win back voters, including “birthing person” instead of woman, “the unhoused” instead of homeless, and “Latinx” for Latinos. The memo organizes the words [it wants to ban from Democrats’ vocabulary](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ_GdEZ4jYErXFwUUeXSpEiJDF6Ozb9gZPvOurePyCukG2k0o0_f78f0cMR0PH-6HW1ew3RgSYw5Y5zOUJA5nS5-peiYP-tM0ZFPEzRgZDNI0JN3xJ-prbxdEQF1hVb1xtxabbq22qyCHnujlFJw61s9G-hQz2bATpte-aUie701A2jVNF2j69l7t87Dbe1b1_mlFW2DnnKI9Z9AR95w5U94Y6yXsFdst5zPJPRdwChgLKXUezquTsCIh3wlAeMZmDItV3xe02PHIwsY84ZyZrd8MaUswypLiD5Jj3tYostJpi282Ev3DuQFjC7K-139gOExCD2GhbzQ379d-rCkXxjPKlp_FmKm1PWibZ67I_4Hmv_L7tvC3wAAAP__a5mP7A) into categories, including Therapy-Speak ("privilege,” "safe space”), Seminar Room Language ("systems of oppression”), Gender/Orientation Correctness ("chest feeding,” "patriarchy”), and Racial Constructs ("intersectionality”). _“We think language is one of the central problems we face with normie voters, signaling that we are out of touch with how they live, think, and talk,”_ the authors note. [Read the full memo here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQQOHTQAcytvkrXKTZbtOmRGM8hkkGjGxrLW4fba6Q-klf8b6eyxOI6dw-4UCTfVhOLIkxZ4zLFQoypwviT4rAfHtLEcilRQrZN2JqpFocEN-Lrp3xiBJVjaYb-37Wqh90vRshZtF5LaxSvZtmDauarXVSqdHOiF1N5q2JSapOiEGo1joH3k6zHzUMbtWVFugoh9h-Bzrzjp7v8MLYruGo2ew5X6lSH5V8VPJRSmnzTtEVuNsQt0o-DjzCu0BqKDcpHJh3OreGmgTk6mjcVYiZ0jBWWmwHEP_R-V8_Xkb-BgAA__-36nXT).

name: Troy Downing
subject: My campaign could be over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
If I don’t get help tonight, it’s all but over.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cICHk2BJR8A)I'm staring defeat in the face.
As a combat veteran, Christian, husband, and father, I thought I could count on fellow Patriots like you to stand with me against the radical Left. But it hasn’t panned out like I hoped.
**I'm Troy Downing, a freshman GOP Congressman fighting to put America First.**
Our House Majority hangs by a thread – just a few seats separate us from the Democrats' socialist agenda.
I'm facing a brutal truth: the August deadline is almost here, and my campaign could be over if we fail to meet it. Every dollar will be made public, and the Democrats are waiting to pounce with their massive cash advantage.
_We can't let them see weakness now._
I'm not asking for a bailout or a massive donation. **[I just need a small contribution from patriots like you to keep my campaign alive:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**[ SEND A CARE PACKAGE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Without your help, I'll be forced to surrender this critical House seat to the radical Left. But if you chip in right now, you’ll help deliver a crushing blow to the Democrats' agenda.
We’re not just fighting to win an election– We’re fighting for our country's future.
[So please, will you make a small contribution to help a combat veteran take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
Your support is my last line of defense.
God Bless You and God Bless America,
Troy Downing | |

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or
