## State Senate Closes in on Redistricting Approval
The Texas Senate's consideration of the proposed redistricting bill went into Friday evening as at least one Democrat, Sen. Carol Alvarado, [said she would filibuster](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAMBuCngS0oBAgwZOjCdl07IpMYsBQSRNyDe_uK69S5q2Vb__d_PcYHkKewfMKGhq85jgHP5JEZjzFhAMYDHSU-yDKF5RkZVxqVVI2QnVDV6ID8a6xzZybp-jJHU7ZN09e6l32-mmruoQc7adU2WktrrZO6grlrwHboICdzP5OdqspSlnVb4DRVWoOFTrVt07msluiI41HwiowXpNm_4hOPwsYt92Zl3lNWfWRqyNRwnmcxx0vpNX4njuFeytRwqzI1vM_Fr0v8gQmH0z2kwBgSzYRJ3FixxF1ssAu8drSMLj-M20_ynpJus1ouG5B_R-H_Ffg06icAAP__xbWJ1Q) to delay its passage.

The bill is expected to be approved regardless of filibuster efforts. It will then move from to Gov. Greg Abbott for his signature. Senate Democrats [didn't make an attempt to break quorum](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ_GdEZmMX-FizR0lzYlsvECK_kwslfH3dtHXJQidcrd0Yzmm6_bdLMUaF8_7R0NP5c47XjmgMyYpoy7ZUzoKXOimWlfH5FxowkUNFL1EurJWwqvSRfeOOWHqkBTdU0z6HZQQ7GZBYd-6Z0GO7i2A1XXzQLWV65rdKN1X5C5wlQPdVWpSnclOle3rZ1tD13X9F5ohZ44ppI3ZHzavIRXfGAq53gvgtmYjyzqDwGjgPE8z3J2-aK4dAHj2yJgvF6_p_xBk0ekjF5ylIfNWa7xkH9wpaMQ5JLI25eAsUjGHyeFQLnthFbr3VJ41-D_jfcw8B0AAP___iWGOw), as House Democrats did, which would have required all 11 Democratic senators to be absent. Instead, Democrats promised to challenge the proposed redistricting in court. On Thursday evening, the Senate also passed a [camp safety bill](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu5CAMQE9DOkbECQEKim3S_W23jEwwM0jMEAUr-XP7VWa1J_iVC8tPfu_P1_KFueTX_Tc-yfN3qsuLzlaImfal0QuZdoq58Z5Xzq_7UZkeeQEFWiorYVgi5vJexi76oKLrO_K90dqNk1Oue3ggAKXdgBiIUtAmObQUQoKktEm6y_6CKQtD36t-NDcKYZgmXNGCMdpGMSqKmet-4wcxfWNL5V0P2m9rfXbFP5i3JoZfAmYB83metzMhXksB85EjVQHzZSVgLnXFImD-YP5P-c9TbtgaNbnic5MNE_FbhlyKxMS0y0gHNsYrgkyl1njdgzVSOadsCFZOgEmOYdQSITqpJ1AaJhVjDN3u43bmUnKbjBjV_Ym5fP7nn1U_PPwNAAD__xptlvc) in response to the devastating July 4 floods. Prior to the vote, all the names of children who died at Camp Mystic were read in the chamber.
## Dallas Rapper Arrested as Album Released
Dallas rapper Xavier Landum, whose stage name is BigXthaPlug, was [arrested for marijuana and illegal firearm possession](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvOpDAQhE9jMiPbvEzgYBOyf9MNURs30JJ5yO4ZhtuvmCv8aZWqVPX9-xl_gCLty1_Y0PFnPsYdrxyRGdOYcQfGhIEyJ5qY9uV9MK40GmUaqaw01RiA4j3WRXBehV4X6HTXNH3d9qovVme7BpTvGxO0DqGpdesB5s7btrfzVNmC3FOmrKm0VrruSvS-aluYwJqua2wQtcJAfKSSV2T8QJ7jfbwxldOxFdGtzGcW1R9hBmGG67rKyefnxeMLM3wjwgyPJMzgafnwCmd8LRJSwswYJO0yQIyQJUKKt5wTBbglzIxJ7nhJ8PG1yZCO88QgzFAkF86LYqTcdqJWywYUv4P4dxjfzvwPAAD__8Z9ilg) in the city Thursday night, hours before the release party for his new album, _I Hope You’re Happy._ The incident marks Landum’s [second arrest](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI7MYMemoNiG7m27JRp7BrDkQGTmhby_XxHtH2w7I517z_3zNX1hLnlbfuODB3nP-7TxeRQW4TodvKFwZcqH1Jwkb8trF17zBAacNkFDNxHm8jPZhoZoqG8bHlrvXG_vvembdZhdz5acw5hMDH4OcyDHNniabYuta_JwwUyArm1Na_2NY-zud0wYwHsXSFnDlGWvN1lZ-I3HXH72F9db2h9NGVaR56G6XwpGBeN5nrdzRryeCkasklNhBePlpWAse8KiYIx5ecuKz_K9aKyVD2HShKXgoT8h_676ja_MVRfc6Puh04p1uXAQvG77S5N7PUeM2iYCjRZQd56o48iWEjR1oOeZS8nH3Strlgfm8mku_7f3a4C_AQAA___gsZXf) in the Dallas-Fort Worth area this year, with the first also coming on charges of marijuana possession. According to the affidavit, the arresting officer asked Landum during the stop if he had any weapons in his vehicle, to which the rapper [replied](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOrDAQRE9jMpBtDIbAwU_I5qcbogY30JIHI7sXmNuv2CtsVkGpSu99vcYXUKB9_Q9vdHwvcdzxygGZMY0Zd2BM6ClzoplpX8_IuNGopW5K2ZW6Hj1Q-Iym8G6SvlcFOmWbpjdtL_tic2iabjLKtLK3bV_LGRbvJ2u08dIuyhTknjHZ6VopqYytcJrqtoUZOm1t03lhJHrimCrekPGGvIRPPDFVc3wXwW3MRxb1P6EHoYfruqol3ubBeApCD08UekhwHJjKidabNzjC91pCSpgZfekhBMhFcv64KATKrRVGrm-g8PvCf3NzOv0TAAD__3tweok), "Mine is under my armrest." BigXthaPlug rose to fame over the last two years, and his new album, released yesterday, features collaborations with stars Jelly Roll, Luke Combs, and Shaboozey, among others.
## DFW Reigns in Best Real Estate Markets List
Dallas-Fort Worth dominates a recent ranking of the nation’s best [real estate markets](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQQOGnwZ0jGDCGguI27nLbLa3BTGK02I5g8vf2q-wrbH2krzhf5_mMueT9-h83Cvy6HPNOz1aImercaEemSik3rnnhvF8fB9OaZ5Aw9NL1oOeEubxn06UQZfKqo6DGYfDGeum7NZBXSYEZHNiLHtAt2kaw3o-klV6M7HL4YNKBVkoqM54oRm0tLuhgHAeXhJGUMh_1xCsxvbBdyvt4UD0tx9aVsDLfmtD_BEwCpieWQrze46cKmCjdBUyRGveVsPTUGJn6Des3cRMwKeOc72pIt2cuJTc7CiOvG-by6_PfrjwC_AQAAP__l2V2Kw), with five area cities scoring spots in the top 10. McKinney is No. 1 on the list, followed by Richardson and Frisco at No. 5 and No. 6, respectively. Denton and Allen round out the last two spots in the top 10, while Fort Worth proper landed at No. 17. Austin was the only other Texas city in the top 25. The ranking from WalletHub evaluates factors ranging from median home-price appreciation to job growth to determine the best markets in which to purchase a home. You can see the [full list here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQQOGnwZ0jGDCGguI27nLbLa3BTGK02I5g8vf2q-wrbH2krzhf5_mMueT9-h83Cvy6HPNOz1aImercaEemSik3rnnhvF8fB9OaZ5Aw9NL1oOeEubxn06UQZfKqo6DGYfDGeum7NZBXSYEZHNiLHtAt2kaw3o-klV6M7HL4YNKBVkoqM54oRm0tLuhgHAeXhJGUMh_1xCsxvbBdyvt4UD0tx9aVsDLfmtD_BEwCpieWQrze46cKmCjdBUyRGveVsPTUGJn6Des3cRMwKeOc72pIt2cuJTc7CiOvG-by6_PfrjwC_AQAAP__l2V2Kw).

Carol Alvarado, to delay its passage. The bill is expected to be approved regardless of filibuster efforts. It will then move from to Gov. Greg Abbott for his signature. Senate Democrats , as House Democrats did, which would have required all 11 Democratic senators to be absent. Instead, Democrats promised to challenge the proposed redistricting in court. On Thursday evening, the Senate also passed a in response to the devastating July 4 floods. Prior to the vote, all the names of children who died at Camp Mystic were read in the chamber. Dallas Rapper Arrested as Album Released Dallas rapper Xavier Landum, whose stage name is BigXthaPlug, was in the city Thursday night, hours before the release party for his new album, I Hope You’re Happy. The incident marks Landum’s in the Dallas-Fort Worth area this year, with the first also coming on charges of marijuana possession. According to the affidavit, the arresting officer asked Landum during the stop if he had any weapons in his vehicle, to which the rapper , "Mine is under my armrest." BigXthaPlug rose to fame over the last two years, and his new album, released yesterday, features collaborations with stars Jelly Roll, Luke Combs, and Shaboozey, among others. DFW Reigns in Best Real Estate Markets List Dallas-Fort Worth dominates a recent ranking of the nation’s best , with five area cities scoring spots in the top 10. McKinney is No. 1 on the list, followed by Richardson and Frisco at No. 5 and No. 6, respectively. Denton and Allen round out the last two spots in the top 10, while Fort Worth proper landed at No. 17. Austin was the only other Texas city in the top 25. The ranking from WalletHub evaluates factors ranging from median home-price appreciation to job growth to determine the best markets in which to purchase a home. name: Barack Obama
subject: These are existential fights for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is about something precious: Who are we as a country? What values do we stand for?

---
Peter, these are not normal times, to put it mildly. Just imagine if, heading into a tough midterm election, I demanded that a state controlled by Democrats suddenly redraw its electoral maps because my party was “entitled to five more seats.” Republicans who are silent now never would have tolerated that from me or my predecessors. And let me be clear: This is not about partisanship. **This is about something more precious: who we are as a country, and the values we stand for.** At times like this, it’s on each of us to decide what we care about — and what we’re willing to do for our democracy. **Eric Holder and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to be on the front lines of these fights — and this work matters more than ever.[So I need to ask: Will you make a donation to support this cause and help face down escalating threats to American democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113834362/565101012/-387901526?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR_email_20250823-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250823-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5OGNmNGIzLTE4ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6mm9FHa6gTdoYMNEebUIhWRWsaorly9RDwrRBXreazg=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

It wasn’t long ago that most Americans didn’t have to worry about any of this.
For decades, there was a broad consensus — among Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals — around a certain set of rules by which we settled our differences. We recognized that some bonds transcend party, region, or ideology. And even if we had not fully realized an ideal version of America, we could all agree on the basic ideals to pursue: freedom, justice, and equality.
But some of these concepts also started to become abstract in our minds. Because they don’t intrude on our day-to-day lives, we started to take them for granted. Not anymore.
**Now is the time to stand up for your beliefs – to recognize the moment we’re in and rise to meet it.** Attorney General Holder and I started the NDRC because we believe that when districts are gerrymandered, it takes power away from voters. And that affects all of us.
[**The fight to end gerrymandering and make elections fairer is central to the fight for democracy. I’m so proud to be part of it. Please join me and make a donation to fund the NDRC and support this critical work when it’s needed most.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113834394/565101044/-387901526?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR_email_20250823-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250823-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5OGNmNGIzLTE4ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6mm9FHa6gTdoYMNEebUIhWRWsaorly9RDwrRBXreazg=)

clean_body: This is about something precious: Who are we as a country? What values do we stand for? Peter, these are not normal times, to put it mildly. Just imagine if, heading into a tough midterm election, I demanded that a state controlled by Democrats suddenly redraw its electoral maps because my party was “entitled to five more seats.” Republicans who are silent now never would have tolerated that from me or my predecessors. And let me be clear: This is not about partisanship. This is about something more precious: who we are as a country, and the values we stand for. At times like this, it’s on each of us to decide what we care about — and what we’re willing to do for our democracy. Eric Holder and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to be on the front lines of these fights — and this work matters more than ever.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = It wasn’t long ago that most Americans didn’t have to worry about any of this. For decades, there was a broad consensus — among Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals — around a certain set of rules by which we settled our differences. We recognized that some bonds transcend party, region, or ideology. And even if we had not fully realized an ideal version of America, we could all agree on the basic ideals to pursue: freedom, justice, and equality. But some of these concepts also started to become abstract in our minds. Because they don’t intrude on our day-to-day lives, we started to take them for granted. Not anymore. Now is the time to stand up for your beliefs – to recognize the moment we’re in and rise to meet it. Attorney General Holder and I started the NDRC because we believe that when districts are gerrymandered, it takes power away from voters. And that affects all of us. = Thank you, Barack Obama = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. clean_body: Peter, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Peter, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

| | Fellow Conservative, You've been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most. But lately... I've noticed we haven't heard from you. I get it. It's been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle's already over. Let me tell you that it's not. But here's the truth: **this is the moment we need our people the most** --when no one's watching. When the media is tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash. And right now, we're hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I'd be lying if I said I wasn't thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative. So, here's what I'm asking: **Can I convince you to send in $1 today to let me know that you 're still around and interested in being a part of the team? Not for the number--honestly, it's symbolic.**
**Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you 're still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that** you haven't tuned out. **[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9aTS1KdWx5LVF1aWV0XzIwMjUwNzI0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Wk0tSnVseS1RdWlldCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSJ9/NfuUdOeOKAjjJU5c-5_WCg)[CHIP IN $1 >>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9BdWd1c3QtUXVpZXQtMm5kXzIwMjUwODE5JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QXVndXN0LVF1aWV0LTJuZCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSJ9/QFqdHjDwwH7LaXmh1pRC5g)** We can't win this with half our team watching from the sidelines. And the truth is: I'd rather have 10,000 conservatives chipping in $1 because it shows we have real Americans backing our efforts and not Hollywood Elites or Mega Donors like the Socialist Democrats depend on. **Ted Cruz**

Peter, Medical liberty is gaining ground in Texas. After the untimely death of HB 3219 by Representative Joanne Shofner during the regular session, many thought the push to make Ivermectin available without a prescription was over. But TFVC didn’t. **More than 7,000 Texans** added their names to TFVC’s petition urging Governor Abbott to add Ivermectin access to the First Special Session call. We hand-delivered your signatures directly to the Governor’s office. And though the issue was not initially added, the pressure never let up. Last week, **Speaker Dustin Burrows made Rep. Shofner’s OTC Ivermectin bill, HB 25, a legislative priority, and** just this week, **Governor Abbott officially added the issue to the second Special Session agenda.** That kind of recognition doesn’t happen by accident. _This is what grassroots power looks like._ TFVC helped spark and sustain the public pressure that brought OTC Ivermectin back into the spotlight. Now, we’re preparing for the next phase: **mobilizing Texans to make sure HB 25 passes.** [But we need your help to finish this fight.](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYzNTI3NzQzMjUzNzc1NDY3LFwiclwiOjE2MzUyNzc3ODcxOTc2MjAwMX0iLCJzIjoiYTE3ZDk1NDYxNjk0YjZiZSJ9)

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi Boom! How Good Public Policy Means We’ve Overtaken Europe
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msthriving?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **Which economy is thriving more? Great Britain, Japan, France or Mississippi?**

**The answer, of course, is Mississippi.** In 2024, our state’s per capita output reached $53,872, surpassing Japan ($32,859), France ($47,954), and even Great Britain ($52,369).

**This year, Mississippi is poised to overtake Germany, whose output is declining amid recession, while our state grows fast.**

When I point this out to some of my Euro friends, someone often asks about Purchasing Power Parity. “Surely”, they say, “if you take into account the purchasing power of a dollar on our side of the Atlantic, Mississippi’s lead over Europe disappears”.

Not so. Actually, if you consider the different purchasing power of a dollar in our state, Mississippi’s lead over Europe grows even longer.

**Europe is falling behind not due to any statistical sleight of hand, but because of bad public policy.** Taxes in Europe and Japan are too high. Labor markets are inflexible. Energy costs in Europe are insanely high thanks to decades of renewable dogma.

**Mississippi is now one of the fastest growing states in America thanks to good public policy.** In 2021, our state implemented significant labor market reforms (as proposed by MCPP). In 2022, Mississippi implemented flat tax reform (again, MCPP led the way).

Our state has kept energy costs low by avoiding the renewable boondoggle. In 2024, our state adopted school funding reform that gets more money into the classroom (again, MCPP policy). This year, our state legislated to eliminate the income tax. (Modesty precludes me from pointing out that this, too, was MCPP policy being implemented).

**Thanks to these free market reforms, our state is on a roll.** Disposable income per person in Mississippi now exceeds that of all the major European economies like the UK, France, Italy, Spain, and Germany, too.

There is so much inward investment pouring in that this week, when another $6 billion project in Rankin County was announced, it barely raised a ripple of comment.

**As I keep pointing out, we’ve had more economic growth in Mississippi in the past five years than over the previous fifteen. **

This year, Mississippi and Alabama, once dismissed as the economically backward south, will manufacture more cars (about 1.5 million) than France or Britain or Italy.

Have an awesome weekend! Or, as they say in Europe during their four-day weekends, _Hab ein tolles Wochenende_!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=13bc235452&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. Would you like to have lunch with Lord Daniel Hannan?** He will be talking about the Anglosphere and the importance of American leadership. Given the state of Europe, I can’t think of a more important subject.

[Click here for one of the last remaining tickets](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c21a2a4961&e=5703353baa)
---
|
---

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=0243515049) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=0243515049).

name: VoteVets
subject: Trump is targeting homeless Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
No fundraising request today. All we ask is that you take a minute to read this piece in The New York Times.
#
Peter: No fundraising request today.
All we ask is that you take a minute to read this piece in _The New York Times_ : [**Trump’s Get-Tough Approach on Homelessness May Sweep Up Veterans**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19306?t=1&akid=34552%2E3013755%2E2cCH7E)
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19306?t=2&akid=34552%2E3013755%2E2cCH7E)
A preview:
* Midway through Donald J. Trump’s first administration, his top Veterans Affairs officials hailed an extraordinary achievement. A government housing program had reduced homelessness among veterans by nearly one-half since 2010.

* The program, known as HUD-VASH, provided homeless veterans with housing vouchers and case management, asking them to chip in about one-third of whatever income they received as rent. The rental assistance came with no preconditions, and drug treatment and mental health care were offered, but not required, an approach known as Housing First.

* But that approach is being swept aside by the new Trump administration. In an executive order issued late last month, President Trump instructed government agencies to stop funding Housing First programs which, the order said, “deprioritize accountability and fail to promote treatment, recovery and self-sufficiency.”

| [READ ON](https://act.votevets.org/go/19306?t=3&akid=34552%2E3013755%2E2cCH7E)
---
In the constant firehouse of news we can’t possibly read everything. But we’d appreciate it if you took a moment to see how Trump and his administration are undermining their own programs, and how that’s screwing over Veterans. Trump’s pissing a lot of people off now. Sooner or later, the bill is going to come due.
VoteVets will make sure of it.
| [DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250823-1-60&t=4&akid=34552%2E3013755%2E2cCH7E)
---

In an executive order issued late last month, President Trump instructed government agencies to stop funding Housing First programs which, the order said, “deprioritize accountability and fail to promote treatment, recovery and self-sufficiency.” | In the constant firehouse of news we can’t possibly read everything. But we’d appreciate it if you took a moment to see how Trump and his administration are undermining their own programs, and how that’s screwing over Veterans. Trump’s pissing a lot of people off now. Sooner or later, the bill is going to come due. VoteVets will make sure of it. | PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206wasj0cg5aq6meyx0saa5dzp1ks2skax6f9ikwglvvc1qfxv6f99utzutkcd58vfeaq0zsvh587rvo6x0&__stmp=t1g6xg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1i5oa2zff50lpdqsw9s0lgux5d24jj1hbs99dl9u3wxjiqwfx63on4mrxqbqwp5ivb7x7fnv2x7l0mjd2yalcu7jx0190sgxf2jk2249dey9i8xxdwldg3uon0h4ndd85m5k61u0p4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1i5oa2zff50lpdqsw9s0lgux5d24jj1hbs99dl9u3wxjiqwfx63on4mrxqbqwp5ivb7x7fnv2x7l0mjd2yalcu7jx0190sgxf2jk2249dey9i8xxdwldg3uon0h4ndd85m5k61u0p4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1g6xg&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

After the 2020 election, I was a founding member of the House’s Election Integrity Caucus, so believe me, this fight means everything to me.

President Trump just made his plans official to forever _SECURE_ our elections!
---
And best of all, he said he’s ready to **"FIGHT LIKE HELL”** to get it done __before__ the upcoming midterm elections that will decide the fate of our Republican majorities.

With the President pushing full steam ahead in our fight for FREE and FAIR elections ahead of the midterms, I’ve compiled a secure briefing just for YOU on how you can join the fight.

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze- I’m a retired Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I’m running for Al Franken’s former Senate seat in Minnesota, in what is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race in Minnesota since 2009.
**
_Democrats think we’re assholes, buffoons, Nazi’s, and just plain idiots. You and I both know that’s BS. _**__

I carried our flag on the battlefield for more than 20 years in over 70 countries. While serving our nation and carrying Old Glory, I learned a few things, and I want to share a few with you today.

**I’m concerned Google may be censoring our messages to you, so I’m including my message on a secure page that is only accessible for the next 24 hours.**

_
_ I hope you’ll take the time to read my note to you.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.
My last chance. My Hail Mary.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12957890/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZXhGV0JnMnd4SA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjM/LbmNsZXpCU3lsRA/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTRzdiU2xLcGdscw/gaKnAhg/s3u4078d9e5)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12957890/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjM/LbmNsZXpCU3lsRA/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTRzdiU2xLcGdscw/gaKnAhg/s9q3d0eff99)

name: Satanic evil
subject: A modern day slave trader is working to turn PA red
body:
The proceeds of an alleged violent human trafficking network are being invested in taking Pennsylvania so far to the right that it will be unrecognizable.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t1TjsDLm9_pTB0U2bovG43QZJ_0JL5HYgjEfWv83RisaCozDuTljHl5ok9tJsMwcN2iYN_CkuOMCw-WrNUIsasI1o_buu2MiqBxb0kfhJcPhwXy1dqfPyViOqTkeVbCxaCYP8pBG_Et_G5s1G0zX1IWU06hd108xOR3hI3iyzDM58sPTBUQPAU691rr6bn567CscRXpNcfrCK6v-xLjUm3ScHKK_ovbf&c=bzM0075Snig4S0cj2LgL9aHgy80_1WcQ25BI20es9ufkxFIJOlyoUg==&ch=jdw52d0uZPtU0aSJh8txF_VsFEp6n6Gt9r96i9aSoYyi5SyoMuDKBQ==)
---
| Peter,
Yesterday, we wrote to you about the far-right PAC, Early Vote Action, that is the spearhead of the GOP's efforts to remove the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in an obscure upcoming November 2025 election.
Removing these justices means clearing the way for a GOP redistricting that would remove all of Pennsylvania's blue congressional seats and zero election accountability for MAGA in 2026 and in 2028 when Trump seeks a third term.
Unless Dems can make a rapid course correction a GOP victory in this race is all but assured. Which begs the question: how did Early Vote Action accrue so much momentum so quickly? The answers lies in the PAC's dark money backers:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t1TjsDLm9_pTB0U2bovG43QZJ_0JL5HYgjEfWv83RisaCozDuTljHl5ok9tJsMwcN2iYN_CkuOMCw-WrNUIsasI1o_buu2MiqBxb0kfhJcPhwXy1dqfPyViOqTkeVbCxaCYP8pBG_Et_G5s1G0zX1IWU06hd108xOR3hI3iyzDM58sPTBUQPAU691rr6bn567CscRXpNcfq05cnn0PhmS7OBIDyjTcid&c=bzM0075Snig4S0cj2LgL9aHgy80_1WcQ25BI20es9ufkxFIJOlyoUg==&ch=jdw52d0uZPtU0aSJh8txF_VsFEp6n6Gt9r96i9aSoYyi5SyoMuDKBQ==)
---
| | | | The PAC's funders include Elon Musk (who gave a million dollars!), Turning Point USA, and General Michael Flynn's PAC. Flynn is notorious for using his military psychological warfare acumen to bolster the insidious Q-Anon narrative that claimed people like Obama and Hillary Clinton were murdering children.
Also amongst the PAC's backers is Tristan Tate who has been making frequent $5,000 donations to the PAC since the beginning of this year. Tristan is the brother of notorious 'masculinity' influencer Andrew Tate. The brothers were arrested last year on rape and human trafficking charges when the network they were running was uncovered by authorities. They are accused of being literal slave traders.
Utilizing a tactic they referred to as the 'loverboy' method, the brothers would travel to impoverished countries seeking out attractive young women, flaunt their wealth and feign interest in their targets getting them to become their girlfriends, and once enmeshed in their web and with nowhere to run, the brothers then allegedly trafficked the women forcing them into a life of prostitution.
The proceeds of this alleged violent human trafficking network are being invested in taking Pennsylvania so far to the right that it will be unrecognizable -- and so far, they are winning.
Defend Our Courts, one of the only Democratic orgs ringing the alarm bell about this looming disaster, is rapidly building up a counterforce to salvage things for Dems, but we are outnumbered and outgunned.
[To have any hope of keeping up with the troves of MAGA blood money flowing into this race we will need support from every small dollar donor in the nation. Can we count on you to chip in $50, $25, or even $5 to save PA and keep us in the fight? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t1TjsDLm9_pTB0U2bovG43QZJ_0JL5HYgjEfWv83RisaCozDuTljHl5ok9tJsMwcqW3HgkrGyniN8CER4k7Qe1hsf_ijax1lwQyHMKJAYU8FoCv5UBQuthyZnOz_20YG0KWeqkAdPgiuqA2ls4H4fbWOrmCzKdBNXYmHKjTMXfmeGaJuSRT0xGqVzRbNTi667qR33TUikUchQff8Mvqy4nTku6deC3aA3ecmX70Eh4Y=&c=bzM0075Snig4S0cj2LgL9aHgy80_1WcQ25BI20es9ufkxFIJOlyoUg==&ch=jdw52d0uZPtU0aSJh8txF_VsFEp6n6Gt9r96i9aSoYyi5SyoMuDKBQ==)
---

clean_body: The proceeds of an alleged violent human trafficking network are being invested in taking Pennsylvania so far to the right that it will be unrecognizable. | | | | | == | Peter, Yesterday, we wrote to you about the far-right PAC, Early Vote Action, that is the spearhead of the GOP's efforts to remove the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in an obscure upcoming November 2025 election. Removing these justices means clearing the way for a GOP redistricting that would remove all of Pennsylvania's blue congressional seats and zero election accountability for MAGA in 2026 and in 2028 when Trump seeks a third term. Unless Dems can make a rapid course correction a GOP victory in this race is all but assured. Which begs the question: how did Early Vote Action accrue so much momentum so quickly? The answers lies in the PAC's dark money backers: | == | | | | The PAC's funders include Elon Musk (who gave a million dollars!), Turning Point USA, and General Michael Flynn's PAC. Flynn is notorious for using his military psychological warfare acumen to bolster the insidious Q-Anon narrative that claimed people like Obama and Hillary Clinton were murdering children. Also amongst the PAC's backers is Tristan Tate who has been making frequent $5,000 donations to the PAC since the beginning of this year. Tristan is the brother of notorious 'masculinity' influencer Andrew Tate. The brothers were arrested last year on rape and human trafficking charges when the network they were running was uncovered by authorities. They are accused of being literal slave traders. Utilizing a tactic they referred to as the 'loverboy' method, the brothers would travel to impoverished countries seeking out attractive young women, flaunt their wealth and feign interest in their targets getting them to become their girlfriends, and once enmeshed in their web and with nowhere to run, the brothers then allegedly trafficked the women forcing them into a life of prostitution. The proceeds of this alleged violent human trafficking network are being invested in taking Pennsylvania so far to the right that it will be unrecognizable -- and so far, they are winning. Defend Our Courts, one of the only Democratic orgs ringing the alarm bell about this looming disaster, is rapidly building up a counterforce to salvage things for Dems, but we are outnumbered and outgunned. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This is a true battle of good versus satanic evil. Thank you in advance for your support. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

Hi Peter,

Our endorsed candidate, Debra Shigley, is running in a **special election for Georgia State Senate District 21, taking place this TUESDAY.** This is a race for an open seat against 6 Republican candidates, 5 of whom are white males – she’s the only Democrat in the race.

All of her opponents are proud conservative, MAGA Republicans who have vowed to further restrict access to abortion in the state. Women in Georgia are already suffering due to their draconian abortion laws – We can’t let that happen.

[**This is a highly flippable seat, and we have NO time to waste. We’re working to unseat as many “abortion ban” legislators as possible and replace them with women who will restore and defend our rights. You can support Debra’s campaign for this seat by rushing a split $20.25 or more donation immediately →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-shigley/?refcode=EM_F_250822shigley_N_EH_90DO_10_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

Last year, we were proud to support Debra Shigley’s candidacy as she ran against an extremist anti-choice opponent who helped push the state's cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban. This law has already caused untold harm to women, including Adriana Smith, who was declared brain dead at 8 weeks pregnant and was subsequently placed on _life support_ for months so doctors could retrieve her baby via cesarean section.

The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, **which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

The women of Georgia deserve so much more, and that starts with better representation in their government. That’s why we are thrilled to be supporting Debra Shigley once again as she runs for **the Georgia State Senate District 21.**

While this district is historically represented by Republicans, the special circumstances of this election, combined with disapproval of the current lawmakers in Georgia, put Debra in a unique position to flip this seat. **We believe Debra has what it takes to win this highly competitive seat. Here’s what she had to say:**

_“As a proud member and supporter of Planned Parenthood Southeast, I'm committed to protecting reproductive freedom and expanding access to care for women across our district. Georgia's 6-week abortion ban has created fear, delayed treatment, and put lives at risk — and I won't stand by while politicians play games with our health.”_

[**We only have a few days to get Debra the support she needs to win this race. Join us in this mission by pitching in a split $20.25 contribution between Her Bold Move and Debra Shigley’s campaign today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113850867/565141219/-1604983161?refcode=EM_F_250822shigley_N_EH_90DO_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5ZGYxYzVlLTI3ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XB2CnZtgbJNE69SGjWnwOrDIz6-VxyvWJYfJpIsUAaE=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

Summer 2025 has already seen record-breaking heat, dangerous flooding and fires along with severe storms. At the same time, conflict continues to take place around the world.
For U.S. service members both at home and abroad, this means being on constant alert, ready to respond at a moment's notice. **_During these times of increased need, your support is more important than ever._**
**That 's why this offer couldn't have come at a better moment: A generous group of donors has offered to MATCH all gifts, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $40,000, to help the USO provide critical programs, including 4,000 care packages.** [Will you please donate $29 or more now to have the value of your gift DOUBLED for our heroes?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68Qea9KmFD/OU5mSHpOTXYrUmM2U0VYZVBxN25BdVNxZ1Z4c2x1QWh6RFNmVFU5dGpTVGtVS1JPT3gyTmFkU2dDdkFSQ0RyYkFFeEhqOHJXMW5YTy9DK2s2S2RnOEZXVERKazhGMHRuanIzY2lMQjF3Z3c9S0/USsxWUtZZFRIYmlzWFJSamFpY0VDWW5rZzdVekRVZzNzM1laamZjLzR4dDQzOXdhOXlCdUlpT3ZUODFyc3ZpV1ViQkMvdGY5akZHcmZKNW90cDk3d2IvYTlJZFZ4c3NVS0)**
**[$30 CAN HELP PROVIDE~~ 2 ~~ 4 CARE PACKAGES](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC0paPxcg/OU5mSHpOTXYrUmM2U0VYZVBxN25BdVNxZ1Z4c2x1QWh6RFNmVFU5dGpTVGtVS1JPT3gyTmFkU2dDdkFSQ0RyYkFFeEhqOHJXMW5YTy9DK2s2S2RnOEZXVERKazhGMHRuanIzY2lMQjF3Z3c9S0/USsxWUtZZFRIYmlzWFJSamFpY0VDWW5rZzdVekRVZzNzM1laamZjLzR4dDQzOXdhOXlCdUlpT3ZUODFyc3ZpV1ViQkMvdGY5akZHcmZKNW90cDk3d2IvYTlJZFZ4c3NVS0)**
---
**[$60 CAN HELP PROVIDE~~ 4 ~~ 8 CARE PACKAGES](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[MATCH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
Day in and day out, service members put their lives on the line and miss precious moments with their loved ones -- all to keep us safe and free. So our mission is to ensure they are supported and appreciated every step of the way.
One critical way we do this is by delivering thousands of care packages every year, each one carefully assembled with both essential supplies and reminders of home. But this, and everything we do, is only possible with your generous support.
**[So please, will you take advantage of this limited-time match offer and DOUBLE the value of your gift for our heroes in uniform? Let's do everything we can to thank them for their service this summer.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68Qea9KmFD/OU5mSHpOTXYrUmM2U0VYZVBxN25BdVNxZ1Z4c2x1QWh6RFNmVFU5dGpTVGtVS1JPT3gyTmFkU2dDdkFSQ0RyYkFFeEhqOHJXMW5YTy9DK2s2S2RnOEZXVERKazhGMHRuanIzY2lMQjF3Z3c9S0/USsxWUtZZFRIYmlzWFJSamFpY0VDWW5rZzdVekRVZzNzM1laamZjLzR4dDQzOXdhOXlCdUlpT3ZUODFyc3ZpV1ViQkMvdGY5akZHcmZKNW90cDk3d2IvYTlJZFZ4c3NVS0)**
**[MATCH MY GIFT NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/Dd9Kh-N8~jTr/OU5mSHpOTXYrUmM2U0VYZVBxN25BdVNxZ1Z4c2x1QWh6RFNmVFU5dGpTVGtVS1JPT3gyTmFkU2dDdkFSQ0RyYkFFeEhqOHJXMW5YTy9DK2s2S2RnOEZXVERKazhGMHRuanIzY2lMQjF3Z3c9S0/USsxWUtZZFRIYmlzWFJSamFpY0VDWW5rZzdVekRVZzNzM1laamZjLzR4dDQzOXdhOXlCdUlpT3ZUODFyc3ZpV1ViQkMvdGY5akZHcmZKNW90cDk3d2IvYTlJZFZ4c3NVS0)**

Thanks for all you do to support our heroes.
--The USO

body:

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8924%2E5257348%2EVtrmXJ)
Hi Derek,
We’re the **Democracy Dogs** — a proud pack of pups who believe in freedom, fairness, and plenty of treats for everyone.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250823_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8924%2E5257348%2EVtrmXJ)
And right now, we’re all wagging our tails for Adam Schiff.
Why? Because while MAGA extremists have been barking up the wrong tree, Adam’s been the one standing guard at democracy’s front gate. He’s kept watch against corruption, chased off threats to our freedoms, and stayed dog-gone determined through it all.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250823_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=8924%2E5257348%2EVtrmXJ)
But here’s the truth: defending democracy takes more than loyalty — it takes major resources. And our friend Adam’s facing a pack of well-funded political attack dogs who’d love nothing more than to take him down.
**[Will you chip in a few barks — er, bucks — to help Adam keep up the fight?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q32025_abs_em.w4l6oI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250823_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=6&akid=8924%2E5257348%2EVtrmXJ)**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113852501/565146391/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250820Project_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjgyYTQ3NC0yOTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D9a6rFuiDjhK3uUm1QCEB4bYZlDzOqVq8urVKBGgBk=) Did you see this, Peter?

Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want full control of the government, the courts, and your life. That is why they created Trump’s Project 2025, which is a playbook designed to make that happen, and __we have to stop it.__

But here’s the thing: **Trump’s Project 2025 is already 47% complete, and the remaining 53% are on Trump’s wish list.**

We have already seen many items on their agenda enacted, including threatening health care coverage for millions of Americans, attacking Trump’s political enemies, raising costs for the middle class while giving massive tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy, attacking the Department of Education, and more. Nothing in our democracy is safe, and we must fight back.

[**Help us fight back against Trump’s Project 2025 by rushing a donation now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113852504/565146395/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250823FWD_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjgyYTQ3NC0yOTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D9a6rFuiDjhK3uUm1QCEB4bYZlDzOqVq8urVKBGgBk=)

Thank you,

Team Shontel Brown

\----------- Forwarded message ---------

Peter,

During the 2024 elections, Trump claimed to have “no idea” about Project 2025 – a disastrous 900-page MAGA wish list, written by the infamous Heritage Foundation, aimed at dismantling our democracy and stripping away our rights. In fact, he stated that items in the memo were “absolutely ridiculous and abysmal.”

Now, just months into his term, **Trump’s Project 2025 is already 47% complete.**

Beyond completing their efforts to eliminate the US Agency for International Development, ban transgender individuals from serving in the military, and fund 100,000 ICE detention beds, sixty-four other proposals are underway. This includes their work to eliminate the Department of Education, end the “woke agenda” within government contracts, attack agencies that work on climate responsiveness, and more.

Additionally, as reported by _The Hill_ , **the other 53% of Project 2025 remains on the Trump Regime’s wish list.**

Trump aims to take full control of the government, the courts, and your life. We must fight back.

[**Peter, we will need ALL hands on deck to put a stop to Trump’s Project 2025. Will you rush a $5 or more donation today to help us defend our rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113852507/565146397/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250823FWD_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjgyYTQ3NC0yOTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D9a6rFuiDjhK3uUm1QCEB4bYZlDzOqVq8urVKBGgBk=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:_ | | ******[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113852511/565146402/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250823FWD_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjgyYTQ3NC0yOTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D9a6rFuiDjhK3uUm1QCEB4bYZlDzOqVq8urVKBGgBk=)******

clean_body: = Did you see this, Peter? Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want full control of the government, the courts, and your life. That is why they created Trump’s Project 2025, which is a playbook designed to make that happen, and we have to stop it. But here’s the thing: Trump’s Project 2025 is already 47% complete, and the remaining 53% are on Trump’s wish list. We have already seen many items on their agenda enacted, including threatening health care coverage for millions of Americans, attacking Trump’s political enemies, raising costs for the middle class while giving massive tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy, attacking the Department of Education, and more. Nothing in our democracy is safe, and we must fight back. = Thank you, Team Shontel Brown \----------- Forwarded message --------- Peter, During the 2024 elections, Trump claimed to have “no idea” about Project 2025 – a disastrous 900-page MAGA wish list, written by the infamous Heritage Foundation, aimed at dismantling our democracy and stripping away our rights. In fact, he stated that items in the memo were “absolutely ridiculous and abysmal.” Now, just months into his term, Trump’s Project 2025 is already 47% complete. Beyond completing their efforts to eliminate the US Agency for International Development, ban transgender individuals from serving in the military, and fund 100,000 ICE detention beds, sixty-four other proposals are underway. This includes their work to eliminate the Department of Education, end the “woke agenda” within government contracts, attack agencies that work on climate responsiveness, and more. Additionally, as reported by The Hill , the other 53% of Project 2025 remains on the Trump Regime’s wish list. Trump aims to take full control of the government, the courts, and your life. ### **[Want more raw, unfiltered conversations with voices like Neera Tanden? Become a paid subscriber to support Endless Urgency today](https://substack.com/redirect/3055731e-6189-40c3-855a-8e83901e87e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 👇**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/3055731e-6189-40c3-855a-8e83901e87e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Well, this one went off the rails fast--in the best way.
I was joined by Neera Tanden to unpack the DOJ's Epstein file dump and the bizarre testimony from Ghislaine Maxwell, which dropped late on a Friday like a scene from a political thriller. What started as a planned conversation about crime pivoted hard into the GOP's calculated misinformation campaign, the fractures in MAGA, and why the Epstein won't go away for Trump. This is essential viewing--don't miss it.
**⏱ ️ Timestamps:**
* **04:45** -- Neera reacts to the DOJ's sudden release of the Maxwell transcript--and why her post-testimony prison downgrade raised major red flags.
* **13:02** -- We trace the tangled web from Epstein to Trump, including Acosta's sweetheart deal and how the right built an alternate reality around obvious truths.
* **21:05** -- A must-hear breakdown of why the "Maxwell exonerates Trump" talking point is not only dishonest but dangerous.
* **27:00** -- What the Epstein scandal reveals about Trump's betrayal of working-class voters--and why it's fracturing his base right now.
* **35:45** -- We finally tackle crime in D.C., and I explain why I urged Democrats to stop defending statistics and start calling out authoritarian overreach.

**[The people who most need to hear this are the ones being fed a steady diet of lies. Help us break the algorithm. If this episode made you feel more informed, more fired up, more seen--then become a paid subscriber. You are this community's engine, and we need you.](https://substack.com/redirect/3055731e-6189-40c3-855a-8e83901e87e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

(the largest in U.S. history) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113854467/565152650/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_082325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQ2MmE4ODktMmI4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC8BA77AO3Cjcf-Q9Rgey72kVTbNe1BTfcsWJhR2KBA=&emci=9b36ea2b-837f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1462a889-2b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)
---
| | “FPL customers may be forced to swallow largest utility rate hike in U.S. history”
\- Pensacola News Journal
---
Peter — As you read this, the Public Service Commission is holding hearings on whether to give Florida Power and Light an egregious, almost **$10 billion rate hike.**
If approved, Floridians would be forced to foot the bill for the largest utility rate hike in U.S. history. FPL is asking for **$1.5 billion** in 2026 and **$927 million** every year after that — **and some of that money is going straight into the pockets of FPL stockholders.**
Read that again.
While Florida families already struggle with an affordability crisis and sky-high bills, this corrupt utility company wants to make you pay for their shareholders' profits.
This is outrageous. And that's why it's so important that we have an Attorney General in our corner who won't bow down to these special interests. Jose is ready to take them on, but he wants to know if you agree with him:
| Should corrupt utility companies be held accountable for robbing Florida families blind?
---
| [YES →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113854469/565152653/323946233?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_082325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQ2MmE4ODktMmI4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC8BA77AO3Cjcf-Q9Rgey72kVTbNe1BTfcsWJhR2KBA=&emci=9b36ea2b-837f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1462a889-2b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386) | [NO →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113854470/565152655/323946233?refcode=em_JJR_PET_Poll_082325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQ2MmE4ODktMmI4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC8BA77AO3Cjcf-Q9Rgey72kVTbNe1BTfcsWJhR2KBA=&emci=9b36ea2b-837f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1462a889-2b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)

Jose is ready to take them on, but he wants to know if you agree with him: | Should corrupt utility companies be held accountable for robbing Florida families blind? | | ---|--- Thanks for your input, Team Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

Donald Trump and Republicans have relentlessly tried to slash Social Security and other crucial benefits that millions of seniors and working families rely on every single day. That’s why Senator Kirsten Gillibrand just joined Senate Democrats to introduce a new bill called the _Keep Billionaires Out of Social Security Act._ It aims to reverse Trump-era funding cuts, prohibit office closures, strengthen benefits and prevent DOGE from meddling with our Social Security. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I need you to see this update on the data here in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Mikie Sherrill is running for Governor in New Jersey and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**consider splitting a donation between Mikie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=1&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)
---
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=2&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)
Team, too often when campaigns face cold, hard data showing a tough road ahead, they turn a blind eye. It’s one of the reasons Democrats are where we are today.
I’m determined not to repeat the mistakes of the past. So I’m going to share with you the truth about what the data is showing about our race here in New Jersey. I’m also going to share my plan for how we can overcome the obstacles and win. And then, if you’re all in on beating Jack Ciattarelli and preventing New Jersey from falling into the hands of a MAGA loyalist, I’m going to ask you to [**split what you can between my team and Mark Kelly to help me put that plan into action.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=3&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)
**Here’s an unvarnished look at what the data tells us:**
**→Polling.** Since the general election began a few weeks ago, one poll after another has come out showing me with a small lead (often just 3-6%) over Jack Ciattarelli — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the outcome either way.
And that’s not even taking into account the possibility that the polls could be underestimating Republicans, as they have in several recent elections. We need to campaign like we’re behind — _because we may well be._
**→Recent elections.** The 2024 presidential race in New Jersey was decided by less than 6% The last governor’s race here? Decided by just 3%. Recent election results and recent polls all tell the same story: _New Jersey is a battleground state._
**→Attack ads.** Ciattarelli’s super PAC has announced plans to spend over a million dollars attacking me across New Jersey, with plenty more planned in the weeks ahead. One recent poll found that after undecided voters heard these false attacks without a fact-check, _they swung heavily in Ciattarelli’s direction._
**Here’s what this all means: we are in an incredibly competitive race, and we will only win it if we work night and day to get our message out all across New Jersey. And that’s exactly what my team and I plan to do.**
We need to get out of the usual Democratic comfort zone and show up everywhere so that voters can actually hear what we have to say.
We need to blanket the state with our plan for lowering costs and making daily life easier for New Jersey families.
We need to reach out personally to undecided voters — and make sure every single one of our supporters shows up to vote this fall.
And it won’t be enough to fight Ciattarelli and his dark-money machine to a draw. We need to outhustle, outwork, and outsmart them every step of the way.
[**Friend, I’m all in on winning this race for the people of New Jersey. I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights, and I won’t hesitate to run toward this one. If you’re with me, I need your support. Please split whatever you can between my campaign and Mark Kelly to help us win what is shaping up to be a nail-biter of a race.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=4&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your split contribution to Mikie Sherrill and Mark Kelly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-sherrill.GgGmHU&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=23&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-sherrill.XjvE6D&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=24&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-sherrill.fRukJ2&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=25&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-sherrill.MZrAAA&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=26&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-sherrill.B3Kv6M&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=27&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-sherrill.tfr74Y&refcode=em250823-1-90&t=28&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ)**
---
****
Thank you,
Mikie

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=6158%2E6688874%2E9cMpBZ).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: SECOND ATTEMPT -- D.C. Statehood Petition [via Fight for Reform]
subject: maybe we were wrong… maybe you don’t care about this???
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU) Are you getting our emails, friend?

[As one of our most engaged supporters in your state, we assumed you’d want to sign our petition urging Congress to make D.C. a state.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=3&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU) **It’s a big deal:** Pete Buttigieg, Jamie Raskin, Jasmine Crockett, Joe Biden, and Elizabeth Warren are fighting for it tooth and nail...

...Because if D.C. became the 51st state, we’d gain two more Democratic Senators – _we’d have a clear path to the Senate Majority!!_ [**Maybe we were wrong. Maybe you don’t care. But if you do, sign the petition before it closes tomorrow morning at 9AM:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=4&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU) | [URGE CONGRESS TO MAKE D.C. A STATE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=5&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU)
---
Thanks, friend.

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —

**Listen up:**
**WE TOLD YOU:** Pete Buttigieg, Jamie Raskin, Jasmine Crockett, Joe Biden, and Elizabeth Warren all want Washington, DC to become the 51st STATE!

**WE TOLD YOU:** If DC became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress AND we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators!

**WE TOLD YOU:** Donald Trump and the GOP HATE the idea of DC becoming a state because it would **WRECK their far-right agenda.** **So, we’re rushing to gather 20,000 signatures before 11:59 PM so that we can reach our goal and PRESSURE CONGRESS TO MAKE DC THE 51ST STATE!**
---

[**we’ve only got 14 hours to reach our midnight goal. Can you sign on now to stand with Top Democrats??**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=6&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=7&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=8&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU)
---
Listen – We’re counting on Top Democrats like you to step up and help support our campaign for DC Statehood.

DC has a larger population than Vermont and Wyoming but they have absolutely 0 voting representation in Congress... It's disgusting!

**Trump and his GOP are opposed to DC Statehood because they’re afraid of Democracy and giving power back to the people!**

But, we can’t stand by and idly watch for another second, that’s why we’re penning a massive petition.
[**20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Add your name to our MASSIVE petition to demand Congress make DC the 51st state! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=9&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU) [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66659?t=10&akid=23312%2E4449941%2E3zSnSU)

name: Virginia Alert (via JanePAC.com)
subject: We refuse to let these candidates lose again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
When margins are this thin, every donation matters.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113855768/565155974/1328794144?refcode=ea.902e38a6-2d80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.902e38a6-2d80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMmUzOGE2LTJkODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zo7xielq_HRQ3kD4tzMcIwRgXym5MFv2XGaXCqEEnHg=&emci=53cd48d7-887f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=902e38a6-2d80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
☀️ Good morning! We wouldn’t be reaching out on a Saturday morning if it wasn’t important, but this update couldn’t wait. ☀️ In 2023, three of our incredible climate champions running for the House of Delegates in Virginia came achingly close to flipping their districts blue. **_Just take a look for yourself:_** 1️⃣ Jessica Anderson came within **667 votes** of winning House District 71.
2️⃣ Lily Franklin lost House District 41 by just **183 votes**.
3️⃣ Kimberly Pope Adams lost House District 82 by only **53 votes**. These numbers should be a wake-up call for all of us. When elections are decided by razor-thin margins like these, every single action we take — _or don't take_ — matters. **All three of these JanePAC-endorsed candidates are back on the ballot this November, and we refuse to let them lose by a handful of votes again.[This is our moment to make a difference. body:
The Left is targeting us and watching our every move
| Dear Friend,
---
This was truly an honor.
---
I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority.
---
And thank God for that decision.
---
Because right now, we're only _ONE_ seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is _**ours**_. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar.
---
And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move...
---
**...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us.**
---
Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, _but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re**“closing the gap”** on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York._
---
**It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district.**

**From _Wall Street Journal_ : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...”**
---
The Radical Left sent us _their_ message of intimidation. Now it’s _our_ turn to respond with a message of our own.

**I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED.**

I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight.

clean_body: The Left is targeting us and watching our every move | Dear Friend, This was truly an honor. I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority. And thank God for that decision. Because right now, we're only ONE seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is ours. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar. And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move... ...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us. Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re“closing the gap” on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York. It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district. From Wall Street Journal : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...” The Radical Left sent us their message of intimidation. Now it’s our turn to respond with a message of our own. I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED. I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight. Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

body:
Add your name to defend the USPS! >>

| Hi friend, We’re reaching out because Donald Trump’s voter suppression agenda has accelerated this past week.

**He’s drafting an executive order to ban mail-in voting, targeting the millions of Americans who rely on it to cast their ballots** — particularly rural voters, overseas troops, and seniors.

What’s even more insidious are Trump’s de facto efforts to eliminate mail-in voting, like his push to privatize the USPS.

New Dems strongly oppose Trump’s attempts to undercut our elections, weaken our democracy, and dismantle public programs that are lifelines for millions of Americans.

**[As we fight to protect the USPS from privatization, we need your help. If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113856072/565156960/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250823_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFlY2U1OC0yZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygxzu3pZxa1_9Og3lzQS5gnf6ozV-zDGyBn1GhlyjsI=&emci=93a11413-257d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=4e1ece58-2e80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113856073/565156961/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250823_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFlY2U1OC0yZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygxzu3pZxa1_9Og3lzQS5gnf6ozV-zDGyBn1GhlyjsI=&emci=93a11413-257d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=4e1ece58-2e80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)

\------------------------
**Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.******
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113856074/565156962/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250823_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFlY2U1OC0yZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygxzu3pZxa1_9Og3lzQS5gnf6ozV-zDGyBn1GhlyjsI=&emci=93a11413-257d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=4e1ece58-2e80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)** [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113856075/565156963/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250823_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFlY2U1OC0yZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygxzu3pZxa1_9Og3lzQS5gnf6ozV-zDGyBn1GhlyjsI=&emci=93a11413-257d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=4e1ece58-2e80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)

**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

clean_body: Add your name to defend the USPS! >> | Hi friend, We’re reaching out because Donald Trump’s voter suppression agenda has accelerated this past week. He’s drafting an executive order to ban mail-in voting, targeting the millions of Americans who rely on it to cast their ballots — particularly rural voters, overseas troops, and seniors. What’s even more insidious are Trump’s de facto efforts to eliminate mail-in voting, like his push to privatize the USPS. New Dems strongly oppose Trump’s attempts to undercut our elections, weaken our democracy, and dismantle public programs that are lifelines for millions of Americans. | –Team New Dems FWD: \------------------------ Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.** The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities. It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans. It ensures every American — no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting. And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in fairness. That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally. New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, not turn a profit for the privileged few. Thank you for your support!
