name: JB Pritzker
subject: Let’s make this the GOP’s worst bet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Let me cut to the chase.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250823_1_pritzker?refcode=em20250823-1997&amount=5&refcode2=1997_582294_Xn9NCB&akid=1997%2E582294%2EXn9NCB)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on pharmaceutical companies, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for families in New Hampshire.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
[**If you can, please make a $5 donation right now to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250823_1_pritzker?refcode=em20250823-1997&amount=5&refcode2=1997_582294_Xn9NCB&akid=1997%2E582294%2EXn9NCB)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250823_1_pritzker?amount=5&refcode=em20250823-1997&refcode2=1997_582294_Xn9NCB&akid=1997%2E582294%2EXn9NCB)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250823-1?t=1&refcode2=1997_582294_Xn9NCB&akid=1997%2E582294%2EXn9NCB)**

name: The Democratic Party
subject: On Democrats’ fight to protect democracy →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This fight isn’t going to be easy, but we’re fighting like hell to make sure we win
---
Derek, please don’t scroll past this quick read. If you’ve been following the news on Trump’s attempts to rig the 2026 midterms, _you know that this is a code red emergency for our democracy._

**But we also want you to know this: Democrats are fighting fire with fire.**

In Texas, House Democrats just ended a heroic two-week walkout, successfully breaking quorum on Gov. Abbott’s first special session to pass gerrymandered maps that would give Republicans FIVE new congressional seats.

And in California, Gavin Newsom just signed legislation calling for a statewide ballot measure to counter Republicans’ gerrymandering scheme in Texas, both leveling the playing field _and_ letting the people decide their state’s path forward.

**This fight to preserve our democracy isn’t going to be easy, but we’re fighting like hell to make sure we win. At the DNC, we’re committed to investing in Democratic parties across the country — including California and Texas — to make sure they have the resources they need to fight the Trump administration and its GOP cronies in the states.**

[**If this work matters to you, please consider pitching in $3 to the DNC today to help fund Democrats’ fight to protect our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250823_4406_fr&refcode2=4406_22930333_afQhH8&akid=4406%2E22930333%2EafQhH8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250823_4406_fr&refcode2=4406_22930333_afQhH8&akid=4406%2E22930333%2EafQhH8)**

clean_body: This fight isn’t going to be easy, but we’re fighting like hell to make sure we win Derek, please don’t scroll past this quick read. If you’ve been following the news on Trump’s attempts to rig the 2026 midterms, you know that this is a code red emergency for our democracy. But we also want you to know this: Democrats are fighting fire with fire. In Texas, House Democrats just ended a heroic two-week walkout, successfully breaking quorum on Gov. Abbott’s first special session to pass gerrymandered maps that would give Republicans FIVE new congressional seats. And in California, Gavin Newsom just signed legislation calling for a statewide ballot measure to counter Republicans’ gerrymandering scheme in Texas, both leveling the playing field and letting the people decide their state’s path forward. This fight to preserve our democracy isn’t going to be easy, but we’re fighting like hell to make sure we win. At the DNC, we’re committed to investing in Democratic parties across the country — including California and Texas — to make sure they have the resources they need to fight the Trump administration and its GOP cronies in the states. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113857882/565162657/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjY3N2FkNi0zMTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP1n2WEuEPGBgTqJq3xWO3jt-KCOdN9H49mvN9ubrEI=)
This is a different email than I usually send, but it’s important.

Before I pull back the curtain and explain why I decided to run for Congress, will you **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113857888/565162673/-550958566?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjY3N2FkNi0zMTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP1n2WEuEPGBgTqJq3xWO3jt-KCOdN9H49mvN9ubrEI=)** today?

**I’m doing this because I believe in the power of community.** As a native of downstate Illinois, I know that our communities thrive when the middle class is strong.

My grandfather was a union painter, and my grandmother was a public school teacher. They inspired my life’s work of championing working families just like mine.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113857895/565162688/-550958566?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjY3N2FkNi0zMTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP1n2WEuEPGBgTqJq3xWO3jt-KCOdN9H49mvN9ubrEI=)
_Me and my grandma._
From when I hit the campaign trail in 2021, to coming back home from Washington today, I’ve met thousands of folks with similar backgrounds who are struggling to make ends meet with the rising cost of living.

The American Dream has become out of reach for many in Central and Southern Illinois. Before Congress, I fought for workers’ rights and led the effort to raise Illinois’ minimum wage to $15 an hour. I decided to run for this seat to make an even bigger impact in the communities that I love.

I was proud to flip IL-13 from red to blue in 2022 and become the first woman to represent this seat in Congress. We created a strong coalition of working families, farmers, veterans, and more to defeat a self-funded Republican.

Despite facing tough re-election battles ever since, it hasn’t slowed me down. I’m in Congress to advocate for our communities and make life better for working people.

**[If you’re with me, $3 or any amount would make an immediate impact in our re-election race. With control of the House majority separated by only three seats, the outcome of this race will make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113857903/565162703/-550958566?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjY3N2FkNi0zMTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nP1n2WEuEPGBgTqJq3xWO3jt-KCOdN9H49mvN9ubrEI=)**

clean_body: | = This is a different email than I usually send, but it’s important. Before I pull back the curtain and explain why I decided to run for Congress, will you = today? I’m doing this because I believe in the power of community. As a native of downstate Illinois, I know that our communities thrive when the middle class is strong. My grandfather was a union painter, and my grandmother was a public school teacher. They inspired my life’s work of championing working families just like mine. = Me and my grandma. From when I hit the campaign trail in 2021, to coming back home from Washington today, I’ve met thousands of folks with similar backgrounds who are struggling to make ends meet with the rising cost of living. The American Dream has become out of reach for many in Central and Southern Illinois. Before Congress, I fought for workers’ rights and led the effort to raise Illinois’ minimum wage to $15 an hour. I decided to run for this seat to make an even bigger impact in the communities that I love. I was proud to flip IL-13 from red to blue in 2022 and become the first woman to represent this seat in Congress. We created a strong coalition of working families, farmers, veterans, and more to defeat a self-funded Republican. Despite facing tough re-election battles ever since, it hasn’t slowed me down. I’m in Congress to advocate for our communities and make life better for working people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

| | Dear Peter, I’m a retired teacher, **_but I still have one last lesson to share._** It’s one I taught my daughter, and **she knows it better than anyone.** **[This is Anne, Congresswoman Nancy Mace’s mother. I want to tell you a story.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/9xIF31MrRl2ukZO6bf1Wi4gw_6sPd0sY7k9GaGrAu7_6ciRX4GCbkNXAcb9VESbLPV2b5NdDEmBGy2SDG1QxzsSaJBWmBwECIvs7mM03U9LCsk2ebEnSqVg5rctCN0lXPcNLVj7O48ocL8v0qQKgusrYWjV00HW94GJdcpm86zWy0LldLykrPBcvZeQ9pIP-0pCS0diS8N80XrwphmncD4MxYIuXxy7YqJlr8pE7xGaOhzbNSpR3OjcdqK0ejINrBAo7AwuMfB4h7Er70npE829r_bGDtA2ZIP3PLtKNJ_3yNJ0vhLgE4wENtg70_K4JyzwknZirZk_qVq4KaGR_PL01gnePzEMmpjA7A9VWjYBihWPTJ4JHMuwTZMmdHZMxCTAFBC57EVSPOEBd-LmGHbi3ObCcaWElRQLGHAm9vZv981DzKkgDe9btJBl0L2ffisT0C8afOoeJuBKM95d6N7yUbt3llElGSB9cq4wxtnjlSAgnlKqxHqtL6pSsXBC4RZoe59Jmi2p4GVZEQ73mDnPGCy-0TkdNnp6lKVJbA9gMlHLE16Y6WGkSC7_pxWyzDIV_F8NHXXoFzjZ0BycZ2YqpScR7L6hbLrz_9EnLn9aSmWfNPT3l4_9cBGXpxM_WxqTy6tD7VcaiEuEGf53ISB5jXJmUNFrKpUqh-ZLdbfOjxfxbDq598AxM0D0Y_BZkUr4S3YicylZxhWOm6xzB-MGmjMkp0kEvd79YroudSFp7GOiobeI_qH3th_ugQ373rN8Vl3pWAS6Q-Ct-LVWYCGiA1swkcTDSMNArs69Ak7VVg6VltMYrO0okcWanvxQd1ZxP0awz3JR8w8N8GZAIz7_5iUdkg0w4YJ4FkVu7QlAJ/mFuYZ6XZQS5qU7ZYMxgBE5fx8BeIFy1L/12)** As a mother and a teacher, you want the best for your kids. __To see them walk across the stage and receive their high school diploma.__ **That wasn’t my daughter’s story.** I can still see it like it was yesterday. At 17, Nancy dropped out of high school. Her friends attended graduation in their caps and gowns... [**But my daughter put on a Waffle House apron and headed to the graveyard shift.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/h3TvJkPT4aq3uwKcQ0etYl__Z5o4WinxwovMgmW2WE2nRLGYvmYZ_ejz_eIxmDyw1i-pjTWhKA9Q579YD9Dgn_RxdKHnqQ3kzQxhaNDDvXmTC9ijDb9giXtyB7Q6Ymd6DJhBzfFGxtk4xbeYwjesIRcgY62dPQJ43qGDLdU6_1FwrBrywCtbASPqM9psxDLbTSVr5h_OS_DOsucCuBjS0zuYx8B6_aKWWHx9XvPpoIIASmliedfnHoAbf2SjVe0zEExrOQ-VeJOvUAabOg3I7CVrpIAhDb_3QFSoBwpfdLUWVgcnRrG4t4V_sIsoR9nvxjMD8jvR2q46b3qekK40t2o1JdhNC7qCDw7n2AeiVyXoZNbk4-5vuXkjzT5EMMuvLlyEFW4YYiNd4r8hvhS1Fu9T76XntEJNlHCdsEHoKismbbSKFWqWwAKJvSvybXgLoVeo8VYXgAUJ69juZgzHHhz5nv2U0pECA5HXBhhB3UF_vmT_PpvuEnkr1I_uvieRZNxj-oeZ4RvTtZx4PV_b62hQJwXdqCV0HuSCJUjvq1DM-Fuy4La2L5oNwd6mVHnmG-abq1iZUmihsu2cmGS0JkWJ7LqsA5w3jg2zmUe1mMBeXGUVYbttpa1uB3_DA2uw4Ljxv0VjV_BRED1v3ifhS-g5gep6qxRxglw9AuH4x5sw0Q-Iy1niJL1iRN6v3_-nFNnaEDvl6gXzzB5Ym7STRhF-MzVNmTG2JIMbr0Ta1Dgs0D4e3yY8lWDw6_dngVtUSCvPxjUtXzpdedZiuTgEnKnw19ZfVqB0g4qITApqPz7uLTm6qICtWw0ljW6_tdmuIlJgnU94TCwH1NcmQTZr0ciSBsMG_I-1JeDd2xJHDM6-/sFysCxtZnSLfku-MeXXdS7q4IRFdN6U-/12) As a teacher, it broke my heart. _**As a mom, I feared she’d never recover.**_ But that’s the thing about Nancy. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, I’m a retired teacher, but I still have one last lesson to share. It’s one I taught my daughter, and she knows it better than anyone. As a mother and a teacher, you want the best for your kids. To see them walk across the stage and receive their high school diploma. That wasn’t my daughter’s story. I can still see it like it was yesterday. At 17, Nancy dropped out of high school. Her friends attended graduation in their caps and gowns... As a teacher, it broke my heart. As a mom, I feared she’d never recover. But that’s the thing about Nancy. In the end, it didn’t matter that she didn’t graduate. Never give up. My daughter wasn’t born with a silver spoon. From an early age, Nancy learned the value of hard work. She was destined to pick herself up and fight back. Nancy then made it to Congress,where she represented the people of South Carolina’s First District. And just like she did at Waffle House, she’s going to put on her apron and get to work for the people of our state. As a mother, it breaks my heart to hear the terrible things the media and the establishment say about her. I want to ask you something from one parent, one patriot, to another: I’ve seen the way the Radical Left wants to indoctrinate our kids with their radical transgender ideology in our classrooms. That’s why Nancy is the fighter we need to send to the Governor’s mansion. She’s never bent to the Trans Mob. She’s never abandoned God’s word. _ Nancy is up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based Americans who believe in truth, family, and country. And now, she’s standing up for YOU. But she needs your backup. My daughter didn’t learn from textbooks.She learned from life. Most of all, she learned to never give up.And I’ve never been more proud. name: Breaking News, AOTL
subject: Texas passes their extreme gerrymandered map
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Here’s what comes next in this fight.
|
---

**🚨 Texas passed their gerrymandered map.
But the fight’s not over.**
Peter,
Today is a dark day for our democracy.
In the dead of night, Texas rammed through their extreme gerrymandered map, which Republicans believe will steal five more seats for them in Congress.
Our team's analysis shows that these politicians are stealing power for themselves by taking away the voting power of Texas citizens, and are specifically targeting communities of color.
Let’s be clear: Texas will have to defend this in court. This map is discriminatory – full stop. Our affiliate was already challenging the previous gerrymander and won’t back away from this fight. The federal courts should intervene quickly to protect the rights of Texas voters.
And while egregious and anti-democratic, what happened in Texas has galvanized our grassroots movement to stand up and fight back. That’s important because the fight is expanding, and fast. While the work is underway to stop this map from taking effect, we must also organize to prevent similar power grabs in states like Missouri, Indiana, and beyond.
**The fight is just beginning — and we need you with us, Peter.**[**Rush a donation to power the fair maps movement and help us fight back with everything we’ve got.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113859154/565166413/64303500?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TXMapsPass_email_20250822-AOTL-Tier1-TXMapsPass_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250822-AOTL-Tier1-TXMapsPass_&utm_campaign=TXMapsPass&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Njc3YWQ2LTMxODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NHsuabrWtT4TS42DwPJYXnSDx9MrcRVVl08U4HHGNc=)

Our work in the next phase of this fight has already begun. As politicians in states across the country look to Texas as a playbook for what they can get away with — we’re mobilizing grassroots supporters everywhere we can to make sure politicians can’t thwart the will of the people.
We’ve got to make clear in this moment that the vast majority of Americans reject what Texas just did and view it for what it is: Cheating.
[**Today is a tough day for all of us who care about fairness in elections, but it will motivate us to fight even harder to preserve and defend our democracy. Make a donation to fund All On The Line’s work in the next phase of this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113859164/565166509/64303500?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TXMapsPass_email_20250822-AOTL-Tier1-TXMapsPass_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250822-AOTL-Tier1-TXMapsPass_&utm_campaign=TXMapsPass&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Njc3YWQ2LTMxODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9NHsuabrWtT4TS42DwPJYXnSDx9MrcRVVl08U4HHGNc=)

clean_body: Here’s what comes next in this fight. | 🚨 Texas passed their gerrymandered map. But the fight’s not over. Peter, Today is a dark day for our democracy. In the dead of night, Texas rammed through their extreme gerrymandered map, which Republicans believe will steal five more seats for them in Congress. Our team's analysis shows that these politicians are stealing power for themselves by taking away the voting power of Texas citizens, and are specifically targeting communities of color. Let’s be clear: Texas will have to defend this in court. This map is discriminatory – full stop. Our affiliate was already challenging the previous gerrymander and won’t back away from this fight. The federal courts should intervene quickly to protect the rights of Texas voters. And while egregious and anti-democratic, what happened in Texas has galvanized our grassroots movement to stand up and fight back. That’s important because the fight is expanding, and fast. While the work is underway to stop this map from taking effect, we must also organize to prevent similar power grabs in states like Missouri, Indiana, and beyond. The fight is just beginning — and we need you with us, Peter.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our work in the next phase of this fight has already begun. As politicians in states across the country look to Texas as a playbook for what they can get away with — we’re mobilizing grassroots supporters everywhere we can to make sure politicians can’t thwart the will of the people. We’ve got to make clear in this moment that the vast majority of Americans reject what Texas just did and view it for what it is: Cheating. = Thanks for being a part of this movement — more soon. — Team AOTL is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. subject: Yesterday, one man donated $10 million to beat us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
And there's more...

Good morning,
This is a message from Team Newsom to people all across the country who understand the stakes of passing the Election Rigging Response Act in California.
We're humbly asking you to make a contribution to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee today.
Here's why:
Last night, the Texas Senate passed Trump's maps. Soon, Greg Abbott will sign it into law. After months of threats and theatrics, they did it. Now Democrats must respond.
There's more... last night, one man with a history of donating to extremist causes donated $10 million to the effort to defeat us. Republicans and the far-right are rallying, because they understand the stakes.
The good news is, for the cost you'd pay monthly streaming service, you can give Democrats a fair chance at taking back the House in 2026. That seems like money well spent.
So if stopping Trump and Abbott from rigging the election feels worth that to you, and you're in a position to do so, we're asking:
[**Please contribute to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act. Our average online donation is right around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are donating to help us win this election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250823-1&refcode2=2492_4767699_Vao4K2&akid=2492%2E4767699%2EVao4K2)

name: Fair Fight
subject: Did you see what Trump said about mail-in voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We’ve seen this coming, and we know how to fight back. |
---

| | It’s no secret that Donald Trump admires, envies, and takes marching orders from Russian dictator Vladimir Putin. Now he’s following Putin’s lead on how to run elections and trying to impose a federal takeover based on lies about the security of different voting methods: | _Los Angeles Times:_ “President Trump said Monday he would renew his assault on mail-in voting **after Russia’s autocratic leader, Vladimir Putin, told him to do so** at their meeting in Alaska last week.”
---
_Trump on TruthSocial: “I am going to lead a movement to**get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS** , and also, while we’re at it, Highly ‘Inaccurate,’ Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES...WE WILL BEGIN THIS EFFORT, WHICH WILL BE STRONGLY OPPOSED BY THE DEMOCRATS BECAUSE THEY CHEAT AT LEVELS NEVER SEEN BEFORE, by signing an EXECUTIVE ORDER to help bring HONESTY to the 2026 Midterm Elections.”_
---
**We’ve expected Trump to continue escalating his attacks on democracy, and we know how to keep fighting back — because his new schemes are cut from the same cloth as the GOP voter suppression we’ve been fighting in Georgia.**
[**Our work to ensure voters can cast their ballots and make their voices heard has never been more critical. Trump’s latest attack on our freedom to vote isn’t an isolated incident, of course. It fits into a broader pattern of how the far-right tries to block Americans from electing our leaders and having a say in our future.
Here in Georgia, Republicans have been the tip of the spear for voter suppression, from attacking vote-by-mail to recently working to purge nearly half a million voters from the rolls.
And across the country, the MAGA GOP is hell-bent on silencing the will of the people.
They’re spreading lies to try to justify mass voter purges. They’re resorting to stealing congressional seats through gerrymandering. And they're trying to pass the so-called SAVE Act, which could block tens of millions of eligible Americans from voting.
**It’s all part of a Republican plot to stay in power by rigging the 2026 elections. And it must be stopped.**
[**As we fight voter suppression in Georgia and across the country, please pitch in right now to help ensure that MAGA Republicans don’t succeed in ripping away our freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113859579/565167785/-666756594?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250823_T1_TrumpVoteByMail_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzM2NjQ2ZC0zMjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MczOahHGoopNPexztmDbhuivplQq_cTZizyW81kj25o=)

clean_body: We’ve seen this coming, and we know how to fight back. | | | It’s no secret that Donald Trump admires, envies, and takes marching orders from Russian dictator Vladimir Putin. Now he’s following Putin’s lead on how to run elections and trying to impose a federal takeover based on lies about the security of different voting methods: | Los Angeles Times: “President Trump said Monday he would renew his assault on mail-in voting after Russia’s autocratic leader, Vladimir Putin, told him to do so at their meeting in Alaska last week.” Trump on TruthSocial: “I am going to lead a movement toget rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS , and also, while we’re at it, Highly ‘Inaccurate,’ Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES...WE WILL BEGIN THIS EFFORT, WHICH WILL BE STRONGLY OPPOSED BY THE DEMOCRATS BECAUSE THEY CHEAT AT LEVELS NEVER SEEN BEFORE, by signing an EXECUTIVE ORDER to help bring HONESTY to the 2026 Midterm Elections.” We’ve expected Trump to continue escalating his attacks on democracy, and we know how to keep fighting back — because his new schemes are cut from the same cloth as the GOP voter suppression we’ve been fighting in Georgia. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Trump’s latest attack on our freedom to vote isn’t an isolated incident, of course. It fits into a broader pattern of how the far-right tries to block Americans from electing our leaders and having a say in our future. Here in Georgia, Republicans have been the tip of the spear for voter suppression, from attacking vote-by-mail to recently working to purge nearly half a million voters from the rolls. And across the country, the MAGA GOP is hell-bent on silencing the will of the people. They’re spreading lies to try to justify mass voter purges. They’re resorting to stealing congressional seats through gerrymandering. And they're trying to pass the so-called SAVE Act, which could block tens of millions of eligible Americans from voting. It’s all part of a Republican plot to stay in power by rigging the 2026 elections. And it must be stopped. = = In solidarity, Fair Fight = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Peter!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Peter**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Peter, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A taste of their own medicine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This can’t go unanswered

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2624%2E4032634%2EdFt3Oy)
---
What’s happening in Texas right now is clear evidence that Republicans are afraid of voters because they know they’re unpopular. They know the American people hate the Big Beautiful Bill, they know that Trump’s approval rating is plummeting, and they know what’s coming for them in the 2026 midterms. But instead of making a better pitch to the American people, Donald Trump picked up the phone and demanded Texas Republicans redraw the maps and find him five new congressional seats. And when they heard that the president said “jump” their only question was “how high?” This kind of blatant power grab can’t go unanswered. That’s why I’m behind California and Governor Gavin Newsom all the way in the steps he’s taking to protect democracy. And it’s why I’m urging the people of California to show up this November to support this ballot measure. **Democrats can’t be afraid of creative, forceful ways to do something about these attempts to push us closer and closer to an oligarchy where voters are silenced and billionaires call the shots. We’re in uncharted territory here, and we have to fight like it.** [**We can’t do business as usual anymore. I’m doing everything I can to sound the alarm, shake every table, and push our party to fight back in this moment — are you with me? Donate $28 or whatever you can to power our fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3127?amount=28&t=8&akid=2624%2E4032634%2EdFt3Oy)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---

---

---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3127?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2624%2E4032634%2EdFt3Oy)
---

---
I want to be clear: Redistricting should be independent, and I’ve long supported redistricting committees that take the politics out of redistricting. That’s the standard for making sure voters pick their politicians, rather than the politicians picking their voters. But Democrats can't live in a world anymore where we pretend that everybody is playing by the same set of rules. Republicans are determined to rig every rule they can, to break laws, and to ignore laws in order to be able to seize power and to hang on to it. We have a responsibility to fight back and fight back hard. [**Trump wants nothing more than for Democrats to roll over and play dead. We will not give him the satisfaction — and we owe it to the American people to face our reality with the urgency it requires. If you agree, please power our fight with a donation to our grassroots movement today.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3127?t=14&akid=2624%2E4032634%2EdFt3Oy) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: We're just getting started
body:
https://www.fox7austin.com/news/texas-senate-congressional-maps-greg-abbott-redistricting [https://www.fox7austin.com/news/texas-senate-congressional-maps-greg-abbott-redistricting]
Friend,
I’m writing to you today with a heavy heart but a resolute spirit.
For years, I have had the profound honor of representing our community—our home—in the United States Congress.
Together, we have fought for social and economic justice, for the expansion of voting rights, and for a compassionate foreign policy that respects the human rights of all people, including Palestinian men, women, and especially children.
It is because of this work that we now face an imminent threat. Governor Abbott is expected to sign into law a new congressional map designed with one particular purpose: to erase our district and silence our voice.
This is a brazen act of racist political retaliation. They are targeting us because we are effective. They are targeting us because we refuse to be silent.
But I have a promise to you: I will not let this illegal act stand without a fight.
The moment the Governor's pen leaves the paper, our team will go into action to fight these discriminatory maps. We are prepared to fight this all the way!
But these powerful interests are counting on one thing: that we won’t have the resources to fight back.
They think they can bankrupt our fight back movement for justice. We must prove them wrong.
RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION TO OUR FIGHT BACK FUND [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/txfightback0825]
Your contribution today will go directly to funding our fight back movement with what it needs to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/txfightback0825] This is the fight of our lives! Please, join me in it.
In solidarity,
Congressman Al Green
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
Checks can be Mailed to:
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
PO Box 56761
Houston, TX 77256
United States

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: What I’m hearing from families across the state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This speaks volumes.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4935%2E35263%2E6AiwjC)
I've been on the road across the state over the last few weeks talking to Wisconsinites about how they'll be impacted by Donald Trump and the GOP's big, ugly budget. What I'm hearing from people across the state speaks volumes. Hard-working Wisconsinites are _terrified_ that they will lose lifesaving health care and food assistance they rely on to feed their families, all while big corporations benefit from Trump tax breaks. It’s unacceptable, Peter. **This GOP legislation will be devastating to Wisconsin families. I’m taking this fight to every corner of our state, and I’m proud to stand alongside families, workers, and advocates who refuse to back down.** **[If you’re with us, will you contribute whatever you can to help us keep fighting Trump’s agenda at every turn?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-aug25.EOUccb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250823_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4935%2E35263%2E6AiwjC)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-aug25.P6mRrn&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250823_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4935%2E35263%2E6AiwjC)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is why I keep asking.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
You can make the difference. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113862176/565174776/823540626?refcode=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRiNmYwMy0zNzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYJIJCRcgV4FI7ll73YDo168X8DhPdSSdTWeIvKL4yI=&emci=20b5f832-927f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of my home, Peter. Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So [**when I ask you to donate to our campaign, it’s because your contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113862179/565174780/-1743631236?refcode=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRiNmYwMy0zNzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYJIJCRcgV4FI7ll73YDo168X8DhPdSSdTWeIvKL4yI=) could make the difference between victory and defeat. **Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. **[I am asking you to contribute $25 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, give what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113862180/565174784/-1743631236?amount=25&refcode=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRiNmYwMy0zNzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYJIJCRcgV4FI7ll73YDo168X8DhPdSSdTWeIvKL4yI=)** | **[DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113862181/565174785/-1743631236?amount=25&refcode=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.72db6f03-3780-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRiNmYwMy0zNzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYJIJCRcgV4FI7ll73YDo168X8DhPdSSdTWeIvKL4yI=)**

Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So = could make the difference between victory and defeat. Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend hundreds of millions against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. body:
Will you stand with Haley to protect cancer research now?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=653%2E49239%2EaiKjPm)

---
null, it's Team Haley.

Did you see the news about RFK Jr.? If you missed it, Secretary Kennedy is making HUGE cuts to the National Institutes of Health – threatening critical cancer research. Research that can – and will – save lives.
Haley didn't hesitate to call him out, the same way she’s been calling out Trump’s dangerous anti-science agenda her entire career.
Haley is a fighter, and that includes fighting cancer and its devastating impacts. She’s supported legislation to increase funding for cancer research, and she’s fought to expand access to treatment and health care. We're proud to stand with Haley and fight for lifesaving cancer research. But we need to raise our voices together – and we're counting on YOU, null.
**[Will you add your name to our flash petition and say loud and clear that you want to keep funding the fight against cancer? We need 750 responses by midnight tonight – sign now and show your support for protecting vital cancer research.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4854?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&fname=null&t=3&akid=653%2E49239%2EaiKjPm)**

Team Haley Stevens
|

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. Haley

name: Mark Warner
subject: My silver medal campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Decades later, I can confidently say that the better candidate won.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113862286/565175109/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SilverMedal_250823_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA4Y2JmZC0zNzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vUKqzMedDrPLHwP09hWrI4Elan4eNhuFf3yoilwjEg=) Derek—

To me, Virginia means everything.

It’s why as a young entrepreneur, dad, and business owner, I stepped up to run for Senate to fight for our Commonwealth in the halls of Congress.

And I worked my tail off on my very first campaign – and still came up short.

I now call it my silver medal campaign.

Decades later, I can confidently say that the better candidate won. My friend, the late Senator John Warner (no relation!), was a hell of a warrior for Virginia.

Over the years (and after more successful campaigns for Governor and then Senate), I got to know the Republican Senator with my same last name. We didn’t agree on most things, but always agreed on the end goal: strengthening Virginia’s economy, making our communities stronger and safer, and giving our kids a fair shot at success.

It’s why in 2014, Republican John Warner endorsed my campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113862289/565175112/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SilverMedal_250823_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA4Y2JmZC0zNzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vUKqzMedDrPLHwP09hWrI4Elan4eNhuFf3yoilwjEg=) John Warner isn’t the only friend I’ve made across the aisle. I’m proud to have been a part of nearly every bipartisan deal made in the Senate in the past decade.

From lowering the cost of health care, to fighting back the COVID-19 pandemic and passing the largest infrastructure and public lands investments in half a century: we haven’t always gotten it perfectly right, but we’ve gotten a lot accomplished.

**Look, I still believe in the importance of cutting a bipartisan deal – but MY GOSH – this is no longer John Warner’s Republican party. I’m so sick and tired of hearing my Republican colleagues tell me one thing in private and then voting another way, just to appease Donald Trump.**

The corruption, the chaos, the incompetence – it’s mind-boggling to me how my Republican colleagues repeatedly bend the knee to Trump. And frankly it’s a massive departure from the common decency we used to expect from our leaders.

[_**Republicans prove that the only way to hold Trump accountable is to take back the Senate next year. And that’s why I need your help. clean_body: Decades later, I can confidently say that the better candidate won. | | | = Derek— To me, Virginia means everything. It’s why as a young entrepreneur, dad, and business owner, I stepped up to run for Senate to fight for our Commonwealth in the halls of Congress. And I worked my tail off on my very first campaign – and still came up short. I now call it my silver medal campaign. Decades later, I can confidently say that the better candidate won. My friend, the late Senator John Warner (no relation!), was a hell of a warrior for Virginia. Over the years (and after more successful campaigns for Governor and then Senate), I got to know the Republican Senator with my same last name. We didn’t agree on most things, but always agreed on the end goal: strengthening Virginia’s economy, making our communities stronger and safer, and giving our kids a fair shot at success. It’s why in 2014, Republican John Warner endorsed my campaign. = John Warner isn’t the only friend I’ve made across the aisle. I’m proud to have been a part of nearly every bipartisan deal made in the Senate in the past decade. From lowering the cost of health care, to fighting back the COVID-19 pandemic and passing the largest infrastructure and public lands investments in half a century: we haven’t always gotten it perfectly right, but we’ve gotten a lot accomplished. Look, I still believe in the importance of cutting a bipartisan deal – but MY GOSH – this is no longer John Warner’s Republican party. I’m so sick and tired of hearing my Republican colleagues tell me one thing in private and then voting another way, just to appease Donald Trump. The corruption, the chaos, the incompetence – it’s mind-boggling to me how my Republican colleagues repeatedly bend the knee to Trump. And frankly it’s a massive departure from the common decency we used to expect from our leaders. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = ******=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** The fight continues, Mark ******=****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94121?refcode=em20250823-9320&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9320%2E614464%2ES24UjZ)
Peter,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
**[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between State Democrats Committee and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94121?refcode=em20250823-9320&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9320%2E614464%2ES24UjZ)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $10 now, split between State Democrats Committee and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94121?refcode=em20250823-9320&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9320%2E614464%2ES24UjZ)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9320%2E614464%2ES24UjZ).

name: Michael Bennet
subject: If Trump comes for mail-in voting in CO, he'll have to go through me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
The right to easy and accessible voting is the foundation of our democracy.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113864036/565180715/-2054079050?refcode=jtk889-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFlZmRlOS0zYTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AP3X3pfQGkSioj3ltsFe5jIjyOjsPZQtiDxzMAYx4Rs=)
---
Friend,

The right to easy and accessible voting is the foundation of our democracy.
In Colorado, we've shown the country that mail-in voting is secure, convenient, and effective. It's a system that has led to some of the highest voter turnout rates in the nation. It allows everyone, from our troops overseas to our rural neighbors, to make their voices heard. Vote-by-mail is not a partisan issue – it's about ensuring every eligible voter can participate in our democracy.
President Trump is trying to roll back Colorado’s progress. He’s spreading misinformation and pushing for policies that would restrict access to the ballot box. He wants to make it harder to vote, not easier, and we need to stop him.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113864039/565180719/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk889-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFlZmRlOS0zYTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AP3X3pfQGkSioj3ltsFe5jIjyOjsPZQtiDxzMAYx4Rs=)
**So my vow to you today is that as Colorado's next governor, I will stop at nothing to protect mail-in voting from any and all attacks the president might throw at us. **But to see it through, I first need your help to win this race.

clean_body: The right to easy and accessible voting is the foundation of our democracy. | | | = Friend, The right to easy and accessible voting is the foundation of our democracy. In Colorado, we've shown the country that mail-in voting is secure, convenient, and effective. It's a system that has led to some of the highest voter turnout rates in the nation. It allows everyone, from our troops overseas to our rural neighbors, to make their voices heard. Vote-by-mail is not a partisan issue – it's about ensuring every eligible voter can participate in our democracy. President Trump is trying to roll back Colorado’s progress. He’s spreading misinformation and pushing for policies that would restrict access to the ballot box. He wants to make it harder to vote, not easier, and we need to stop him. = So my vow to you today is that as Colorado's next governor, I will stop at nothing to protect mail-in voting from any and all attacks the president might throw at us. But to see it through, I first need your help to win this race. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for fighting alongside me, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The Squad isn’t just resisting authoritarianism — we’re organizing to defeat it
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250823-1490-foote&t=1001&akid=1490%2E342411%2EjdaZHH ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad isn’t just resisting authoritarianism — we’re organizing to
defeat it.

Right now, MAGA extremists and far-right forces are ramping up their
attacks. They’re targeting Squad Members, spreading hate, and doing
everything they can to silence the movement we’re building together.

Why? Because we’re fighting for a democracy that actually works — for
working people, not the ultra-wealthy.

We don’t take corporate PAC money. We never have, and we never will. Our
work is fueled by everyday people like you — not billionaires, not special
interests, not lobbyists.

And together, we’re taking action:

✅ Holding Trump, his administration, and far-right extremists accountable;

✅ Organizing at the grassroots level to build real, people-powered
political strength;

✅ Supporting our progressive champions who are fighting for justice,
equity, and democracy for all.

That’s why your support today is so important. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250823-movement.eKEpCZ&refcode=em20250823-1490&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1490%2E342411%2EjdaZHH ]Will you chip in
$3 — or whatever you can afford — to the Squad Victory Fund
today?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250823-movement.eKEpCZ&refcode=em20250823-1490&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1490%2E342411%2EjdaZHH ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1490%2E342411%2EjdaZHH

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: What’s a jungle primary?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40051%2E3422442%2EBbjDk6)
Peter,
California has a ‘jungle primary’ system, meaning unlike most primaries that advance one Democrat and one Republican, the top two vote-getters move on to the general, **regardless of party.**
Katie is definitely the Democratic frontrunner in this race. But we can’t take anything for granted in a competitive field with so many candidates and a recent poll showing nearly 40% of voters are undecided.
We need to keep up our current momentum, so we can reach voters who will decide the outcome of the primary election next June. It might feel far away, but right now is when we build the foundation of this campaign.
**[Will you contribute $5 or any amount that is meaningful to you to help Katie defeat opponents and become California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250823_1_ak?refcode=em20250823-40051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40051_3422442_BbjDk6&akid=40051%2E3422442%2EBbjDk6)**

Team Katie Porter

disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
This is what it looks like when democracy is under siege.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. George believes that in America, **we don’t rig elections.**
The Trump administration’s efforts to eliminate vote-by-mail is a clear attempt to appease dictators and silence millions around the country — and abroad — who rely on it to make their voices heard. Putting an end to it would mean fewer people voting, and less representative elections.
No matter your political affiliation, one thing we should all agree on is that every American deserves fair and equal access to the ballot box. **[Sign our petition to stand with the nearly 1 million New Yorkers who voted by mail in 2024 and stand up to this blatant attack on voting access.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113865564/565186765/-1820022671?source=SBD_GL_EM_EN_082225_VotingAccess_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzk2MmFjYmQtM2M4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gz5Q1lnacjakuo4vvpdoKcV6GgUG9EKqL97ykO7iJ8Y=&emci=62301f1e-9d7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c962acbd-3c80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21388742)**

clean_body: This is what it looks like when democracy is under siege. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, Donald Trump just launched a full scale attack on mail in voting, on the advice of Russian dictator Vladimir Putin. | George believes that in America, we don’t rig elections. The Trump administration’s efforts to eliminate vote-by-mail is a clear attempt to appease dictators and silence millions around the country — and abroad — who rely on it to make their voices heard. Putting an end to it would mean fewer people voting, and less representative elections. No matter your political affiliation, one thing we should all agree on is that every American deserves fair and equal access to the ballot box. — Team Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

subject: A socialist just took NYC. Who’s stopping them?

body:
A radical socialist just hijacked NYC. The Senate could be next. | Fellow American,

Zohran Mamdani—the _openly socialist_ , police-hating, tax-hiking, radical liberal—won New York’s Democratic mayoral primary.
_Let that sink in._

A 33-year-old Marxist hijacked the biggest city in America. Not with some moderate message. Not by hiding who he is.

**No—Mamdani ran as a socialist and won. And now the far-left smells blood in the water.**

This wasn’t just a local race. This was a warning shot— a **test-run for flipping the U.S. Senate in 2026.**

You think they’ll stop in New York? You think the squad will stop cheering? Think again.

They’re coming for Georgia. For Maine. For North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and every red firewall we’ve got left.

**This is personal to me.** My father fled Castro’s Cuba. I’ve seen what socialism does. The slogans start off sounding idealistic—then the breadlines come. The disappearances. The fear.

And now the Left is dusting off that same failed playbook and trying to pitch it to American voters like it’s the hot new trend on TikTok.

**I’m not having it.**
Not on my watch. Not in _my_ country.

clean_body: A radical socialist just hijacked NYC. The Senate could be next. | Fellow American, Zohran Mamdani—the openly socialist , police-hating, tax-hiking, radical liberal—won New York’s Democratic mayoral primary. Let that sink in. A 33-year-old Marxist hijacked the biggest city in America. Not with some moderate message. Not by hiding who he is. No—Mamdani ran as a socialist and won. And now the far-left smells blood in the water. This wasn’t just a local race. This was a warning shot— a test-run for flipping the U.S. Senate in 2026. You think they’ll stop in New York? You think the squad will stop cheering? Think again. They’re coming for Georgia. For Maine. For North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and every red firewall we’ve got left. This is personal to me. My father fled Castro’s Cuba. I’ve seen what socialism does. The slogans start off sounding idealistic—then the breadlines come. The disappearances. The fear. And now the Left is dusting off that same failed playbook and trying to pitch it to American voters like it’s the hot new trend on TikTok. I’m not having it. Not on my watch. Not in my country. - The NRSC is fighting to recruit, train, and elect strong, battle-ready Republican candidates across the country who can hold the line. But we can’t do it without immediate support from patriots like you. Socialism just won New York. It will win the Senate next if we don’t crush it now. For liberty, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator, Texas If you want PROTECT THE MAGA SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Every day, Governor Whitmer works tirelessly for the people of Michigan. Whether it’s protecting our freedoms, strengthening our economy, or standing up for what’s right, she shows us what true leadership looks like.
Now, it’s our turn to give something back. We’re gathering birthday wishes from supporters across the state (and beyond!) to remind Governor Whitmer just how much she’s appreciated.
**[Will you take a minute to add your name to Gretchen’s birthday card? You can even add a personal note to let her know how much her work means to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113865894/565187963/912415902?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20250823_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTE3MTA2NjYtM2U4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J_KxEiWcoKAyYp2LdKM82pMh_g23DPDlcYLa3qT3nes=&emci=c57cc586-a97f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=91710666-3e80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1028753)**

BREAKING: Donald Trump mobilizes National Guard troops to 19 states in federal crime crackdown
This is his most serious authoritarian escalation yet, and all American citizens who beleive in freedom must take immediate action.
Rush $15 right away so we can help Democrats on the ground fight Trump's fascist power grab >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=082325_1]
Trump is claiming this is about “crime” and “immigration.” But we know the truth:
!!️He’s bypassing governors to deploy troops without their consent.
!!️He’s militarizing immigration enforcement and targeting vulnerable communities.
!!️He’s testing whether he can get away with using the military as his personal police force.
This is how fascism takes root. If we don’t rise up and resist immediately, Trump will escalate further — sending troops to suppress protests, intimidate opponents, and control communities that dare to push back.
We cannot allow silence to be mistaken for acceptance. That’s why we’re asking you, right now, to be one of the first to stand up. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: The New York Sun
subject: Times v. Sun l David v. Goliath
body:
The Times has betrayed its readers

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1c5c8f50cea45f599a46057d2ca6bb5&_e=huSGysbsYAXtxkVDr_7i9IhGeK4motrMJW3mlWDsyL8YoZUwssLBu-RJGhmZN5crtbX6CHetew-fl6nHEISYv9Qo0NLDgwIRqitSesU6PyKX59nA0cui45ptElCmhCe-GLyp1ZnBajfrs9AxzTaXFBnb1ojFPcRp2Fw-fWew6hVMNq8KnBI7tAFrnfBwbzgXQq2v0bI3aoeInzgDrrQWx5tyg4f43xr1snzHKgRGpGqIaMcbFfXPFkbJdkgIcIT4ruDJ7gWE1mVrDrJMPh1flDilFxym5HqmysybZkxd6e7O7zRnPm_HHv7g5-38YL2Enp78ifkKC11R4qnOapOskI28DU5_CroMoHS3mINKZyejBgh3-zEeyhvWuq5TyDuEqz613_7LqZ8rZ4U0X09M9uhXGteetlW9i7Qg3jqvF4jHvK9RFUPM2OqmsjtUJk4XZiMmljRkb2vVoICogshx2PWREcr9ME7doXX7JKZFbJ5J8sauQGLDx1PhSThwyRO7BWQIbdTltrMFue3bvj1qKm399czkXDGadUJzeH8ul_GTQL0RbCQ0NnM_snujfwHpZhntp7aMlwnlGqcwkx2kpnkJpDOjjVHRwJsnwGFxG7I%3D)
---
|
---
| | Peter,It wasn't so long ago that The New York Times was upheld as the gold standard in journalism. Today, many Americans feel the paper has betrayed its readers.

Now, enthusiasm is growing over The New York Sun returning to its historic role as a counterweight to the Times. We've heard a lot of frustration over the widening gulf between what the Times claims to be and what it is in reality.
---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1c5c8f50cea45f599a46057d2ca6bb5&_e=huSGysbsYAXtxkVDr_7i9IhGeK4motrMJW3mlWDsyL8YoZUwssLBu-RJGhmZN5crtbX6CHetew-fl6nHEISYv9Qo0NLDgwIRqitSesU6PyKX59nA0cui45ptElCmhCe-GLyp1ZnBajfrs9AxzTaXFBnb1ojFPcRp2Fw-fWew6hVMNq8KnBI7tAFrnfBwbzgXQq2v0bI3aoeInzgDrrQWx8KjdwNgJIeznYzFxe3MJqbnLq1B7SHyOy6pMeh4mtf8nLngI6erj26NKDO-b5ub77HZNZWjSZpZgoGt-4gvr3lSiub7sowYTyB4MMoh8XJ9xz7LIiim8ffgnY6wpjRtJrUjqntWSj_Si0HgsnpfhKNMZwaDjzrSyKOj5V_in9xDoKWTc7dHOQzqR9RfcyIt3EeFfskh3XLUivb3PAVilrk0lEvW8nYK9X76B6NnCGmwIoIpKHhqIPVjjxzOOslD-0zHnNdvZ0PPqiEzw8ifWR2dfhjs6N9Ukp048DZSvmLElqPccXSsS3nsqw2fuVRF36swWuIgQx5jILTxuZVrsJezId8qg8KnSaLFM5QuPIvpLzSdlML3WuP9zv-fYzK-3vFac3geRLMt2mC52y1bVcI%3D)
---
| | Like the Times, we're an almost 200 years old, Pulitzer-winning broadsheet with robust coverage of politics and the arts, and now focused on a digital-first strategy. **But we have a very different approach to journalism than the Times.** One that's in higher demand now than ever. It won't be easy. The Times is large and established. It's a modern David vs. Goliath media battle.Ultimately, a membership with the Sun doesn't just give you full access to the finest American journalism, **it also sends a message to the Times and other newsrooms that have lost their way. Will you join us?**
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1c5c8f50cea45f599a46057d2ca6bb5&_e=huSGysbsYAXtxkVDr_7i9IhGeK4motrMJW3mlWDsyL8YoZUwssLBu-RJGhmZN5crtbX6CHetew-fl6nHEISYv9Qo0NLDgwIRqitSesU6PyKX59nA0cui45ptElCmhCe-GLyp1ZnBajfrs9AxzTaXFBnb1ojFPcRp2Fw-fWew6hVMNq8KnBI7tAFrnfBwbzgXQq2v0bI3aoeInzgDrrQWx1xKKtR-7awsn5GUHzU6cIh7lnakIhme3BOZrDGrACkobRqIeyDboL1qw7xwNcLwfd1-SGy5NGi0jkiMF0aWkgHid307D161tpZhLTH0EjBjz9tA87Tc2ruipYHpxZOx4RT59S3R1uZqKfphf74-jVHEKXpk1q3ucyPzGBZiYN0nhCJQIzkx__cuHUBqHcEfOmE03vfgGhL96NiVvcW70Rbm08hLurNOhGFG2l5OV0LxshbajqCAY-0a7LDZOcnnPqEq-ZRykauTO40ixvG_cnFxzH1abSmmu0ENzHZXcV1mzZ0OzRnppKEXzlN-UCCXw0ov4zWdv40-HbbITABWYA7LXuf2e9_j2FWM3dKxk5EVMiSEA9cCQk2dJANXmAkifUkKpN3OEZoXCC8--HgbA-A%3D)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: We can’t wait until next year’s midterms: We need to act now.
body:
We’re empowering progressives to fight for our communities and our rights. | | |
---
Friend, In response to Trump’s authoritarian takeover, we’re organizing for today and for our future. This weekend, we’re wrapping up our summer Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship. With your support, we’ve trained 16 fellows ranging in age from 15 to 24 years old. This year’s cohort is 100% BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), 62.5% female, and 37.5% male. By the end of this weekend, our youth fellows will have each completed 20 hours of field work and 30 hours of training and instruction from community leaders and experts in issue areas including environmental justice, education justice, the labor movement, knowing your rights, and criminal justice reform and the abolitionist movement. They’ve also been attending community meetings such as city council, school board, and board of police commissioners. They’ll each receive a $1,000 stipend and they’ll move forward in their communities with skills on personal leadership, political and community organizing, and campaign communication. These young people are ready to make our world better. **After this weekend, we’ll prepare to launch our next big youth leadership program:** our Youth Advisory Council, where we’re offering high school students an opportunity to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change. [**Click here to watch our new video, which gives you a glimpse into the Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship and how we’re training the leaders of tomorrow. Then could you donate to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today to power our work, including supporting the progressive candidates we need right now?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJToeWGAhx9fKERF9q4bIp-GG6lH8Ntv4xliViEkyOzY_Zwe6B4cUEijb0QGTG_jYMaM8F2TaN6gHL7IlIjbwxIB6IazDUbEYHrOsSonH0N9gjatc1uVc7SK0mjMom8BAhgwsmZPIMVPsptfLYtC8GZf-tZb5t9Tx8X7xkI6jhAgNMhMoTpsuyKhYORE4V6oOu7_xGoS83_S6UyS5wqv1xTUl9keBAdn-BrLpIZMKT1qhN2yO9rquFI3ILjppBT6zR5XMxvZkvVONOYgWruTbSP8wZYKjRFyk-Cb42frNCyTA1iOo35DUsKxCte9e1j5MCA-GrKqYzPGYEQenYfwA8-v95/4ja/LRVfVl6XSvWWR-st3Zonvw/h0/h001.fc59k1gp-oe869PO9ZI30lmu2jJi6CRnyssXGe4FKbo) **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTocd1P86NnAKn4KaJ1yMAcAG6OvWcF_EYA9nxYcT0O5Z8ea0o-6e_PjjU74sWjOGFnwtknjOnw3-enAJqKt6iQukNSZKE8qJNMUreuG0HVFXxTFbaFKxwJ86mCWeDlPUUn-4ObF0W_jk2CsJRskc55B87eDsfmZckD2PB5hacB9_ByO-OzKXJ8RAyNYXK2n8HNxRMAanlzQnBN-O27jUT-efsNSA5S_qeq2EL-R8Apvfe1gF-u1g0UMLWDDR3hgH3MU9cyiqaTzCXQ_VFE43IaCCyDo7rU5fda2Ew2f7hWlZTtG37TTpZNxXcKJb26ByzWysXYfZFwmSosQzlB8NrdiY/4ja/LRVfVl6XSvWWR-st3Zonvw/h1/h001.AhxN0pbMmFNqtH70vmFW1XxJHln9W_PqRcd8JrdURQE)** | [WATCH & DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTocnQV0wIhqw3muksJB-bmKfXNmu6I7k8iaIFRlpoVqGQc5VM3Zp5DFldsmekKtM6phca-MFkPbsZCGx3qJhjPm-QV5QDsgH4kFMFajPYx7zyBrr7NUsSbJRFcgwoUcJGsvuihnZdNUnfNPDbcXCt7C87T18E9qPdfYFX7EW_jFLKUeCa7qV6EO9xnE19gCWg29TRHVXguNBwlxL-7XcR4aHXOmNoq45Jlg5-id2V_wsVHKeUWFtZDHZd7i_OILnEKKpothiWeLAfwpduHk1Dv262LQXpvgdtqqnkKMx15I-cRxduXCyXCQWdrnP0KB-lGKF94lxH94wMjTZ8jBnuQva/4ja/LRVfVl6XSvWWR-st3Zonvw/h2/h001.WR2vL_3BY7ku-EiPPpYffluyugEk9OzWtRJ_Iz9bXEk)

[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTocXL_xD67C5kNjTT11YZMfU-YTn9tmcDL0wJytNbM5Nf0pW6Tc-ek4nob-Fxkk0IvKXGF7GSV0JzLjMQA1vF2HfBo3yCmJTBQctrFjD0nuWV2CimRfOeevrJnkU2fT4Vy9JzQPB9d3flOYQBf0-PBfNXwDrwkLc3wxu7VsvCuD4-R74Q1ltY31O8-Xk1jToOjGui1Y0U8rerFnwXx-WxhRw9FYPxqwSCfbqvhQ4OzPBPrm_L2IOtOLlgHKzQySZmGnU-m3sR3B4JeA9kwBhN_ITwLbXyXSKZDpblPpsDL5ceewm0Bkeh8nsFjgag1lWo1aNuqaXj1rrEYAknBuj_Lzn/4ja/LRVfVl6XSvWWR-st3Zonvw/h3/h001.xugPV4oNt2MA5OcAqaTjKAjANwhPxJqUpaTxEpsfGNE)

clean_body: We’re empowering progressives to fight for our communities and our rights. | | | Friend, In response to Trump’s authoritarian takeover, we’re organizing for today and for our future. This weekend, we’re wrapping up our summer Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship. With your support, we’ve trained 16 fellows ranging in age from 15 to 24 years old. This year’s cohort is 100% BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), 62.5% female, and 37.5% male. By the end of this weekend, our youth fellows will have each completed 20 hours of field work and 30 hours of training and instruction from community leaders and experts in issue areas including environmental justice, education justice, the labor movement, knowing your rights, and criminal justice reform and the abolitionist movement. They’ve also been attending community meetings such as city council, school board, and board of police commissioners. They’ll each receive a $1,000 stipend and they’ll move forward in their communities with skills on personal leadership, political and community organizing, and campaign communication. These young people are ready to make our world better. After this weekend, we’ll prepare to launch our next big youth leadership program: our Youth Advisory Council, where we’re offering high school students an opportunity to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change. | In addition to supporting future leaders, we’re endorsing and supporting candidates who are rooted in their community and fighting for equity. One of these candidates is people’s champion Detroit City Council candidate Denzel McCampbell, who came in first in his recent primary election! Next year’s midterms will be important, but we can’t afford to wait another year to bring positive change to our communities—which are struggling under high prices and authoritarian threats right now. Local elections are underway across the country, and we will keep contributing to progressives’ campaigns to grow our power. Together, we are empowering people of all ages to fight for our communities and our rights. In solidarity, Rashida | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . You couldn’t design a budget-reconciliation package that would be worse for the state of New Mexico _than what Republicans just passed. _ Their reconciliation bill is a handout to corporate special interests and out-of-state billionaires — all at the expense of hardworking families here at home. Instead of lowering the costs of health care, protecting our public lands, and investing in clean energy jobs, the GOP pushed through a deal that shoves New Mexico backward. I’ve fought my entire career to make sure our communities aren’t treated as an afterthought. But the truth is: if we don’t fight back, special interests will keep writing the rules — and our state will keep paying the price **[That’s why I need your help today.
