name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: King of DC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court made Trump a king. Now he’s taken over DC. | |
---
Peter, **The Supreme Court gave Trump the green light to act like a king. Now he’s taken over DC.** Over a week ago, Trump declared a “state of emergency” and sent the National Guard into DC, declaring himself in charge. Crime in DC is at record lows, but that’s not what this is about. This is about Trump seizing every bit of power he can from the American people—and stamping out dissent wherever he sees it. **The MAGA justices Trump installed on the Supreme Court have refused to stop his march toward authoritarianism. Congress must step up, do its job, and rein in Trump before it’s too late.** [**Resolutions have been introduced in both the House and Senate to stop Trump’s takeover and return power to DC’s officials. Tell Congress to pass the bills now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwocMWCl0Z_ZtCTHi4CaOp3PMrSHxdpoyTzJ7ARNZAgKB3kR2VnUMr9qEIvpqz1AAG5iM1mMUMo5Mp1WX0KyyM6BYvliLU4ZAjuihg83EUyZXV6UU9qSZZNfOMDrnPixg1C2e7U6djDO1w9HKy5iYtKfsf_wG-KGVVlDuPOWDGq71IgOx5epEIx9dBIebh_VdiSbIISZZvlF6Abwgudv_CUkTjqiBTt9YZ4FwNtHKHtpr4aesSRzVMnc4ifIOuar-cLdxbDiynfNPKBuEsHM2Ms4hYYEikIc_UFMRaSlug8i9gX6SDamZ2yIFcHoZLuQX8D7glZwzuEum8g3KaQQQFA1zcGd6SoYdWtUAIEe240P628y0aG8Z5p45eEWs5gScKz7fAdI1uY2KJnBj7N-S43Ihsk_HZXx0pobacsn8KPngXK38IPfEqNVo-jt0KswKRhA/4ja/6m8Ryf4ZTfKiNrmrwt2tfQ/h0/h001.hwyZvjpb1RK1vuGGwnIoSRKxY5J642va9wdintfjgNo) [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwocMWCl0Z_ZtCTHi4CaOp3PMrSHxdpoyTzJ7ARNZAgKB3kR2VnUMr9qEIvpqz1AAG5iM1mMUMo5Mp1WX0KyyM6BYvliLU4ZAjuihg83EUyZXV6UU9qSZZNfOMDrnPixg1C2e7U6djDO1w9HKy5iYtKfsf_wG-KGVVlDuPOWDGq71IgOx5epEIx9dBIebh_VdiSbIISZZvlF6Abwgudv_CUkTjqiBTt9YZ4FwNtHKHtpr4aesSRzVMnc4ifIOuar-cLSAn7BJLWI_-BL6mtki7h10hX6enDOA1Zsks5SPiCBiL4kPANZFiyarm-V-nEGcbECdB5iohsvJdjStV0mVt5OnJtbIdB_VciT0SYTlIUM7r6K7jxeFvVtrC5iE-3zOklbLhsnzrvLz4Pl8wH-vS54RCCQUW4Ii3Y0vX3Ekaz934YTtQRac1DJZgig1_6rsndw/4ja/6m8Ryf4ZTfKiNrmrwt2tfQ/h1/h001.yNrbhmBsmaQTXVKCzo0IVcE54ZyiuQrmm4GRw52lIIQ) **Trump’s “state of emergency” isn’t just about crime, but it’s also not just about DC.** This administration is once again testing the waters to see what our broken system will allow them to get away with. They’ve already indicated that they’re prepared to send the National Guard to _any_ city at a moment’s notice. clean_body: The Supreme Court made Trump a king. Now he’s taken over DC. | | Peter, The Supreme Court gave Trump the green light to act like a king. Now he’s taken over DC. Over a week ago, Trump declared a “state of emergency” and sent the National Guard into DC, declaring himself in charge. Crime in DC is at record lows, but that’s not what this is about. This is about Trump seizing every bit of power he can from the American people—and stamping out dissent wherever he sees it. The MAGA justices Trump installed on the Supreme Court have refused to stop his march toward authoritarianism. Congress must step up, do its job, and rein in Trump before it’s too late. Trump’s “state of emergency” isn’t just about crime, but it’s also not just about DC. This administration is once again testing the waters to see what our broken system will allow them to get away with. They’ve already indicated that they’re prepared to send the National Guard to any city at a moment’s notice. The Supreme Court has paved the way for his takeover of America, stopping lower courts from blocking any of his illegal activity and essentially barring him from accountability. In a democracy, Trump shouldn’t be allowed to place himself in charge against the wishes of the officials and residents of a city. But that’s exactly what he’s done in our nation’s capital. Thank you for fighting authoritarianism, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . subject: Trump officials order halt to critically important wind power project -- even though it's nearly complete. Demand they lift it!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Trump officials order halt to critically important wind power project, even though it's nearly complete. Demand they lift it!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac6b208e-9c43-49eb-a23a-8b087b6e4981/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb866e20-5ddf-4e82-8e6b-0e0ccde8b15d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump administration officials have [ordered](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2713182e-1288-4c52-beef-b81ec7cf38a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ an abrupt halt to a critically important wind farm off the coast of Rhode Island](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te826721f-0345-42b9-8eb3-a9337e77f829/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- even though it is nearly complete, and will power 350,000 homes with clean energy within months.

The move appears to be part of the war against clean energy currently being waged by Trump and like-minded morons.

[**Sign the petition now, and demand they let this project go forward.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc642669e-9886-4f1b-9e04-ae419129c49a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

It's hard to stress enough how stupid stopping this would be. It's a $4 billion project that is nearly done, and the money has already been spent, so there's no real savings. **And this is exactly the kind of thing we need to help ensure our energy independence, and reduce pollution for decades to come. ** But because Trump has some [bizarre](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td558ec05-5f51-4d83-8185-d90438d7276f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) beliefs about wind, a fetish for coal, and is nostalgic for unbreathable air, the rest of us have to work extra hard to overcome his stupidity. [**Don't let them get away with this. Add your name, and demand they get out of the way, and let this project move forward. ** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcd2f10f-21a9-4443-bf29-80c566470c7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Team Emily
subject: We will replace the anti-Social Security Republicans with leaders who will fight for working people of every age.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
MSNBC: Trump’s treasury secretary says he sees ‘a backdoor for privatizing Social Security’

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113866244/565189280/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.23_SocSec90_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzlmODQzMC00MjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mea_tm6jygbp9en7B6vRjbDmCkRTg0dnn8X3MQrK-40=&emci=19db2fb5-a77e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0c9f8430-4280-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) | Peter, after 90 years, it's clear: Social Security is far and away the most successful anti-poverty program in American history. It is a promise from one generation to another — you pay into Social Security with every paycheck, then benefit when you’re older. **Now, Trump and the Republican-controlled Congress are deliberately weakening Social Security, and they aren’t even trying to hide it:** MSNBC: Trump’s treasury secretary says he sees ‘a backdoor for privatizing Social Security’ Axios: Social Security offices lost an estimated 20% of staff this year, causing delays The Hill: Trump’s megabill could deplete Social Security’s trust funds faster Our seniors deserve better. We deserve better. Future generations deserve better. We can — and WILL — replace the anti-Social Security Republicans with leaders who will fight for working people of every age. **This is yet another reason we are working starting NOW to take back the House, and flip critical swing districts like Arizona’s 6th. ** [_**August is a tough month for grassroots fundraising, and we are falling behind. It is a promise from one generation to another — you pay into Social Security with every paycheck, then benefit when you’re older. Now, Trump and the Republican-controlled Congress are deliberately weakening Social Security, and they aren’t even trying to hide it: MSNBC: Trump’s treasury secretary says he sees ‘a backdoor for privatizing Social Security’ Axios: Social Security offices lost an estimated 20% of staff this year, causing delays The Hill: Trump’s megabill could deplete Social Security’s trust funds faster Our seniors deserve better. subject: Paid protesters tried to intimidate us…

body:
The Left is targeting us and watching our every move
| Peter,
---
This was truly an honor.
---
I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority.
---
And thank God for that decision.
---
Because right now, we're only _ONE_ seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is _**ours**_. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar.
---
And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move...
---
**...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us.**
---
Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, _but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re**“closing the gap”** on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York._
---
**It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district.**
---
**From _Wall Street Journal_ : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...”**
---
The Radical Left sent us _their_ message of intimidation. Now it’s _our_ turn to respond with a message of our own.
---
**I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED.**
---
I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight.
---
**Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now.**
---

clean_body: The Left is targeting us and watching our every move | Peter, This was truly an honor. I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority. And thank God for that decision. Because right now, we're only ONE seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is ours. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar. And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move... ...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us. Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re“closing the gap” on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York. It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district. From Wall Street Journal : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...” The Radical Left sent us their message of intimidation. Now it’s our turn to respond with a message of our own. I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED. I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight. Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Claudia, United We Dream
subject: How we’re practicing self-care this summer🌞
body:
United We Dream members are ready to resist nationwide and build a world where everyone is welcome! | | | Peter, This summer, WE — _not politicians or billionaires_ — are taking the lead in our communities. But to win the future we deserve, we need spaces where we can be ourselves and recharge. That’s why we created the **Summer of Dreams** program. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TthptgwZVJDS3zgzzjnyvdbPQzkMW4ggY8lkm-wpZi0WitXyLeeyOKeuHqY9awAqDDvMP9ltDfKrS0hiyGefNUHllpXrZ_v7YZBhwgS3M1oYhds_P99DtRM236ypQRQRXl9MjEJnJvGwiFGFzv_8IjD-SEJw6F_UyHQgXi1CHB14x66uHPb6TEiVXrXOaYJsXgqvweN0Djtx9vHe7p48hW5NaXB4UwkHFnsbT0k-dlTCkLMbjEE0vueJbt92Lo-m1UVDEQp7nF5Zp1ggmKRZ-FQR2F72KTM3pTrxGFaZKEgWK2JzUSLoff6dOuB9N9i8k5-84MVVeDbsVngy_fHP2NRTRjbonrpMQdugt6go4xrtvcZ9q0khpN99Cc0gV_VSz4ArvPQJ8c2sxa0kP04TbmUTuw8DuP8axDBYVApSmi6hA/4ja/Mx7aP5HiS-Gvb_yefj7xZQ/h0/h001.AyNAqyKlwkfalNdSiIakjlEcSwHNLaVnPXcPa43Gnx4) _“This gathering wasn’t just about individual wellness; it was also about community. We shared delicious food, built meaningful relationships, and learned from each other.”
__— UWD Squad Member_ Through our Summer of Dreams program, we’re hosting events to bring the community together, celebrate our resilience, and imagine the future we deserve. United We Dream members across the country are coming together to build power, take action, and organize. At Summer of Dreams, our members had the chance to meet new people, share their dreams for the future, and find community in uncertain times. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TthptgwZVJDS3zgzzjnyvdbPQzkMW4ggY8lkm-wpZi0WitXyLeeyOKeuHqY9awAqDDtpgYQEh3Zunu8LWUe64BR2-X23FqrAVWpDTUt5uPgHlO2mIgGQXzmQrS0GlLHQKkwVdW4QoGwX_62AGoJfqnvfFu818kSDH8KQvM-uTenyujewk2PDY6G8toFjutJAsDHnmqk1K2LyMsp-GoAx3B6GnEoSRBnrJRyMVDEjlEIIgeLA8rIYwJsQPDkIrfgD5obuPdJqMbRf_n0tfk09td_MiXiT5RPj2S8deCHyxcU8O8PeUgha_SO3Sh8AcLJQQ_qyxQ1Lj2uvrAG1Jr8DEcYB33Fs4ew6fbJvRkVArM0ce_M30n4zNlM-XZS_rMu0jPijOao3DH9w3BasWgiqRVTDTsLSwtPYrj_BKxma5zmDg/4ja/Mx7aP5HiS-Gvb_yefj7xZQ/h1/h001.hEtexQzlpa1z4zec7DxbS0zEVoadZjuInpEdKEgNyaA) With many Summer of Dreams events happening throughout the country, United We Dream members are ready to resist _nationwide_ and build a world where everyone is welcome! **No matter the efforts attempting to silence and crush us, we’re not going anywhere. clean_body: United We Dream members are ready to resist nationwide and build a world where everyone is welcome! | | | Peter, This summer, WE — not politicians or billionaires — are taking the lead in our communities. But to win the future we deserve, we need spaces where we can be ourselves and recharge. That’s why we created the Summer of Dreams program. “This gathering wasn’t just about individual wellness; it was also about community. We shared delicious food, built meaningful relationships, and learned from each other.” — UWD Squad Member Through our Summer of Dreams program, we’re hosting events to bring the community together, celebrate our resilience, and imagine the future we deserve. United We Dream members across the country are coming together to build power, take action, and organize. At Summer of Dreams, our members had the chance to meet new people, share their dreams for the future, and find community in uncertain times. With many Summer of Dreams events happening throughout the country, United We Dream members are ready to resist nationwide and build a world where everyone is welcome! No matter the efforts attempting to silence and crush us, we’re not going anywhere. We know what our people need, and we’re organizing our communities to be able to fight for it. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you for helping our communities come together to build power and engage in collective organizing. In solidarity, Claudia, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Team NDRC
subject: BREAKING: Texas passes extreme, gerrymandered map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This fight isn’t over — far from it.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113866801/565191575/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYjZjNzliLTQyODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DRq8pzBCsnuGTgDrx_PX2Z4sFh3cCTWvvpSKvle05WU=&emci=eface3b1-907f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=aeb6c79b-4280-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

**🚨 Texas just passed an extreme gerrymander
to help Republicans steal five seats in Congress** Peter, Breaking news out of Texas: In the middle of the night, Republican legislators forced through an extremely gerrymandered map. They’re hopeful this new map — drawn up at the urging of the White House — will create five new Republican seats by carving up Black and Latino communities. Donald Trump and his allies are celebrating today. But this fight isn’t over. Because of what Texas just did, Republicans in states across the country are already planning to copy their playbook to steal more seats in Congress by thwarting the will of the people. We’re seeing redistricting fights crop up from Missouri to Indiana to Ohio. How we respond in this moment will determine whether a cornerstone of our democracy is gravely damaged — or if the GOP’s blatant power grab blows up in their faces. **From the time we were founded in 2017, the NDRC has existed to use our expertise in redistricting fights to engage effectively and strategically in moments like this. And we know how to win — executing a strategy that created what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years” in the last midterm election.[Our mission right now is clear: We must stop Republicans from stealing power. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e379185-7540-4255-a550-95f55f67b73f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Later today, I’ll be on stage with Bernie Sanders in Kalamazoo as part of his Fighting Oligarchy Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250823-782&t=1001&akid=782%2E251025%2EY9bHMd ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250823-782&t=1002&akid=782%2E251025%2EY9bHMd ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Later today, I’ll be on stage with Bernie Sanders in Kalamazoo as part of
his Fighting Oligarchy Tour.

I can’t tell you how much this moment means to me. Years ago, Bernie gave
me a piece of advice I’ll never forget.

He said, “In politics, people succeed either by being really good at lying
or really good at telling the truth.”

And that’s what our campaign is about — where others lie or conceal the
truth, we’re not afraid of it. We tell the truth.

We’re advocating for Medicare for All, a fair economy, and clean air and
water.

We’re being honest about our commitment to working people by refusing to
take money from corporate PACs.

And we’re not sugarcoating the challenges we’re facing, with MAGA
Republicans embracing oligarchy and fueling corporate greed — which makes
tonight’s show of unity all the more powerful.

But before I head on stage, I need to ask you:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250823-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250823-782&refcode2=782_251025_Y9bHMd&akid=782%2E251025%2EY9bHMd ]Will you pitch in $10 today to help us build momentum
ahead of this big night? Let’s make this one of the biggest fundraising
nights of our campaign so far.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250823-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250823-782&refcode2=782_251025_Y9bHMd&akid=782%2E251025%2EY9bHMd ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=782%2E251025%2EY9bHMd
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=782%2E251025%2EY9bHMd

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

subject: Big announcement

D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for working families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [_**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Josh Harder and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and build a fairer future for us all? Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school, or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** [_**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $5 or $10 now, split between Josh Harder and me? name: Team WFP
subject: Trump is waging an all-out attack on working people. Rigging elections is part of it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
They are TERRIFIED at the prospect of losing power. | | | Peter, After weeks of fierce opposition from state Democrats, Texas Republicans just officially approved Trump’s power grab and passed a new rigged Congressional map.1 It’s an absolute outrage. But Texas House Democrats, who fought valiantly to block the map under threat of arrest and prosecution, have also shined a massive spotlight on Trump’s strategy for the 2026 midterms: **attacking our right to vote.** Trump and the GOP know how unpopular they are — and they are TERRIFIED of losing power. It’s why Trump telegraphed even more attacks on vote by mail across the country just a few days ago.2 They know that millions of working families are suffering because of their policies. They know their agenda is a disaster that will only grow worse for voters. **That’s why they’re trying**** _right now_****to suppress our votes, rig election maps, and hold onto Congressional seats next year any way they can.** Taking on these tactics will be an uphill battle. And we know other Republican states are going to try and follow Texas’ lead. **But we also can see how weak this regime actually is — and how powerful**** _we_****can be when we come together to fight back.** [**We’re not backing down one inch in our fight to take back power from Republicans in Congress and elect a wave of working class champions across the country. clean_body: They are TERRIFIED at the prospect of losing power. | | | Peter, After weeks of fierce opposition from state Democrats, Texas Republicans just officially approved Trump’s power grab and passed a new rigged Congressional map.1 It’s an absolute outrage. But Texas House Democrats, who fought valiantly to block the map under threat of arrest and prosecution, have also shined a massive spotlight on Trump’s strategy for the 2026 midterms: attacking our right to vote. Trump and the GOP know how unpopular they are — and they are TERRIFIED of losing power. It’s why Trump telegraphed even more attacks on vote by mail across the country just a few days ago.2 They know that millions of working families are suffering because of their policies. They know their agenda is a disaster that will only grow worse for voters. That’s why they’re trying right nowto suppress our votes, rig election maps, and hold onto Congressional seats next year any way they can. Taking on these tactics will be an uphill battle. And we know other Republican states are going to try and follow Texas’ lead. But we also can see how weak this regime actually is — and how powerful wecan be when we come together to fight back. Trump is waging an all-out attack on working people. These attempts to rig Congressional maps and attack our right to vote are all part of it. Gutting Medicaid and SNAP wasn’t enough — now he is bulldozing the will of the voters and trying to take away the voices of millions. And as election season draws closer, and Republicans find it harder and harder to run away from their disastrous policies, they’ll grow even more desperate to keep themselves in power by any and all means. Texas is just the beginning. Rigging election maps and trying to silence voters is their long-term plan across the country. And we’re going to have to fight tooth and nail and reach even more working-class voters if we’re going to defeat them. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , Texas Tribune, August 22, 2025 2\. , AP, August 18, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Here’s the truth: **NM-02 could determine who controls the House in 2026.**
In 2022, Gabe flipped this seat by just **0.7%** — the closest House race in the country. In 2024, he won again, but the margin was still razor-thin.
This is one of just 13 districts in the entire country that voted for Trump while electing a Democrat to Congress.
Republicans are already moving to take this seat back — because if they flip it, they’re one step closer to handing full control of Congress to Trump and his MAGA allies for another 2 years.
**🚨 That’s why we’re sounding the alarm now. 🚨**
[If we want any shot at flipping the House in 2026 and putting a check on Trump’s MAGA agenda, we have to hold the line here — and that starts with grassroots support. body:

Friend —
I’m honored to share some exciting news: End Citizens United has officially endorsed my campaign for Colorado Attorney General!
End Citizens United is leading the fight to get big money out of politics, strengthen transparency, and protect the voices of everyday Americans — and I’m proud to stand with them in that fight.
As Secretary of State, I’ve worked to make Colorado’s elections among the most accessible and secure in the nation, fought to protect voting rights, and stood up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists who try to undermine our democracy.
This endorsement is a powerful reminder that we’re building a coalition committed to protecting our rights and freedoms— but we need you to stand with us.
Will you join End Citizens United in endorsing my campaign today? Add your name and show that you’re ready to defend democracy! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TXTiV13Re0mDfL2iVr__Xw2]

Thank you for standing with me,
Jena Griswold

name: Brian Lenney
subject: Death by 1,000 Cuts: Idaho's Fiscal Flub
body:
We're staring down the barrel of a near $80M deficit

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..XQwRwICU5bd1sZrq0PNn6HmLt4xZdRJSgn0D8iTdtiQ?) for more
---
# [Death by 1,000 Cuts: Idaho's Fiscal Flub ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=171752354&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUyMzU0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5Njg4NjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2MDg2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DrAk1Z-okl1ZhE4Eh6wzefHuh3810gNWus1JdZGfCbo)
### We're staring down the barrel of a near $80M deficit
| | [Brian Lenney - Nampa's Senator](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Aug 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=171752354&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUyMzU0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTk2ODg2NywiZXhwIjoxNzU4NTYwODY3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vCwEGOE0wmyklq7DqMS84_gqRRxS0kDnNxc1ZBc47fk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=171752354&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUyMzU0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5Njg4NjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2MDg2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DrAk1Z-okl1ZhE4Eh6wzefHuh3810gNWus1JdZGfCbo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=171752354&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUyMzU0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5Njg4NjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2MDg2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DrAk1Z-okl1ZhE4Eh6wzefHuh3810gNWus1JdZGfCbo)
---
| | [](https://substack..dJ_nUVcwNpJkMCUn9W1_mV3CvR3gbjbzhkQMIXsuHys?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/death-by-1000-cuts-idahos-fiscal?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Check this out...
The state just sent this to me:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b1ca131e-19ff-4b49-b6f4-bd86c231338a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If we continue this way, we'll be almost $80M in the hole at the end of the fiscal year.
So while hardworking Idahoans are getting crushed, our bloated state government has nearly a billion dollars sitting in their piggy bank.
Let me say that again: **ONE. BILLION. DOLLARS.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd61637a-2e6f-4930-ab8d-8ab1f5d4ef2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But somehow,_SOMEHOW_ , they need more of your money. More taxes. More fees. More of everything except what actually matters: CUTS.
Here's what they're NOT telling you:
The Idaho Department of Education alone is hoarding over $250 MILLION in unspent funds while complaining they're broke. They've got "Migrant Coordinators" and bureaucrats in jobs that didn't exist 20 years ago, padding payrolls while teachers supposedly go without supplies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/140de4ac-ee30-4fce-8b51-ebf354a5f475?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Hispanic Commission? Still there.
That's a $500,000 race-based waste that's still eating taxpayer dollars.
And still doing... what exactly?
Meanwhile, YOU get to fund it all...
_**Every phantom position ...**_
_**Every useless commission ...**_
_**Every bureaucrat's pet project that survives budget cycle after budget cycle like some government cockroach that just won't die!**_
I've been screaming about this since I took office.
This isn't rocket science - it's basic math that any farm family balancing their books could figure out in five minutes. When you're broke, you don't go shopping for new shoes. You fix what you have and CUT what you don't need.
**But not in Boise. In Boise, broke means "time to shake down the taxpayers again."**
They've got rainy day funds for their rainy day funds. Emergency reserves for their emergency reserves. Money stashed in more accounts than a drug cartel, and they STILL come hat-in-hand to working families asking for more.
ENOUGH.
I say it's time for a REAL Department of Government Efficiency:
✂️ **ELIMINATE** every position created in the last decade that can't justify its existence in one sentence
✂️ **DISSOLVE** every commission and board that exists to employ political cronies
✂️ **RAID** every slush fund and emergency account and RETURN IT TO THE PEOPLE
✂️ **FORCE** every department to operate on 2019 budgets until they prove they need more
This is OUR money. Not theirs. OURS.
Every dollar they're hoarding is a dollar stolen from your family's future. Every bureaucrat they refuse to fire is food off your table. Every program they won't cut is a tax hike waiting to happen.
The people are watching. The people are angry. And the people are DONE with excuses.
Cut the fat.
Idaho deserves better than death by 1,000 cuts.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ae35e585-2107-437b-8109-9445ea6d1caf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/7656b8b7-4fb7-45bf-9469-6c5f190350aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..SI6gitUfrw_IvBcQ5rhLTenPp8c4yGqohsqQ7hGdO68?)

name: Gov. Andy Beshear via In This Together PAC
subject: Leaders vs. "leaders"
body:
A proven record of winning tough races

| |
---
Hey team, it's Governor Andy Beshear. When I first ran for Attorney General in Kentucky, people said it couldn’t be done. When I ran for Governor, everyone told me the state had become too red and a Democrat couldn’t break through the partisan noise. But three races – and three wins – later, our campaign proved everyone wrong. I didn’t win three times as a Democrat in deep-red Kentucky by bowing down to party politics. I won by sticking to my values, staying true to my faith, and never forgetting who I would serve when I entered office. I listened to what Kentuckians had to say, stood up for their rights, and addressed their concerns, just like our leaders are supposed to. When I launched In This Together PAC, I did it with a simple goal: To support good people in hard races—not just in Kentucky, but nationwide. I want to share the approach that has helped us win tough elections and support the campaigns of leaders who show up, tell the truth, and actually do the job the American people hired them to do. **[That's why I’m proud to support Nellie Pou, and why I'm asking you to split a contribution of $20 between In This Together PAC and Nellie's campaign today.>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868118/565195636/-45196619?refcode=250823_ab_beshear_l1&ms=250823_ab_beshear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3OTAzNjctNDU4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3Xbo5XhGDtPfQg340XfK3UL6WZjhD-bXn1nWi5baK4=)** Nellie Pou is the kind of person ITT PAC was built to support. She is on the DCCC’s Frontline list, meaning her district is really competitive and the Republicans are gearing up to try to defeat her next November. Throughout her career, she has stood up for the people of North Jersey at every turn. From fighting to expand access to healthcare to creating good-paying jobs and lowering prices for New Jersey working families, Nellie Pou has proven she has what it takes to be a leader for all. And today, her leadership is needed more than ever. Partisan politics are wreaking havoc on our democracy. Congress is writing and passing laws tailor-made to support the wealthy, while leaving everyday folks behind. That’s not what real leadership is about—and we can’t afford to let it continue. At In This Together PAC, we’re backing leaders who show up, do the work, and never forget who they were elected to serve. Nellie Pou has proven time and again that hard work, fairness, and common sense can still win, no matter which political party you belong to. Now, it’s up to us to ensure she has the resources to compete from now to Election Day. **[Will you split a donation between In This Together and Nellie Pou so we can continue to elect for-the-people leaders in Congress and nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868119/565195637/-45196619?refcode=250823_ab_beshear_l2&ms=250823_ab_beshear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3OTAzNjctNDU4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3Xbo5XhGDtPfQg340XfK3UL6WZjhD-bXn1nWi5baK4=)** [Split a donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868120/565195638/-45196619?refcode=250823_ab_beshear_b1&ms=250823_ab_beshear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3OTAzNjctNDU4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3Xbo5XhGDtPfQg340XfK3UL6WZjhD-bXn1nWi5baK4=) Thank you, Gov. Andy Beshear Founder of In This Together PAC
| | |
---|---|---

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868121/565195639/-3691057?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=3e790367-4580-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=250823_ab_beshear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3OTAzNjctNDU4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3Xbo5XhGDtPfQg340XfK3UL6WZjhD-bXn1nWi5baK4=) | [Give Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868122/565195640/-3691057?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=3e790367-4580-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=250823_ab_beshear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3OTAzNjctNDU4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V3Xbo5XhGDtPfQg340XfK3UL6WZjhD-bXn1nWi5baK4=)

name: Andrea Salinas HQ
subject: stunts like this is why we need oversight:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
The corruption coming out of the White House has no end — and it’s Americans who are paying the price.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868126/565195754/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDk1MmJhZC00NTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFjTbEYY_KdNjmn1Uv1ZiQPnSjVy6fSCWnmQoApqpsA=) Team, it seems like the stream of corruption coming out of the White House has no end — and it’s Americans who are paying the price: Donald Trump personally accepted a luxury plane as a direct gift from the Qatari royal family — and now taxpayers are footing the $1 BILLION dollar bill to upgrade the plane to replace Air Force One. # [Decorated, Disabled American Veteran in ICE Custody.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=171753304&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUzMzA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5NzA0NjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2MjQ2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zZTGPfYPW-xA0tKtShKoSqFGJFpyRvKbG--Le5W5VmI)
### A decorated, disabled American veteran and pillar of the community with 25+ years in the US, has been torn from his wife and our two small children.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Aug 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=171753304&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUzMzA0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTk3MDQ2NywiZXhwIjoxNzU4NTYyNDY3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VXOFNDVfMWxQiHHzOlhsGc_Cqn9u7J88IpK-mX_qT4k&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=171753304&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUzMzA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5NzA0NjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2MjQ2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zZTGPfYPW-xA0tKtShKoSqFGJFpyRvKbG--Le5W5VmI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/my-husband-has-been-abducted-by-ice?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
On the morning of Thursday, August 21st, my husband Zahid Chaudhry was taken into custody by ICE at his naturalization interview.
The Acting Director of the ICE Seattle Field Office, and USCIS Tukwila Director Jonathan Weeks, refused to my face to answer why he was detained.
He is currently imprisoned at the Northwest Detention Center. As of when I spoke with him briefly on Friday morning, he is being kept alone, without accommodations for his disability, without proper medical care, and almost completely without communication.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.uY3kGQQ0FPZisI7dT2ud7UYq4kTyBLHNoX_kvj8iUnw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171753304)
For those who don't know him, my husband is an Honorable, Decorated, Disabled US Military veteran, who uses a wheelchair due to his service-connected injuries. He has been a peaceful resident of the United States for over 25 years and is a pillar of our communities. Since his injuries - which doctors believed he'd die from by 2009 - he has dedicated himself fiercely and with great joy to serving the most vulnerable in our communities.
He has counseled and housed suicidal veterans, and abused women and their children. He has prevented evictions and founded (and served on the Boards of) nonprofits dedicated to affordable housing -- as well as those committed to environmental conservation, disability rights, and advocating for communities of color. He served as a handpicked advisor to Governor Inslee, on the Governor's Commission on Disability and Unemployment. He fills the room with his beaming smile, fierce love, and brilliant mind wherever he goes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/61864b0b-b59a-4d86-a7f8-05c699158379?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The moment after we found out.
Yes, I'm torn up inside. But I'm also calm. For faith like Zahid's, that housed suicidal veterans, counseled abused wives and children, rescued and tended land and structures that everyone thought were worthless - that faith in the goodness of whatever is before you, no matter how damaged or broken - that faith is what this world needs us to bring. That faith, is what repairs the wounds of genocide and atrocity. That faith, is what makes humanity whole.
We are working tirelessly to secure his release, and return him to our family. Please spread the word.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a2e88a3d-0d4a-446b-9b0c-f25187483fc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A family photo from June 2025
In this immensely difficult time, you can take the following actions to help our family:
* ✍️ **Draft a letter** calling for his release under bond. Email it to me at chaudhry4congress@gmail.com.
* Letters should emphasize the irreversible trauma to his kids of not having their father, his longstanding peaceful permanent residence and ties to the community (Eg, not a flight risk) and that having him safe with his family is no threat to national security.
* 🚀 Email your elected officials. Here is a _very strong_ [draft](https://substack.com/redirect/6703c3df-d619-47f9-95de-d3a28fbf5e1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* ✅ [Sign the petition](https://substack.com/redirect/3be1b2a5-d8f7-45bb-9043-7184b334af87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for his release.
* 💙 [Chip in](https://substack.com/redirect/a6add19c-aad7-4827-8f56-e0ff57c6e4a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to support the fight to bring him home
* 📣 Share widely with your networks so more voices can join us.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=171753304&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzUzMzA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5NzA0NjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2MjQ2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zZTGPfYPW-xA0tKtShKoSqFGJFpyRvKbG--Le5W5VmI)
More background on Zahid's journey can be found [here](https://substack.com/redirect/a993cb9a-bc75-4170-8e8a-49eca046d154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
FAQ:
* We have several conversations ongoing for legal support. More are welcome.
* Press can contact me at 206-271-2240.
* My parents are currently staying with us, so we have family/household/childcare support and are covered there for the moment.

Thank you to everyone who has already offered your support. It means the world.
You can also support us by becoming a paid subscriber. That also, means the world. Thank you.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.uY3kGQQ0FPZisI7dT2ud7UYq4kTyBLHNoX_kvj8iUnw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171753304)
==
"ICE has stolen a beloved husband, a fiercely tender father, and a passionately patriotic American. We are all the poorer for it. My family will suffer every day he is apart from us. Our two little children will cry from confusion over where their 'baba' has gone. And the fact that my husband's body was broken in service to protecting and defending the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic? That's been tossed aside like rubbish.
Zahid always stood up for the underdog. He always fought for the goodness of our communities. We who know that liberty and justice for all must mean ALL - we know Zahid as the hero we all need.
My family is suffering. My soul is shredded. The anchor of my life has been taken from me, with no warning, no explanation, and no mercy. And I have no idea when I'll see him again.
In the truest spirit of Islam, Zahid has always stood for uplifting humanity. For doing good. For believing the best of people, and striving for peace. He came to this interview in good faith, even despite decades of evidence that they would lie, cheat, and trick to get their way. ICE must release this decorated, disabled American veteran - return the heart of my family - and show the world that America still stands for justice and peace. "

A decorated, disabled American veteran and pillar of the community with 25+ years in the US, has been torn from his wife and our two small children. | | | Aug 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, On the morning of Thursday, August 21st, my husband Zahid Chaudhry was taken into custody by ICE at his naturalization interview. The Acting Director of the ICE Seattle Field Office, and USCIS Tukwila Director Jonathan Weeks, refused to my face to answer why he was detained. He is currently imprisoned at the Northwest Detention Center. As of when I spoke with him briefly on Friday morning, he is being kept alone, without accommodations for his disability, without proper medical care, and almost completely without communication. For those who don't know him, my husband is an Honorable, Decorated, Disabled US Military veteran, who uses a wheelchair due to his service-connected injuries. He has been a peaceful resident of the United States for over 25 years and is a pillar of our communities. Since his injuries - which doctors believed he'd die from by 2009 - he has dedicated himself fiercely and with great joy to serving the most vulnerable in our communities. He has counseled and housed suicidal veterans, and abused women and their children. He has prevented evictions and founded (and served on the Boards of) nonprofits dedicated to affordable housing -- as well as those committed to environmental conservation, disability rights, and advocating for communities of color. He served as a handpicked advisor to Governor Inslee, on the Governor's Commission on Disability and Unemployment. He fills the room with his beaming smile, fierce love, and brilliant mind wherever he goes. | | ---|---|--- The moment after we found out. Yes, I'm torn up inside. But I'm also calm. For faith like Zahid's, that housed suicidal veterans, counseled abused wives and children, rescued and tended land and structures that everyone thought were worthless - that faith in the goodness of whatever is before you, no matter how damaged or broken - that faith is what this world needs us to bring. That faith, is what repairs the wounds of genocide and atrocity. That faith, is what makes humanity whole. We are working tirelessly to secure his release, and return him to our family. clean_body: , I'm writing to you today as a big supporter of Winsome Earle-Sears. As the current Lt. Governor of Virginia, Winsome 's story has already inspired kids of all races from all backgrounds. But now, her race for Governor is TIED, and she urgently needs our help to take the lead. As a conservative Christian, I know that Winsome shares our values and will fight tirelessly to protect our families and our freedoms. But despite her impressive record, she's getting outraised MASSIVELY on the fundraising front by her liberal opponent. That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Winsome today. We're not just fighting for bragging rights - we're on a mission to lift families up and create a better future for our kids. But we can't do it without your help. Winsome is up against a MAJOR deadline, and she needs your urgent support to stay competitive. opponent is doubling her fundraising numbers thanks to wealthy megadonors like George Soros. If we don't act now, we risk losing the fight for the values that make our country great. But with your help, I know we can make a difference and elect a true conservative champion like Winsome Earle-Sears. Sincerely,. Sarah Huckabee Sanders . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. The Admin’s so-called One Big Beautiful Bill Act is anything but beautiful for the people of Santa Cruz. This law will slash over $1 trillion from Medicaid, gut critical funding for the Affordable Care Act, and leave tens of thousands in our community without coverage.

**Here’s what that means on the ground:** local clinics forced to cut services, rural hospitals struggling to keep their doors open, longer ER wait times, and families skipping care because they can’t afford it. These are the immediate, devastating consequences of a bill designed to favor billionaires and corporations at the expense of working families.

OBBBA is a direct attack on decades of progress we’ve made to expand access to health care and strengthen community clinics that serve people who have nowhere else to turn. **_It’s reckless, and it’s wrong._**

[Will you step up and chip in $10 today to help us protect health care in Santa Cruz and across California’s Central Coast?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868530/565197125/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250823_FR_BBBcuts_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTM0ODRiNC00ODgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygfIlEZzRY6J4P3DdgaVD6ION6KavWGC7GY1Rcb0SxY=) | [HELP US DEFEND HEALTHCARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868531/565197126/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250823_FR_BBBcuts_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTM0ODRiNC00ODgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygfIlEZzRY6J4P3DdgaVD6ION6KavWGC7GY1Rcb0SxY=)

Team, There are nine "Johns" in the Senate right now. There have only been five Black women — _**ever**_. While I’m proud to be among the short list of Black women who have been elected to the Senate, I’m sad that — almost _**250 years**_ into our nation’s history — that number is still so low. **Having people in the Senate who look like the rest of America matters. ** It's how resolutions like Black Women's Equal Pay Day, which my sister Senator Angela Alsobrooks and I introduced, get passed. name: =?utf-8?B?U2hhd24gKEVyaWMgU29yZW5zZW7igJlzIHBhcnRuZXIp?=
subject: SCOTUS is legislating from the bench again
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868643/565197528/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868644/565197529/896231865?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=) Hi Peter - It’s Shawn, Eric’s partner. I want to thank you for the power you have brought to Eric to the campaign. Your energy is what gives us the courage and the strength to keep going, even in the most challenging times. And right now, the Supreme Court has ensured it’s a challenging moment for anyone who simply wants the freedom to love who they do. **Eric has previously said that SCOTUS was “legislating from the bench.” With cases like the challenge to Obergefell being accepted, he’s not exactly wrong.** Emboldened by their supermajority, and driven by the whims of the White House, the right-wing of the court is creating a new landscape of laws, rather than interpreting existing ones as the Constitution requires – and so many of these cases seem to involve rolling back hard-fought rights to simply be treated as any other human. Love shouldn’t ever be political. But it’s a fact that for many powerful people, targeting vulnerable communities is how they can display false strength while allowing the well-being of those they’re supposed to serve to rot. **But that’s not who _we_ are, or what our household is about. Even in this moment, now is the time to lead with the acceptance, tolerance, and love that everyone deserves.** I know Eric’s love for our place in the world and his decades of putting our neighbors well-being first. And he’s so grateful to be an example of hope and progress for thousands of IL-17 residents, and millions of others nationwide. **It’s another reminder that we don’t fight hate with more hate. We fight it with visibility.** I'm reminded why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with purpose, a moral vision, and empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting those under attack, who feel scared and alone right now. [**A blue Congress next cycle with more LGBTQ allies would go a long way toward checking the Supreme Court’s power. And the first step toward flipping the House blue is defending key swing districts like IL-17, and important voices like Eric. Please contribute to his campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868645/565197530/896231865?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868646/565197531/896231865?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=)
---
Thank you for the power you have brought to Eric and myself. Your energy is what gives us the courage and the strength to keep going, even in the most challenging times.
Shawn
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868647/565197532/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=&emci=bfbea1fa-4880-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2fa4b400-4980-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868648/565197533/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=&emci=bfbea1fa-4880-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2fa4b400-4980-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868649/565197534/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=&emci=bfbea1fa-4880-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2fa4b400-4980-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113868650/565197535/896231865?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0YjQwMC00OTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDtO4LbGO5aWtqoT3OmVBpGwGwHwzHfAQihfC4KtCEw=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://act.ericforillinois.com/p/uulxx7KmPEOHzSyNB6xzow2?unsubscribedata=DRvr4v8e2%2B2cG%2FEufneUxrZNhKu0bnDb%2BTAvK5DwKIOL9LSg45HdEmVPB%2BeziD47tg76XVxbpzrASM99hkA2OAlsy5OPUfNaAgRHEctinZMvhAiIPVOUouTUTWg4YToS3eTO1CGCJboM9rhTJMiiQOXr5o%2FwY%2BZoelb6GuUTTVdZWPNA%2FbvWpamRXwiyRTiIZJ9%2B2f1lEr6UBuQbCxGwkvq1Jk973hgVCAMOZ%2F04Iy8rWDScxPtiaBLma%2FY1IXrolJxrjMEUCD%2Fc6VoeQklC7Sdob7XsgsIKOodtMKsbYeiEYB8BPlsfaQ%2BEjNNAd8SXWcA7ZByU1zoGQCmRjdGF3XLBfGa%2BCasUL0UDtOV3DWMrL7QgIA1hM3a7obiD1EFMzssqerLxWgAHzlbkRjw%2FpMdzyeMnKHGRQYrBWMUg09lk9bTYalkr6dhA0tzA%2FKhn). Love shouldn’t ever be political. But it’s a fact that for many powerful people, targeting vulnerable communities is how they can display false strength while allowing the well-being of those they’re supposed to serve to rot. But that’s not who we are, or what our household is about. Even in this moment, now is the time to lead with the acceptance, tolerance, and love that everyone deserves. I know Eric’s love for our place in the world and his decades of putting our neighbors well-being first. And he’s so grateful to be an example of hope and progress for thousands of IL-17 residents, and millions of others nationwide. It’s another reminder that we don’t fight hate with more hate. We fight it with visibility. I'm reminded why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with purpose, a moral vision, and empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting those under attack, who feel scared and alone right now. = | = Thank you for the power you have brought to Eric and myself. Your energy is what gives us the courage and the strength to keep going, even in the most challenging times. Shawn | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend,

This is a quick email, I promise.

It doesn't take much to make a difference in our race.

I'm going to work every day to deliver lower costs, good-paying jobs, and major investments in Northwest Ohio.

That work is powered by our community of grassroots donors, chipping in whatever they can spare to help defend our battleground district.

Will you chip in $9 to help us keep building a better OH-09? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?amount=9&refcode=250823_mk_9_l1]

Chip in [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250823_mk_9_b1]Thank you so much, friend.

— Marcy

Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Mary Peltola
subject: Let’s bring common sense back to Washington
body:
Will you join me in supporting the Blue Dogs? | | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113868709/565197797/-1069604841?&refcode=E14869-20250823-MaryPeltola-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjY2EzMzg5LTQ5ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=htT3b77091RtXRCF5tCktSP5b3CgVMfZsMA0POhjsKU=)** Peter, I hope this message finds you well. When I served in Congress, I always said I was _pro-fish, pro-family, and pro-freedom._ Those are the same values the Blue Dogs champion every day. **Blue Dogs are Democrats like me who put community, country, and results first.** We’re the normal ones who actually want to get things done. I think we need more people like us and less weirdo extremists in Congress. [_**That’s why I’m proud to be supporting the Blue Dogs this year and I hope you will join me by making a donation today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113868710/565197798/-1069604841?&refcode=E14869-20250823-MaryPeltola-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjY2EzMzg5LTQ5ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=htT3b77091RtXRCF5tCktSP5b3CgVMfZsMA0POhjsKU=) [DONATE NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113868711/565197799/-1069604841?&refcode=E14869-20250823-MaryPeltola-SB-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjY2EzMzg5LTQ5ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=htT3b77091RtXRCF5tCktSP5b3CgVMfZsMA0POhjsKU=) In 2022, we did something many people believed couldn’t be done: we flipped Alaska’s at-large House seat and made history together. **It was the first time a Democrat held the seat in nearly 50 years, and the first time an Alaska Native woman ever represented the state of Alaska in Congress. That victory wasn’t just mine — it belonged to all of us.** The Blue Dogs supported me when outside special interests spent millions of dollars against me last cycle. But now they’re coming for my friends too. We need to protect these seats and flip at least three more if we’re going to win back the Speaker’s gavel in 2026 and bring real leadership back to Congress. [_**So I’m asking you to join me in supporting the Blue Dogs today so we can take back the House and get Congress working for the people it’s meant to serve.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113868712/565197800/-1069604841?&refcode=E14869-20250823-MaryPeltola-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjY2EzMzg5LTQ5ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=htT3b77091RtXRCF5tCktSP5b3CgVMfZsMA0POhjsKU=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113868713/565197801/-1069604841?express_lane=true&&refcode=E14869-20250823-MaryPeltola-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjY2EzMzg5LTQ5ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=htT3b77091RtXRCF5tCktSP5b3CgVMfZsMA0POhjsKU=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113868714/565197802/-1069604841?express_lane=true&&refcode=E14869-20250823-MaryPeltola-EG-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjY2EzMzg5LTQ5ODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=htT3b77091RtXRCF5tCktSP5b3CgVMfZsMA0POhjsKU=)

clean_body: Will you join me in supporting the Blue Dogs? | | = Peter, I hope this message finds you well. When I served in Congress, I always said I was pro-fish, pro-family, and pro-freedom. Those are the same values the Blue Dogs champion every day. Blue Dogs are Democrats like me who put community, country, and results first. We’re the normal ones who actually want to get things done. I think we need more people like us and less weirdo extremists in Congress. = = In 2022, we did something many people believed couldn’t be done: we flipped Alaska’s at-large House seat and made history together. It was the first time a Democrat held the seat in nearly 50 years, and the first time an Alaska Native woman ever represented the state of Alaska in Congress. That victory wasn’t just mine — it belonged to all of us. The Blue Dogs supported me when outside special interests spent millions of dollars against me last cycle. But now they’re coming for my friends too. We need to protect these seats and flip at least three more if we’re going to win back the Speaker’s gavel in 2026 and bring real leadership back to Congress. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- In solidarity, Mary Peltola Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: My Statement on the Passage of the New Congressional Map
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Texas Republicans have passed a new law redrawing Texas’ Congressional districts, ignoring the thousands of Texans who attended hearings and registered their opposition to doing so and instead following the orders of President Trump to draw more seats designed to elect Republicans to Congress.
This unusual mid-decade redistricting effort and the resulting map is an affront to Texans in product, process, and principle. The map intentionally dilutes the voting strength of minority communities across Texas and betrays the principle that all Texans should have the ability to have a say in our government.
I will continue to fight for fair maps for Texans and all Americans in all the ways I can – in Congress, in the courts, and in the community. I remain committed to serving the people in Texas’ Seventh Congressional District, and ensuring that their voices are heard, now and in the future. I look forward to demonstrating my commitment to all of them in the months ahead and to continuing to give those who live in our community the representation they deserve in the Congress of the United States.
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

subject: The phone call did happen…

body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Friend,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_
---
If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?
---
As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a _solemn pledge_ to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power.
---
_That’s _my_ pledge. Now I’m entrusting _you_ with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America._

clean_body: The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call. | Friend, Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property. Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself. Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away. In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani. Why? Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama. You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone... ...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama? If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you? As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a solemn pledge to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power. That’s my pledge. Now I’m entrusting you with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Wes Moore
subject: What will get us through this
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=500%2E1086043%2En1EYwH ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=500%2E1086043%2En1EYwH ]Wes Moore for Governor

We are in a moment of danger and uncertainty,
Peter.

Thanks to the Trump administration, we’re facing major challenges in
Maryland. Unemployment is up, people are losing their health coverage, and
Maryland is expected to lose over billions in federal funding. It doesn’t
get much worse than this.

The thing is, Maryland
didn’t elect us to serve in easy times.
Maryland elected us to
lead, no matter the peril.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250824-1?refcode=em-20250824-1&refcode2=500_1086043_n1EYwH&akid=500%2E1086043%2En1EYwH ]Peter,
together, we have to confront crisis with
courage.

If anyone understands this, it’s people like you — the folks who step up
when times get tough.

Together, we are going to get through this, by leaning on steady
leadership.

Leadership rooted in the fact that we need each other.

Leadership tempered by the knowledge that pain in any part of
Maryland affects
every part of the state.

Leadership grounded in the conviction that we must move fast — and act
with the kind of urgency that proves to Marylanders we understand the
mission we face.

Today, I’m asking for your help to continue that mission. By being part of
this team, you’re helping us confront the challenge and build a stronger
Maryland.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250824-1?refcode=em-20250824-1&refcode2=500_1086043_n1EYwH&akid=500%2E1086043%2En1EYwH ]Peter, my
team and I are acting with great urgency to fight against the actions of
the Trump administration. Will you pitch in $5 today to
help fuel the fight?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250824-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250824-1&refcode2=500_1086043_n1EYwH&akid=500%2E1086043%2En1EYwH ]Donate $5 ››

Elevate,

Wes

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250824-1?refcode=em-20250824-1&refcode2=500_1086043_n1EYwH&akid=500%2E1086043%2En1EYwH ]Wes

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
