name: Professor Randy Villegas
subject: An honor I’m humbled to receive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress [#]
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/Villegas%20Logo.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a]

Hi there,

I wanted to share something I’m deeply honored by.

Earlier this week, I received the American Political Science Association’s 2025 Community College Faculty Award. It’s given each year to a faculty member who goes above and beyond for community colleges, and I’m grateful to be recognized alongside so many amazing educators.

This award recognizes my efforts to connect classrooms with communities: organizing Know Your Rights forums, bringing in leaders like Jim Costa and Dolores Huerta to speak, volunteering as a drumline instructor for local students, and developing educational resources on immigration politics.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a] Randy Villegas Receives the
2025 APSA Community College Faculty Award

For me, teaching has always been about more than lectures and textbooks. It’s about empowering people with the knowledge, tools, and confidence to create change – whether in the halls of government, at a school board meeting, or right here in our neighborhoods.

This recognition isn’t just about me. It’s about the students who inspire me every day, the families who show up for each other, and the Central Valley community that raised me and keeps me grounded in this fight.

I’m running for Congress to bring that same commitment to representation, fairness, and opportunity to Washington – because our communities deserve a voice that’s truly ours.

Thank you for being part of this journey,

Professor Randy Villegas

👋🏻 Before you go: In a race like ours, the other side has corporate PACs and billionaire donors, but we have something stronger: people.
Every dollar we raise comes from folks here in the Valley and across the country who believe in a campaign powered by neighbors, farmworkers, teachers, and small business owners
If you can, chip in today to help us reach more voters, share our vision, and flip CA-22 for working families. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a]
Donate $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?amount=&refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a] Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q3-2025?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a]
https://www.facebook.com/VillegasforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/VillegasforCongress] https://www.instagram.com/villegasforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/villegasforcongress/] https://x.com/Villegas_CA22 [https://x.com/Villegas_CA22][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/unnamed-2.png]With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign consider making a grassroots contribution here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvc-web-2025?refcode=em-footer]

name: George Whitesides HQ
subject: [sample question] What issues are most important to you right now?
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869473/565200350/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=)
Peter,

While the House may still be in recess, our commitment to delivering results for CA-27 will never slow down. That’s why earlier this month, George reached out with our August survey to hear from folks exactly what concerns them most about the recent chaos in Washington.

We received a lot of feedback from people who are wary of the fallout from the Big Ugly Bill, the rising cost of living due to needless tariffs, and more – **[but according to our records, we have yet to receive a response from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869475/565200353/1452619822?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=&emci=838d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c8d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)**

_What issues are most important to you right now?_
⚪ Cost of living
⚪ Attacks on our democracy
⚪ Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid
⚪ Reproductive rights
⚪ Climate change
⚪ Gun safety
⚪ Infrastructure
⚪ Immigration
⚪ LGBTQ+ rights
⚪ Other – click **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869477/565200357/1452619822?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=&emci=838d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c8d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)** to respond
| ****[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869479/565200359/1452619822?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=&emci=838d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c8d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)****
---

George has spent the last several months in Congress going to bat for the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys.

It hasn’t come without its challenges. While George is committed to doing right by the people of this district, the GOP majority is putting their ultra-wealthy donors first. And now, Republicans in Texas are bowing to the MAGA agenda and redrawing Congressional lines to keep their grip on power.

George believes we should be focused on lowering costs and creating an economy that works for everyone – not meddling in elections for power’s sake.

**[That’s why today, we need to hear your thoughts. Will you take a minute to complete our August survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869481/565200361/1452619822?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=&emci=838d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c8d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)**
****[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869483/565200363/1452619822?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=&emci=838d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8c8d5e32-4b80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)****
---

Thank you,

Team Whitesides

Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. [Chip in to George's campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869488/565200370/-1384072709?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhkNWUzMi00YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1H152fsS081iWT3GXjWMxq2f9j6AOrpvlac0w-3bmc=)

**The Benefits of a Primary**
In Case You Missed it - The Municipal Elections for Connecticut and Many Other States are happening this November and even Governor races like in New Jersey.
More attention is given to municipals as this is the real battle for local control and to keep your town charm. With extensive pressure from Hartford and a one-party rule of the state, town government is the last chance for attempting meaningful consensus and community buy in.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..kufsDiWZ7n6ReJMOuGMObQuJcyqm5iUJg9jGHaE8Oo4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171747005)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=171747005&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzQ3MDA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5NzI1NTAsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU2NDU1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tC2bzoZRRbds2MGOWD7YEWFeS8IxK39aK3sB8JOATJo)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/971063b3-4e67-4191-8fc1-1c0368f7d888?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Marek Studzinski](https://substack.com/redirect/7eb16038-8257-4e7c-8e6d-e21bbec4b529?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/8c945655-a88d-4ac9-a267-375f9bf6e75d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What Is A Primary - and Why Should We Believe in Them?**
For Most Republicans and Democrats, they are unaware of our electoral process for local, state and federal candidates. The ballot is typically the result of a few engaged members in a Republican or Democrat Town Committee Members. Each year a closed caucus of RTC or DTC Members or an open caucus (open to only Democrats or Republican) is held and slates are filed.
For the closed caucus, these candidates are determined by less than 100 (on the high side) engaged and elected RTC or DTC members. For an open caucus, they are open to the registered republicans or democrat and is determined by how many supporters a candidate can bring to the caucus.
For those who are not on the slate, they can petition to get on the ballot.
**Earlier this month you may have seen people with clipboards asking you for a signature.**
This is the petition process and grass roots at its finest. For Starters, anyone willing to go up to a complete stranger to advocate to run for an office should be heard. **WE STRONGLY ENCOURAGE YOU TO GIVE THEM A MOMENT OF YOUR TIME - THE FUTURE OF YOUR LOCAL, STATE AND FEDERAL GOVERNMENT COULD POTENTIALLY BE IN YOUR HANDS.**
In this charged political environment, it is a sign of strength to approach a stranger (who is likely to be not of the same political party) to ask them of their political affiliation. It can result in a healthy dialogue or a nasty engagement filled with vitriol and hatred.
Primaries serve as a way for voters to select their party's candidate for a general election and determine if the will of the people is in line with the select few who are eligible to participate in a caucus. The arguments for and against them, are often debated within political parties.
**What are the Pros?**
Supporters of primaries like us argue that **WHEN DONE RIGHT** , they can:
\- Energize the party base,
\- Increase voter engagement,
\- Provide an opportunity for lesser-known candidates to gain name recognition; and
\- Build a grassroots campaign in advance of a general election.
Most campaigns for municipals are really a late August - November season. A primary can get the teams motivated a little earlier. Regardless of which side a volunteer supports when they canvass and knock on doors and go to events, they bring attention to the primary and inform the voters (most of whom are unaware) that there is a General Election in November.
_**It is scary to think that we encountered citizens that were unaware of the 2024 Elections but it 's a symptom of the belief that the general public has no belief that their votes matters and they cannot make a difference.**_
Another major pro is that if the candidate and their team are enthusiastic and their message is persuasive, they can actually convince an unaffiliated voter who leans conservative or liberal to actually become a Registered Democrat or Republican.
**Here in Connecticut, unaffiliated voters outweigh Registered Republicans or Registered Democrats.**
At one point, the Republican Party allowed unaffiliated voters to vote in a Republican primary from1984 until a convention repealed the rule on September 7, 1991 for Congressional Primaries.
_**The process of gathering signatures and campaigning directly to voters can be seen as a test of a candidate's mettle and a way to build a strong foundation for the general election. It breeds excitement, especially when there are significant controversial issues at stake.**_
**What are the Cons?**
On the other hand, some political strategists and party leaders believe that a prolonged primary battle can be detrimental. They argue that it can drain financial resources, create internal divisions, and force candidates to take more extreme positions to appeal to their party's base, which might make them less electable in the general election.
The other concern is that voters at a primary are the extreme conservatives (if Republican) and extreme liberals (if Democrats) and the candidate who wins might have less general voter appeal to the general public - _**This is not the case when a primary is done right and the candidates get to all voters.**_
_**The other major argument against is that**_ a well-funded party can focus its efforts on the general election opponent from the start and this is a distraction.
_**Ultimately, the effectiveness of primaries can vary depending on the specific race, the candidates involved, and the political climate. There is no single answer to whether they are a net positive or negative for a political party.**_
_**As there are primaries going on, we strongly encourage you to check with your town to see if there are ones going on.**_
_We will inform you of a few primaries we are aware of. But local primary candidates should be reaching out to you and asking for your vote._

| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. # Saturday, August 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** We've got a quick note today from one of our sponsors, [Dr. Steven Gundry MD](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFugzAUheGnMVuQfW0wHjxUiujQJkOXjAjsC7hxMDI3oX37Kh36BN3_8w3ncupOfYhhmc79DS2NqfPog-sJfbfgvkUkwtxRWn1ylDLNYfP9MmFO943SVwccqgNvDiC79h7j8W8tCm9HREBZoBW6qoyGWslitgDGDVL0yhjh0DUVH3rVVAJRj3IYdBHsU-UNSNEIrqB0xqhKK9_wYTRjrZji6AOlXH6msNCMY_xOD8ylS7ci2plo3Zh8YdAyaPd9L-frikT5ukzPhEH78arP5yODVr5fKvN2eqay3e6DYPJYa9UU2fp1DzGGrdZM8enWh_jr0z_f9LDwEwAA__9GGoGr), who warns that certain "health foods" may cause leaky gut and related health issues, but reveals in his free video which foods to avoid to restore energy, lose weight, and improve overall well-being. Thank you for your ongoing support of our sponsors which in turn helps support our mission at _The Flyover_. -- Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFugzAUheGnMVuQfW0wHjxUiujQJkOXjAjsC7hxMDI3oX37Kh36BN3_8w3ncupOfYhhmc79DS2NqfPog-sJfbfgvkUkwtxRWn1ylDLNYfP9MmFO943SVwccqgNvDiC79h7j8W8tCm9HREBZoBW6qoyGWslitgDGDVL0yhjh0DUVH3rVVAJRj3IYdBHsU-UNSNEIrqB0xqhKK9_wYTRjrZji6AOlXH6msNCMY_xOD8ylS7ci2plo3Zh8YdAyaPd9L-frikT5ukzPhEH78arP5yODVr5fKvN2eqay3e6DYPJYa9UU2fp1DzGGrdZM8enWh_jr0z_f9LDwEwAA__9GGoGr) We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. [ **Click here to watch the presentation:** ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFugzAUheGnMVuQfW0wHjxUiujQJkOXjAjsC7hxMDI3oX37Kh36BN3_8w3ncupOfYhhmc79DS2NqfPog-sJfbfgvkUkwtxRWn1ylDLNYfP9MmFO943SVwccqgNvDiC79h7j8W8tCm9HREBZoBW6qoyGWslitgDGDVL0yhjh0DUVH3rVVAJRj3IYdBHsU-UNSNEIrqB0xqhKK9_wYTRjrZji6AOlXH6msNCMY_xOD8ylS7ci2plo3Zh8YdAyaPd9L-frikT5ukzPhEH78arP5yODVr5fKvN2eqay3e6DYPJYa9UU2fp1DzGGrdZM8enWh_jr0z_f9LDwEwAA__9GGoGr) [
](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFugzAUheGnMVuQfW0wHjxUiujQJkOXjAjsC7hxMDI3oX37Kh36BN3_8w3ncupOfYhhmc79DS2NqfPog-sJfbfgvkUkwtxRWn1ylDLNYfP9MmFO943SVwccqgNvDiC79h7j8W8tCm9HREBZoBW6qoyGWslitgDGDVL0yhjh0DUVH3rVVAJRj3IYdBHsU-UNSNEIrqB0xqhKK9_wYTRjrZji6AOlXH6msNCMY_xOD8ylS7ci2plo3Zh8YdAyaPd9L-frikT5ukzPhEH78arP5yODVr5fKvN2eqay3e6DYPJYa9UU2fp1DzGGrdZM8enWh_jr0z_f9LDwEwAA__9GGoGr)[**Watch The Video** ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFugzAUheGnMVuQfW0wHjxUiujQJkOXjAjsC7hxMDI3oX37Kh36BN3_8w3ncupOfYhhmc79DS2NqfPog-sJfbfgvkUkwtxRWn1ylDLNYfP9MmFO943SVwccqgNvDiC79h7j8W8tCm9HREBZoBW6qoyGWslitgDGDVL0yhjh0DUVH3rVVAJRj3IYdBHsU-UNSNEIrqB0xqhKK9_wYTRjrZji6AOlXH6msNCMY_xOD8ylS7ci2plo3Zh8YdAyaPd9L-frikT5ukzPhEH78arP5yODVr5fKvN2eqay3e6DYPJYa9UU2fp1DzGGrdZM8enWh_jr0z_f9LDwEwAA__9GGoGr) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." clean_body: | | | | | | Saturday, August 23, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! We've got a quick note today from one of our sponsors, , who warns that certain "health foods" may cause leaky gut and related health issues, but reveals in his free video which foods to avoid to restore energy, lose weight, and improve overall well-being. Thank you for your ongoing support of our sponsors which in turn helps support our mission at The Flyover. -- Cole, CEO We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called " health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline. " This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body." Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems. Dr. Gundry explains, "These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal." The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home.** "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

Hey Peter, it’s Jon. _This just in:_ A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive **_$5 million_** ad buy attacking me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869824/565201561/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_082325_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVhZTcxNi00ZDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSpoCKXtLxqW7welvf9clvoS7rvhoQMZdtEpaZ2bfJA=) If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd_dpg_em_ossoff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869827/565201575/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_082325_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVhZTcxNi00ZDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSpoCKXtLxqW7welvf9clvoS7rvhoQMZdtEpaZ2bfJA=) Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._ With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid, and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone. [So please, split a donation of $10 — or whatever you are in a place to give — between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869831/565201580/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_082325_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVhZTcxNi00ZDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSpoCKXtLxqW7welvf9clvoS7rvhoQMZdtEpaZ2bfJA=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869836/565201581/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_082325_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVhZTcxNi00ZDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nSpoCKXtLxqW7welvf9clvoS7rvhoQMZdtEpaZ2bfJA=)**

Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you — for everything.
— Jon

What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid, and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Completing the voter verification process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I’m making a personal request...
| **__A Personal Request from the House GOP Leadership Chair, Rep. Elise Stefanik_ _**
---
Peter,
---
President Trump has expanded our Party’s electoral coalition like never before.
---
**We now have far more voters than the Democrats – but that total includes _MILLIONS_ of “less engaged” voters who don’t always turn out when President Trump isn’t on the ballot.**
---
Our path to victory in the midterms is simple: If every “likely” Republican voter shows up to cast a ballot, we’ll win in a landslide.
---
_But if we get complacent and our turnout dips, we’ll _LOSE_ our House Majority to radical, Far Left Democrats!_
---
**Given the new dynamics of our electoral coalition, the GOP’s official 2025 Voter Verification project has never been more critical.**
---
We need to know exactly who we can count on to show up and cast their ballot for Republicans in the midterms.
---
You see, every Republican voter we confirm as “VERIFIED” for the midterms is one less voter we need to spend time and money targeting between now and Election Day.
---
_That way, we can prioritize spending our limited financial resources to target the millions of less engaged “likely” Republican voters and focus on getting them to the polls._
---
**As House GOP Leadership Chair, it’s my duty to ensure our existing GOP voter file is _100% VERIFIED_ before the end of the year. **
---
And when I say “100% verified,” any old response isn’t enough...
---
I need to make sure that __every_ _single__ Republican voter we have on file has submitted a complete, up-to-date Voter Verification survey measuring their voter intensity and confirming their intention to vote for Republicans in the midterms.
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter...

clean_body: I’m making a personal request... | A Personal Request from the House GOP Leadership Chair, Rep. Elise Stefanik Peter, President Trump has expanded our Party’s electoral coalition like never before. We now have far more voters than the Democrats – but that total includes MILLIONS of “less engaged” voters who don’t always turn out when President Trump isn’t on the ballot. Our path to victory in the midterms is simple: If every “likely” Republican voter shows up to cast a ballot, we’ll win in a landslide. But if we get complacent and our turnout dips, we’ll LOSE our House Majority to radical, Far Left Democrats! Given the new dynamics of our electoral coalition, the GOP’s official 2025 Voter Verification project has never been more critical. We need to know exactly who we can count on to show up and cast their ballot for Republicans in the midterms. You see, every Republican voter we confirm as “VERIFIED” for the midterms is one less voter we need to spend time and money targeting between now and Election Day. That way, we can prioritize spending our limited financial resources to target the millions of less engaged “likely” Republican voters and focus on getting them to the polls. As House GOP Leadership Chair, it’s my duty to ensure our existing GOP voter file is 100% VERIFIED before the end of the year. And when I say “100% verified,” any old response isn’t enough... I need to make sure that every single Republican voter we have on file has submitted a complete, up-to-date Voter Verification survey measuring their voter intensity and confirming their intention to vote for Republicans in the midterms. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter... Official 2025 GOP Voter Verification Survey Scope: Measuring Voter Intensity Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey ID #: 175644-866 Submission time remaining: UNKNOWN Response Status: PENDING | Thank you, Rep. clean_body: What if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? | | | | | ---|--- With just three days until our next special election, is there anything we can say to convince you to What if we told you that on August 26th, Democrats in Georgia and Iowa are facing two key special elections to FLIP seats in Republican-held districts? What if we told you state legislators will have a role in drawing more than 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative districts – and that expanding Democratic majorities gives our party the power to protect our democracy? What if we told you that right-wing billionaires are pouring millions into state legislative races ahead of elections in New Jersey and Virginia – and that Democrats are relying on grassroots donations to counter their spending? And, what if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? We’re counting on grassroots supporters in your state and nationwide to get involved, take action in communities like your town, and chip in $50, $25, or even $7 ahead of our end-of-month deadline and before polls close in our next election. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: The Trump administration is still hiding things from us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
This is a slap in the face to Epstein’s victims and everyone who believes in accountability. |
---
Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw my email from last night. After dragging their feet and missing the House Oversight Committee’s subpoena deadline, the Trump administration turned over only 33,000 pages of the Epstein files. **But after careful review overnight, we now know that 97% of these documents were already public.** Not only were the documents they turned over incomplete, but less than _1,000_ of the 33,000 pages turned over to the Oversight Committee are new disclosures. On the same day, Trump’s Department of Justice released the interview between Epstein accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell — who is vying for a pardon from Donald Trump — and Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche to distract from their lack of transparency. It’s clear that the Trump administration is still hiding the truth from the American people. **Enough with the BS — we need full transparency now.** I was on _MSNBC_ and _CNN_ last night to discuss the Trump administration’s refusal to be transparent with the American people. Please read my message below, and if you can, **[pitch in to help me continue being a voice in the fight for accountability.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869893/565201675/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250823_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGFjNDgzOC00ZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nCv2Kdbzsbqq3g2BIic5lCnCChTVXpIgg9ycuosn0w=)** Thank you, Yassamin \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Yassamin Ansari
Date: Fri, Aug 22, 2025
Subject: We just received the first batch of the Epstein files Peter, **After Donald Trump missed the House Oversight Committee’s subpoena deadline to turn over the full Epstein files, we just received the first batch of documents.** I spoke with Antonia Hylton on _MSNBC’s The Beat_ about the Trump administration’s lack of transparency and what comes next. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, **[please make a contribution of any amount right now to help me continue speaking out against this corrupt administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869894/565201676/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250823_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGFjNDgzOC00ZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nCv2Kdbzsbqq3g2BIic5lCnCChTVXpIgg9ycuosn0w=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113869895/565201677/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250823_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGFjNDgzOC00ZTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nCv2Kdbzsbqq3g2BIic5lCnCChTVXpIgg9ycuosn0w=) _“The Trump administration is the most corrupt administration in American History ... Everything that they do is a distraction from something else.”_ The Trump Administration claims to be “the most transparent in history.” **But if Trump had nothing to hide and this was a “hoax,” as he called it, he'd release the files in full. No delays, no excuses.** Instead of giving the American people the transparency they deserve, the Trump administration is creating crisis after crisis to distract the American people — like deploying the National Guard in Washington, DC, to take the attention off of their own corruption. That’s why we have to hold their feet to the fire. As the review process of this first batch begins, I, along with my Democratic colleagues on the Oversight Committee, will assess these documents with a close eye and continue speaking out about the Trump administration’s refusal to release the full files. **[The American people deserve full accountability and transparency from this administration. clean_body: This is a slap in the face to Epstein’s victims and everyone who believes in accountability. | Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw my email from last night. After dragging their feet and missing the House Oversight Committee’s subpoena deadline, the Trump administration turned over only 33,000 pages of the Epstein files. But after careful review overnight, we now know that 97% of these documents were already public. Not only were the documents they turned over incomplete, but less than 1,000 of the 33,000 pages turned over to the Oversight Committee are new disclosures. On the same day, Trump’s Department of Justice released the interview between Epstein accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell — who is vying for a pardon from Donald Trump — and Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche to distract from their lack of transparency. It’s clear that the Trump administration is still hiding the truth from the American people. Enough with the BS — we need full transparency now. I was on MSNBC and CNN last night to discuss the Trump administration’s refusal to be transparent with the American people. Please read my message below, and if you can, = Thank you, Yassamin \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Yassamin Ansari Date: Fri, Aug 22, 2025 Subject: We just received the first batch of the Epstein files Peter, After Donald Trump missed the House Oversight Committee’s subpoena deadline to turn over the full Epstein files, we just received the first batch of documents. I spoke with Antonia Hylton on MSNBC’s The Beat about the Trump administration’s lack of transparency and what comes next. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, = = “The Trump administration is the most corrupt administration in American History ... Everything that they do is a distraction from something else.” The Trump Administration claims to be “the most transparent in history.” But if Trump had nothing to hide and this was a “hoax,” as he called it, he'd release the files in full. No delays, no excuses. Instead of giving the American people the transparency they deserve, the Trump administration is creating crisis after crisis to distract the American people — like deploying the National Guard in Washington, DC, to take the attention off of their own corruption. That’s why we have to hold their feet to the fire. As the review process of this first batch begins, I, along with my Democratic colleagues on the Oversight Committee, will assess these documents with a close eye and continue speaking out about the Trump administration’s refusal to release the full files. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books! Sincerely, Donald John Trump | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate authorized’s committee. . | | P.O. BOX 13570 ARLINGTON, VA 22219 Click here to change your subscription status.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Yet again — NC is the most consequential swing state on the map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friends — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years_. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made. **I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.** As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. [**I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton because right now is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $20 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870113/565202589/-1005672175?refcode=250823_MFC_Cooper_YetAgain&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjMxNDUyMS01MTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RtnB2-7iD8ubaNsv5nldul2k_1Sw8drn79qEdxhiPpA=) | | [**$18 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870114/565202590/426922545?amount=18&refcode=250823_MFC_Cooper_YetAgain&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjMxNDUyMS01MTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RtnB2-7iD8ubaNsv5nldul2k_1Sw8drn79qEdxhiPpA= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

name: Phil Izon
subject: Tom Begich wins Alaska’s Governor’s Race with 122,500 Votes, but how?
body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c%26ss_email_id%3D68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7%26ss_campaign_name%3DTom%2BBegich%2Bwins%2BAlaska%25E2%2580%2599s%2BGovernor%25E2%2580%2599s%2BRace%2Bwith%2B122%252C500%2BVotes%252C%2Bbut%2Bhow%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-23T18%253A50%253A04Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=D9k-dZaxu4GVIR-JqliReNJkSok%3D)

#### **Education Is Key, Learn Why Jungle Primary And Ranked Choice Voting Are Bad For Alaska And America.**
[https://tropictundra.com/governor](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FBJRA6sBsbW&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=-L4-GO82hCoMUiHo3IdLnV4Hbds%3D)
---
[_ _ Click Here To See The 2026 Alaska Governor’s Race So Far _ _](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fgovernor%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c%26ss_email_id%3D68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7%26ss_campaign_name%3DTom%2BBegich%2Bwins%2BAlaska%25E2%2580%2599s%2BGovernor%25E2%2580%2599s%2BRace%2Bwith%2B122%252C500%2BVotes%252C%2Bbut%2Bhow%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-23T18%253A50%253A04Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=YPBtWs48jig5rA_of0lIgRT6FrM%3D)
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
I built RCV Election Simulators, they’ve been picked up [@Stop_RCV](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FStop_RCV&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=O5YTZDT4p6zOMzReW43gFrb6v7s%3D) StopRCV, as well as [@A1Policy](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=RNxST0yVBplwsvMH5wSCD1gPyYs%3D) America First Policy Institute to educate people about RCV. Right here in Alaska, one man is trying to make a difference for the country, national groups are using my designs, ideas, videos, and content. Very humbled.StopRCV just made my election simulators live on their website. I built these custom for them.
---
#### **Check Out The Custom Simulators on StopRCV.com**
#### [**https://stoprcv.com/rcv-in-action**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FFs48fz7UWJ&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=vo60TynS9as8dkSi2F1zr933o5o%3D)
---
|
---
Our partners at Michigan Fair Elections Institute (MFEI) have released a of comprehensive fact based assessment on RCV: _[Ranked Choice Voting: A Threat to Our Electoral Process](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=GRslyHYrP_XPaqogb-M2cP9bndU%3D)_ It is peer-reviewed and based on data from major US universities and the London School of Economics. Unlike the left and a handful of well-paid "Republican" RCV supporters, it has actual, you know, data and history that proves the absolute folly of RCV. It is critical that Michigan voters understand that RCV acts against them. If you don't want your ballot sent to the trash can (ie, eliminated through RCV recounting) then please make sure you oppose the pro-RCV Constitutional Amendment coming to MI in 2026. Oh. And its not just Michigan. Sixteen states (WV, WY, TN, FL, ID, SD, MT, KY, AL, MS, LA, OK, MO, AR, KS, ND) have banned RCV. If you're not in one of those - look out - oppose RCV now before it's too late.
---
#### **I was asked to write a testimonial**
---
---
|
---
#### [**Click Here To Read The Michigan Report**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=GRslyHYrP_XPaqogb-M2cP9bndU%3D)
---
|
---
#### **America First Policy Institute Update**
---
**My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.****My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.****My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).****I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025.**
---
**My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.****On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI.**[**https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.americafirstpolicy.com&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=lTteGPvwAcv27cVR3hOj8NAi9Bc%3D)**They have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.****I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure.**
---
---
|
---
**My organization Izon Education**[**@907Honest**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2F907Honest&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=P3mhn33kE6DvefVH2D8ceiJWZvA%3D)**are working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview.**[**@A1Policy**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=RNxST0yVBplwsvMH5wSCD1gPyYs%3D)**I am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute.**
---
---
|
---
**“Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release “Frozen Odds” & “The Permanent Short” in October pending delays from our partnership with America First Policy Institute. They are helping me edit the footage to fit their national needs.**
---
**“Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage.**
---
---
|
---
### **More News**
---
---
|
---
**Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=JR-lgkzBlEHTV8aSCi8FiM2Yg1Y%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=esrISX3F2vSigQ-akH8wsHHp-CI%3D)
---

12110 Business Blvd Ste 6 PMB 113
Eagle River
United States [ Unsubscribe ](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68aa0d42e6d4f1556da401b7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2FY9wI1CzXhQlQv_prSAnipq-f3T3VSaBF1sdyKz4lTWcCf3l8d25UVObFSqbiiU5KSjyOjDujM3YkoJ0U3Yl43ZTY9-WA18ru3ikS4jdxuq0UMDhZW0R_XSpLNFEPrQ0MRUZFAhRaQ2MEZdKO2PB4ft0oZ-RJwAVoSBqefxkrKzFhY7Cf0rTpENEDAjHzYwpGH9rBCsmMw4fs5i-alO3GJbz47as32HSodnmitBXi8hbuGojfemp5jKotavzptglU3eySZFKEWc5eWjy8lZ2zuh-QgpXvj54G8e82z6aTgVdUSw53CR-pd0y7OXL-I-EoqWUjS_guA9sunUy1470kEPzl7qwQ9ium7DAsllnfgFpgFZd4ZzhfnN4%3D&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68aa0c6539dbe716550dbf6c&l=en-US&s=7rD2UMnv3dNIwBjDaR4IbXgV1VM%3D) |

I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025. My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI. have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure. | My organization Izon Education working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview. am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute. | “Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release “Frozen Odds” & “The Permanent Short” in October pending delays from our partnership with America First Policy Institute. They are helping me edit the footage to fit their national needs. “Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage. | More News | Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.The phase approach is:1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / EducationOur team at, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history. | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste 6 PMB 113 Eagle River United States | ---|---

And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... name: Dylan McArthur, Deb for New Mexico
subject: An important memo for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Because you’re one of our top supporters, I wanted to give you an update on the state of the race and share what you can do to help Deb win.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3981%2E400544%2EQHd4BU)
Hey, it’s Dylan, Deb’s Campaign Manager.
Because you’re one of our top supporters, I wanted to give you an update on the state of the race and share what you can do to help Deb win.
[**Before I share our exclusive campaign memo, will you contribute $5 or anything you can today?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250823_1_memo?amount=5&refcode=em20250823-3981&refcode2=3981_400544_QHd4BU&akid=3981%2E400544%2EQHd4BU)
**TO: INTERESTED PARTIES**
**FROM: DYLAN MCARTHUR, DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
**MEMO: STATE OF THE RACE** **Governors are on the frontlines against Trump.** Donald Trump is slashing education funding, putting rural hospitals at risk, gutting support for veterans, and wants to sell off our public lands to the highest bidder. He’s making life more unaffordable while ripping away the programs New Mexican families count on to stay afloat. **As Governor, Deb will fight like hell to lower costs for all New Mexicans, invest in clean energy and jobs, and keep New Mexico safe.** But we have to win first — and we’re up against some of the most powerful forces in the country. **This race is a toss-up.** **New Mexico isn’t a safe blue seat.** The governorship has flipped parties every eight years for decades, and with a two-term Democratic governor leaving office, MAGA Republicans are circling. Deb is already facing right-wing attacks, and national GOP groups are gearing up to back millionaire self-funders ready to buy this seat. **But our campaign is different.** **Deb doesn’t come from wealth, and she’s not backed by billionaires — she’s powered by people**. In just six months, she’s built a true grassroots movement, visiting and earning support in **all 33 counties** in New Mexico and holding events in every region of the state. From Shiprock to Las Cruces, Deb has listened to thousands of New Mexicans — especially in rural communities — about what’s keeping them up at night. Education is the top concern. People are concerned about water shortages and rural hospitals. And with Trump slashing programs like Medicaid and SNAP, the stakes couldn’t be clearer. That’s why Deb launched her “Lift Up New Mexico Tour” — 15 stops focused on hearing directly from voters and laying out her vision to lower costs and build an economy that works for all. It follows her 19-stop launch tour, where she met with communities face-to-face, in their hometowns. Her commitment to showing up is a reflection of who she is. **Here’s what we’re up against:** **Multiple GOP challengers are testing the waters, and Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are ready to flood this race with right-wing cash.** We know this will be one of the toughest and most expensive races in the country. **Right now, we’re in urgent need of resources to keep our momentum going and continue building the coalition that reflects the full diversity of New Mexico.** Every dollar we raise helps us reach new voters, organize in every county, and fight back against right-wing attacks.
---
If we want to elect a governor who is fierce enough to face tough challenges and fight for a bright future for all, we need all hands on deck.
[**As we head into the next critical phase of our campaign, can Deb and our team count on you to make a $5 contribution today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250823_1_memo?amount=5&refcode=em20250823-3981&refcode2=3981_400544_QHd4BU&akid=3981%2E400544%2EQHd4BU)
Thank you for reading,
Dylan McArthur
Campaign Manager
Deb for New Mexico
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250823-1&t=2&refcode2=3981_400544_QHd4BU&akid=3981%2E400544%2EQHd4BU)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3981%2E400544%2EQHd4BU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3981%2E400544%2EQHd4BU)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

subject: FWD: I’m not on vacation. I’m working for you.
body:
|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870272/565203534/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212) Hi, it's Derek. A couple weeks ago, I asked for your input on the issues that matter most to you and your family. **We’re still collecting responses from across CA-45 and beyond. According to our records, we haven’t seen your survey come through just yet – your voice would make a real difference in shaping our work in Congress.** I’m not taking a break while the House is in recess. I’m home in the district, meeting with folks face to face and staying laser-focused on the real challenges working people are facing. **[But I can’t reach everyone. That’s why I’m asking again: Will you take a moment to share your thoughts with me by completing our August issues survey? Your feedback helps guide how I show up for our community.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870281/565203542/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)** | **[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870288/565203551/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
---
Thanks for being a part of this with me,
Derek
**P.S.** I’ve forwarded my original message below for you. I really want to hear from you, and I’m grateful for your time.

**\------ Forwarded Message ------**
From: Derek Tran
Date: Tue, Aug 5, 2025 at 3:00 PM
Subject: I’m not on vacation. I’m working for you.
I hope you are enjoying your summer.

While Republicans forced the House into recess for the month, I’m not using it as a vacation. I’m back at home in CA-45 connecting with my constituents and the issues that they care the most about.

I’m covering a lot of ground, but it’s impossible for me to reach everyone. **[So today, I’m sending you our August issues survey: Will you take a minute to complete it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870297/565203559/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
**[Begin the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870306/565203569/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
---

Democrats across the country are refusing to stand down while the MAGA agenda continues to chip away at our democracy.

Texas House Democrats left the state to stop their Republican counterparts from passing new maps that would redraw the lines in the state – handing the GOP FIVE seats in Congress to secure their majority.

**It’s inspiring, and it’s exactly what we should be doing right now: Fighting the good fight for the millions of Americans whose lives are at stake.**

That’s no exaggeration. Republicans’ so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” will strip millions of their health care, food assistance, and make life harder for the working class – all to give their billionaire donors a tax break.

As the son of Vietnamese refugees, I know firsthand that this country _can_ do better – it’s what helped my family survive and thrive as small business owners, and inspired me to join the Army to give back.

We need to stay focused on what matters to move forward. **[That’s why instead of asking for your donation, I’m asking for your participation in our latest survey to inform my next steps in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870313/565203577/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
**[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113870320/565203584/-2081064782?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdmMTU0NWUtNTM4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5WfoZrEkqb9OIxwWyVOQ2qtk78S5Ohe3T0NQcKgo028=&emci=e2edd419-977f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7f1545e-5380-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
---

clean_body: | = Hi, it's Derek. A couple weeks ago, I asked for your input on the issues that matter most to you and your family. We’re still collecting responses from across CA-45 and beyond. According to our records, we haven’t seen your survey come through just yet – your voice would make a real difference in shaping our work in Congress. I’m not taking a break while the House is in recess. I’m home in the district, meeting with folks face to face and staying laser-focused on the real challenges working people are facing. | Thanks for being a part of this with me, Derek P.S. I’ve forwarded my original message below for you. I really want to hear from you, and I’m grateful for your time. \------ Forwarded Message ------ From: Derek Tran Date: Tue, Aug 5, 2025 at 3:00 PM Subject: I’m not on vacation. I’m working for you. I hope you are enjoying your summer. While Republicans forced the House into recess for the month, I’m not using it as a vacation. I’m back at home in CA-45 connecting with my constituents and the issues that they care the most about. I’m covering a lot of ground, but it’s impossible for me to reach everyone. Democrats across the country are refusing to stand down while the MAGA agenda continues to chip away at our democracy. Texas House Democrats left the state to stop their Republican counterparts from passing new maps that would redraw the lines in the state – handing the GOP FIVE seats in Congress to secure their majority. It’s inspiring, and it’s exactly what we should be doing right now: Fighting the good fight for the millions of Americans whose lives are at stake. That’s no exaggeration. Republicans’ so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” will strip millions of their health care, food assistance, and make life harder for the working class – all to give their billionaire donors a tax break. As the son of Vietnamese refugees, I know firsthand that this country can do better – it’s what helped my family survive and thrive as small business owners, and inspired me to join the Army to give back. We need to stay focused on what matters to move forward. Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. name: Brad Kohler | MN Candidate for Gov.
subject: Let’s make Walz TAP OUT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brad Kohler for Governor committee
body:
Friend, Walz’s reign ends NOW - _I’m delivering the knockout
punch._

I’m landing a right cross on Tim Walz before he can do even more
damage to hardworking Minnesotans.

I’m Brad Kohler, the “Godfather of Minnesota MMA,” three-time
world champion, UFC veteran and a Minnesotan who’s never backed down
from a fight. NOW, I’M STEPPING INTO THE POLITICAL RING TO TAKE ON
THE MOST DANGEROUS OPPONENT MINNESOTA’S EVER FACED: GOVERNOR TIM
WALZ.

Under Walz’s watch, our tax burden has ballooned, while spending has
skyrocketed. Families, small businesses, and retirees are _suffering
_because Tim Walz chose political giveaways over fiscal
responsibility. His policies are a chokehold on our economy and our
way of life.

But I’m not here to complain - I’m here to do what I do best and
_FIGHT BACK._

I’ve spent my life in the cage, facing down adversity and coming out
on top. Now, I am bringing that same tenacity to the political arena.

I’M RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR OF MINNESOTA TO PUT AMERICA FIRST -
STARTING RIGHT HERE AT HOME. WHEN MINNESOTA LEADS WITH STRONG
CONSERVATIVE VALUES, ALL AMERICANS WIN. I’LL FIGHT TO PROTECT
FAMILIES, GROW OUR ECONOMY, AND RESTORE LAW AND ORDER - FOR MINNESOTA
AND FOR OUR COUNTRY.

But I can’t do it alone. I need YOU in my corner, patriot.

WILL YOU JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT?
[https://secure.winred.com/brad-kohler-for-governor/20250819_flex8458_kohler_w_eml_knockoutpunch?utm_campaign=065002000081020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657838343538&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]
Will you stand in my corner and help deliver a knockout blow to
Walz’s failed policies?

YES, I WILL FIGHT WITH YOU!
[https://secure.winred.com/brad-kohler-for-governor/20250819_flex8458_kohler_w_eml_knockoutpunch?utm_campaign=065002000081020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657838343538&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

NO.
[https://secure.winred.com/brad-kohler-for-governor/20250819_flex8458_kohler_w_eml_knockoutpunch?utm_campaign=065002000081020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657838343538&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

I know Minnesota better than a whiteboard or policy memo - I’ve
lived here, built here, fought here. I’ve been punched, knocked down
and stood back up. That’s why I’m fighting: _to bring leadership
with grit, not glitz._

_PLEASE, STAND WITH ME TODAY AND HELP BUILD MOMENTUM BY ADDING YOUR
NAME TO OUR ROSTER OF SUPPORTERS._
[https://secure.winred.com/brad-kohler-for-governor/20250819_flex8458_kohler_w_eml_knockoutpunch?utm_campaign=065002000081020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657838343538&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

Together, we can eliminate the chokehold that Tim Walz has on
Minnesota.

JOIN THE FIGHT - KNOCK OUT WALZ
[https://secure.winred.com/brad-kohler-for-governor/20250819_flex8458_kohler_w_eml_knockoutpunch?utm_campaign=065002000081020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657838343538&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

ADD YOUR NAME NOW

Hi, it's **Brigadier General (Ret.) Shawn Harris**. I led troops in combat overseas--never in my life did I think I'd have to fight to keep our military from being used against our own people here at home. But Donald Trump keeps pushing this dangerous idea--and Marjorie Taylor Greene cheers him on every step of the way. Troops should _never_ be used against American citizens. Period. I'm running for Congress to stop her, defend our Constitution, and make sure our military is never turned into a political weapon. We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. [**Can you rush a contribution right now so we can take the fight to her? clean_body: | | | Hi, it's Brigadier General (Ret.) Shawn Harris. I led troops in combat overseas--never in my life did I think I'd have to fight to keep our military from being used against our own people here at home. But Donald Trump keeps pushing this dangerous idea--and Marjorie Taylor Greene cheers him on every step of the way. Troops should never be used against American citizens. Period. I'm running for Congress to stop her, defend our Constitution, and make sure our military is never turned into a political weapon. We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
