Every time I take a vote in the Senate, I’m not thinking about how to please big businesses or special interests. I’m thinking about how I can get to work for you.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871231/565206344/1435897075?refcode=email_082325_pacs-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE5MmYyOS01NjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tx4URLVUWG7BTB0v5qlbppK6BbAPGStOH3uswA9Dnw=&emci=f593a94e-717f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ed192f29-5680-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Folks, Every time I take a vote in the Senate, I’m not thinking about how to please big businesses or special interests. **I’m thinking about how I can get to work for you.** The only question on my mind when I’m voting is, _“Does this serve the people of Colorado?”_ That’s been my philosophy from the beginning. I didn’t get into politics to serve myself or the highest bidder – I first ran for Mayor of Denver because I was running the Wynkoop brewpub downtown and saw the voices of everyday Coloradans weren’t being heard. **That’s why I refuse to accept a single cent of corporate PAC money, because the only boss I have are Colorado’s voters,_not special interests looking to buy political support._** **But that makes me a top target for National Republicans.** They’ve been eyeing my seat to expand their Senate majority for years, and they’re gearing up to surge millions of dollars into Colorado to take me down. I may not have corporate PAC money, but I have something better: this grassroots team. **[So please, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign and help me defend this seat from MAGA Republicans and help Democrats take back the Senate? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871232/565206345/1506335976?refcode=email_082325_pacs-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE5MmYyOS01NjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tx4URLVUWG7BTB0v5qlbppK6BbAPGStOH3uswA9Dnw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871233/565206346/1506335976?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_082325_pacs-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE5MmYyOS01NjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tx4URLVUWG7BTB0v5qlbppK6BbAPGStOH3uswA9Dnw=)

body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

Jason's been crisscrossing the district, talking with voters and discussing our work on behalf of Coloradans — and it’s all thanks to supporters like you.

Here are just a few things your grassroots support has made possible:

- Jason hosted multiple town halls to hear from constituents, including at local businesses and one with the NAACP of Aurora, to discuss important issues on the minds of Coloradans in our community.

- He visited the Rocky Mountain VA in Aurora to speak with the center’s leadership and ensure the use of taxpayers’ dollars to provide veterans with world-class care.

- And he met with Planned Parenthood to help shed light on how the Republican budget and cuts to Medicaid are hurting access to critical health and reproductive care.

To meet with Coloradans in every corner of our great state, Jason depends on grassroots support from this team. Can you chip in any amount to fill up our gas tank and help us reach our next stop? 🚙 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Can you chip in any amount to fill up our gas tank and help us reach our next stop? 🚙 [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 NOW [] DONATE $25 NOW [] DONATE $50 NOW [] DONATE $100 NOW [] DONATE $250 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thanks for fueling everything we do! — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Don’t Miss Your Stop—RSVP This Week!
body:
Bus Tour: Only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections! Join us and be heard!
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/aycEsaVDiiOMA_rWJ8SkxqV2ldR1XKUBhT40wo43-ug=419)Patriot–I have some great news! **The Only Citizens Vote Bus Tour is coming through your state,** and we’re counting on you to make this bus tour impossible to ignore. After the bus was vandalized in Phoenix on Tuesday, Aug. 19th, we chose to answer with presence—not silence. So, show up, bring a friend, and add your name so that in September Congress sees exactly where your community stands: **Only U.S. Citizens Vote in U.S. Elections.**[ RSVP FOR TOUR](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonlycitizensvotetour%2F%23tour/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/2PcPPQSVAmue6WsM5T-WSJCJP5Wa1jfUA2KvekI8Ht4=419)
* * *
**BUS TOUR SCHEDULE**
* **Aug. 26th** – [_Montgomery, AL_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-montgomery-al%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/DyhivOOrQNRXN0dyfV72PvkUb7zq854Vcm-PDFCDSDQ=419)
* **Aug. 27th** – [_Atlanta, GA_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-atlanta-ga%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/rikZOys59DLuiEr719d04tcCUz6ZuMbkfq0-HZjGmpo=419)

* **Aug. 29th** – [_Raleigh, NC_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-raleigh-nc%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/dkplhBOlT2QSsEokYZzi-wveG3xyj7WLFPN__NsHjrU=419)
* **Sept. 1st** – [_Kenosha, WI_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-kenosha-wi%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/LPr-9BHp1dUdx9szuhI6YTwPOr-am1tcYzBeOq7tvbk=419)
* **Sept. 2nd** – [_Orland Park, IL_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-orland-park-il%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/YQ7hQNkVRArrWniknbUT-DxgFHnBhC0H2fVbEprT6gw=419)
* **Sept. 3rd** – [_Lansing, MI_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-lansing-mi%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/mZB7_lNlzoSOJE7gEFTumJ7zjCcj8GhY63laKTzdUXs=419) & [_Holland, OH_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-holland-oh%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/tedELIUBbzkP42MKQTDYUd--Yg7qBYEcJ9XW6K4kmfA=419)
* **Sept. 4th** – [_Cranberry Township, PA_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-cranberry-twp-pa%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/E-tN5lpy_tlkXCZCROdTBLadJDidScNlBdChe8XexaQ=419)
* **Sept. 5th** – [_Harrisburg, PA_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-harrisburg-pa%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/i2yElUHmpqsCXmXhmYkU3hQnm8DLXF0miHZh6YSM8fU=419)
* **Sept. 8th** – [_Annapolis, MD_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-annapolis-md%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/RXi0-WAWpPXYFxecvv1dNL1Gp9wNsbh3upI_4Ikgr90=419)
* **Sept. 10th** – [_**Washington, D.C.**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-washington-dc%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/_jUdXbD7YKeOX80UDFWcS_Wbc9epddYerMH_dI6o8KA=419)_(Capitol Rally & Petition Delivery)_

If you can’t attend a stop in person, you can still help keep the tour rolling strong—[ _**make a donation to fuel the next leg.**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/Q6EpCOfq8SFn1z7O2HJLeQp2BUjAMfJAHIkpoJ76WjU=419)[ CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/25bC6h1Qi6hSJV4cXCP-8Qn892PVzCL-Ii1l5jvAYcc=419)If your city is on this list, RSVP now and show up. If you’re within driving distance, we need you to show up too! Visible momentum and real signatures are how we win this fight.In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin ** _The SAVE Act (Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act)_**_is a commonsense bill that would require individuals to provide documentary proof of U.S. citizenship when registering to vote in federal elections. It closes loopholes in current law that allow noncitizens to register and even vote simply by checking a box. The SAVE Act is a critical step toward restoring integrity to our elections and ensuring that only American citizens vote.__This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/3/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/4y57I3S_9Swj-iH_EI3eClkR8i0xCHlIlMbCfXoSF64=419)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/PV-CaMCbbZBw3QFIGqnIUhGFIQNWehxITiLKklMQeG0=419) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000198d87797e3-335d3c41-cdb7-4c71-bbf5-8c93ebd9b340-000000/BJX8EuReujQtNtMpO_Zo4WsK91_RDO8HuF-8eJ9Xa-U=419).

name: Team DASS
subject: BREAKING: Trump wants to ban mail voting (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871995/565209167/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWEzZWZiZi01YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_DU-xzyXngFbXpwLd6lTWxUUGEni8gCAj4lIP6ZpAFU=)
**➤➤ Trump is trying to kill vote-by-mail — _again_ — even though he uses it himself** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871996/565209168/55160957?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWEzZWZiZi01YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_DU-xzyXngFbXpwLd6lTWxUUGEni8gCAj4lIP6ZpAFU=)**
* * *
You should know this, friend: **Donald Trump has voted by mail multiple times during his time in the White House. ** But now, just days after **promising Vladimir Putin** he’d crack down on “Democrat voting machines” and “rigged mail ballots”, he’s pushing for a new executive order to **restrict or outright ban vote-by-mail across the country.** The hypocrisy would be laughable if it weren’t so dangerous. Not only is he a hypocrite, he’s trying to control a part of our elections he plays no role in at all. He’s spreading lies, creating chaos, and doing everything he can to suppress the vote... again. And he’s not alone. Republican governors are already floating copycat laws. Right-wing attorneys are filing lawsuits. And Trump’s DOJ is laying the groundwork to pressure states into abandoning vote-by-mail altogether. **That’s where we come in.** Democratic Secretaries of State are some of the only people standing between this authoritarian agenda and free, fair, accessible elections. But they can’t do it without serious grassroots support. [**Can you pitch in $3 or more today to help us fight back and elect democracy defenders who will protect vote-by-mail access in every state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871997/565209169/1071238056?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWEzZWZiZi01YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_DU-xzyXngFbXpwLd6lTWxUUGEni8gCAj4lIP6ZpAFU=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113871998/565209170/1071238056?refcode=em-8.23.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWEzZWZiZi01YjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_DU-xzyXngFbXpwLd6lTWxUUGEni8gCAj4lIP6ZpAFU=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ Trump is trying to kill vote-by-mail — again — even though he uses it himself = You should know this, friend: Donald Trump has voted by mail multiple times during his time in the White House. But now, just days after promising Vladimir Putin he’d crack down on “Democrat voting machines” and “rigged mail ballots”, he’s pushing for a new executive order to restrict or outright ban vote-by-mail across the country. The hypocrisy would be laughable if it weren’t so dangerous. Not only is he a hypocrite, he’s trying to control a part of our elections he plays no role in at all. He’s spreading lies, creating chaos, and doing everything he can to suppress the vote... again. And he’s not alone. Republican governors are already floating copycat laws. Right-wing attorneys are filing lawsuits. And Trump’s DOJ is laying the groundwork to pressure states into abandoning vote-by-mail altogether. That’s where we come in. Democratic Secretaries of State are some of the only people standing between this authoritarian agenda and free, fair, accessible elections. But they can’t do it without serious grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

clean_body: Peter, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Peter, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

clean_body: | | | | Hey there, friend. I asked to reach out because this cannot wait: Trump and the Republican Party are going to new lows to completely undermine faith in our institutions and compromise the foundation of our very democracy. In two weeks, I’m coming to Nevada because our fight to stop Trump runs through the Silver State. I know a thing or two about southwest battleground states and even when the cards are stacked against us, with aggressive corporate special interest money backing our opposition, we fight back with everything we have. That’s why I can say with confidence that grassroots support in states like Nevada is the best investment Democrats can make for victory next year. Every single door knocked, phone called, and voter reached makes all the difference when races are won or lost here by the narrowest margins. — Mark Kelly The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Tobias Read
subject: The values that guide me:
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full]
Hi, folks. It’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
People often ask me why I still send out fundraising emails even though I was just elected. Trust me – asking for money is not my favorite part of being a candidate.
Here’s the bottom line: I love my job and I’m proud of the work we have done in the Secretary of State’s office. But even though the election is behind us, the work of building a strong, effective campaign never really stops. Maintaining a campaign apparatus is crucial in modern politics. Without it, I’d be vulnerable to a challenger. Raising money also allows me to build stronger alliances across Oregon and to support organizations and candidates who will fight to protect our democracy.
Most importantly, it allows me to maintain a consistent and aggressive communication structure with Oregon residents about what I’m doing to uplift our democracy and help make Oregon's government more accountable to voters.
To support my campaign, please consider pitching in $25 or more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full]
The principles that guide my time in office are the same ones that guided me during the campaign.
Democracy. The rule of law. Public service. Fairness and equality.
So when it comes to standing up to MAGA extremism and President Donald Trump’s illegal actions, it’s never a question of whether I’ll bow to political pressure.
I’ll choose my values and the bedrock principles of American democracy every time.
But as our country faces unprecedented challenges, I need your help to continue defending Oregon’s elections. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full]
I also wanted to share a quick update. I recently had the honor of sitting down with Southern Oregon’s Jefferson Public Radio to discuss the work that my office has been doing over the past few months.
You can listen to what I had to say by clicking on this link. [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
And then, if you’re able, chip in $10 (or whatever you can spare) to help my campaign stay strong in the face of these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full]
https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250823-values-ob3-full]

Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Liz Cheney
subject: Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Peter,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office. __[_**With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $25 today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113872123/565209726/-1467160713?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-08-23_LIZ_FTH_ES-30039_RS&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhYjdkNi01ZDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IbGYmgTQWkpYHhW_3-UfrxrOtK6I4EMBX8X32fPbk4=) I hope I can count on you to join me. [_**We need to support and stand with Zoe now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113872124/565209727/-1467160713?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-08-23_LIZ_FTH_ES-30039_RS&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhYjdkNi01ZDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IbGYmgTQWkpYHhW_3-UfrxrOtK6I4EMBX8X32fPbk4=)

Best,

Liz Cheney

name: Guzman for Virginia
subject: Americans for Prosperity spending against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | **** New filings with the Virginia State Board of Elections reveal that Americans for Prosperity - the dark-money group founded by Charles and David Koch - is spending over $10,000 on an independent expenditure ad campaign to defeat Elizabeth Guzman in VA-HD22.
AFP doesn’t like that in her previous service in the Virginia House of Delegates, Elizabeth Guzman passed laws expanding collective bargaining rights to firefighters and teachers.
AFP doesn’t like that Elizabeth Guzman is endorsed by Virginia’s unions, and supports raising wages.
And AFP _really_ doesn’t like that Elizabeth Guzman is on the cusp of defeating MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy in a TOSS-UP, red-to-blue race that could determine control of the House of Delegates in just over 70 days.
**[We’re fighting Koch money with over 6,000 donations from supporters like you, fueling a massive field and advertising campaign to get out the truth and get out the vote. subject: re: Public Broadcasting SHUTTING DOWN!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Breaking >>>>
| **We are DEVASTATED!!!** Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block for _years to come._

[**We will NEVER forgive Trump or his MAGA minions for destroying public media! So we’re sending public broadcasters a letter to thank them for their decades of service — and to stand with them in this critical fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93162?t=6&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93162?t=7&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf)
---
TO: Public Broadcasters
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. To everyone in public broadcasting,

**Thank you.** Your freely available programming has meant so much to millions of Americans!

I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight.

**I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable.**

It’s not just upsetting, _it’s a dangerous step towards**outright authoritarianism!**_ That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him.

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who defend public media and our most essential freedoms »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93162?t=8&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93162?t=9&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20970%2E878179%2E6irsnf)

name: Christina Gagnier
subject: 🚨BREAKING: Redistricting will be on the ballot this November.
body:
|
#
It is officially happening, Peter:

Earlier this week, Governor Gavin Newsom signed the Election Rigging Response Act into law. This will allow us to push back against MAGA Republicans in Texas rolling over for Trump to rig midterm elections by adding FIVE more GOP seats to Congress.

**Redistricting _will_ be on the ballot this November.** I fully support Californians making their voices heard and fighting back against the attacks on democracy. I have gone face-to-face with MAGA before, and I am more committed than ever to pushing back against the MAGA agenda in this race.

We cannot let Republicans get away with skirting the rules to keep their grip on power in the House. They know that with only three seats separating control, swing seats like this one could make or break the majority.

My opponent Young Kim is nothing more than a rubber stamp for Trump, doing his bidding at the expense of working families in Orange County by taking away their healthcare, allowing tariffs to increase their grocery bills, and more.

The good news is that she is extremely vulnerable. The last time she lost a congressional race was in a Trump midterm just like this one, and with the momentum on our side, we can flip this seat and the House for Democrats.

**[I am the only one in this race with real experience standing up to MAGA bullies. clean_body: | It is officially happening, Peter: Earlier this week, Governor Gavin Newsom signed the Election Rigging Response Act into law. This will allow us to push back against MAGA Republicans in Texas rolling over for Trump to rig midterm elections by adding FIVE more GOP seats to Congress. Redistricting will be on the ballot this November. I fully support Californians making their voices heard and fighting back against the attacks on democracy. I have gone face-to-face with MAGA before, and I am more committed than ever to pushing back against the MAGA agenda in this race. We cannot let Republicans get away with skirting the rules to keep their grip on power in the House. They know that with only three seats separating control, swing seats like this one could make or break the majority. My opponent Young Kim is nothing more than a rubber stamp for Trump, doing his bidding at the expense of working families in Orange County by taking away their healthcare, allowing tariffs to increase their grocery bills, and more. The good news is that she is extremely vulnerable. The last time she lost a congressional race was in a Trump midterm just like this one, and with the momentum on our side, we can flip this seat and the House for Democrats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Christina | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. To support Christina's campaign = To volunteer on Christina's campaign, To receive fewer emails from Christina Gagnier's campaign, sign up for our option here. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Christina Gagnier for Congress. name: Jonathan Nez
subject: I won’t forget where I came from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/bgQ0-ZWXXLjLwbbbDE1s6Q~~/AAPPABA~/WRO3VXClRd9LIPJAL9I9nvxaLq0ezkwoRC9iDs71FfOqNEaMhsUTXMZNKkkrS5l_PvpljC8iFlA8eGc-KHNVfXMbbNQSKxjs4me4sz6p7cTnzsgJly8ztRVuX-8TceqSemPfd3NqhGCo5-vz86vwDw~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/PYg1NKDT-skPJon_z64hKg~~/AAPPABA~/yAs4FYLIXRIcD6Rf3stPvzSGMnpDcjcJXQqspFsr634kKpJrcR3Erlbchy5iuF-vwu9b_5AEDhrx__5nWpLag41qRbipRc5Yy5Uoh0I8jVrMA1agM1XKAyuuZBDe8krmX7XNMOxamf3WFZ90t_G3nXjKcxUnaE0_Z1RDreg3s0QTOvE8gqtqlTpQy8WvbwQm0ab5sDUOao8xjYK6TKDR4A~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/37u8WNfyg5aAoWO6z8zj4Q~~/AAPPABA~/EW-t9yeOPyfvqNbNh0xRl2HYhaX3ymaZFApprdFPMuK4npMVXqPbBsHjrkgD4fy4zFpQdiV1Pizi5X48eI4K9jr1JJB9xgQqWs9SR9gpq7MkrGZycFIJoMD_PGvrWUV6YLhcCY4qWjDWjhV9BR9mhw~~

Thank you so much for your support,

Jonathan Nez

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: NYC is done with the status quo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
With your help, we can get Zohran across the finish line.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250823-1&t=1&akid=2565%2E587540%2EjfFWJX)
**Peter — young people changed the game in NYC.**
We helped Zohran Mamdani win the Democratic primary for Mayor of New York City. _That’s huge._ And it didn’t happen by accident — it happened because young people knocked doors, made calls, and built a coalition that took on the political machine and won.
Now comes the hard part.
In November, Zohran is up against not one — but _two_ — independent candidates: Eric Adams and Andrew Cuomo. They’re backed by billionaires, real estate giants, and the same tired power players who’ve failed New York over and over.
**But we’re not scared of them._We’re organizing._**
Because we know what’s at stake. Zohran is running to make housing affordable, to make buses fast and free, to guarantee universal childcare, and to actually make New York livable for working-class people — not just the ultra-wealthy and well-connected.
And with your help, we can get him across the finish line.
**[Can you donate $5 today to help Leaders We Deserve elect Zohran Mamdani — and power more young candidates like him across the country?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250823_1_zohran?refcode=em20250823-2565&amount=5&refcode2=2565_587540_jfFWJX&akid=2565%2E587540%2EjfFWJX)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250823_1_zohran?amount=5&refcode=em20250823-2565&refcode2=2565_587540_jfFWJX&akid=2565%2E587540%2EjfFWJX)**
Here’s the truth: Cuomo and Adams are throwing everything they’ve got into this race to stop Zohran’s momentum. But money isn’t everything. We’ve got people like you on our side. And when the grassroots join together, we’re more powerful than the elites.
You’ve helped us prove that when young people organize, we win. Now we need to prove it again. Let’s show NYC that the future is here — and it’s progressive, bold, and unapologetically ours.
**[If you’re in a position to support our work, can you donate $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250823_1_zohran?refcode=em20250823-2565&amount=5&refcode2=2565_587540_jfFWJX&akid=2565%2E587540%2EjfFWJX)**
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250823-1&t=2&refcode2=2565_587540_jfFWJX&akid=2565%2E587540%2EjfFWJX)**

body:

Peter,
President Trump knows he can’t win on a level playing field—so he’s trying to rig it and threatening to ban mail-in voting:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_ttp_20250823_2_ak?refcode=em20250823-40054&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40054_3422442__lnUX2&akid=40054%2E3422442%2E_lnUX2)
His goal? Stack Congress with people who will do whatever Trump says—even if it means undermining our democracy.
**Democrats only need to flip _three_ seats to take back the House.** But if we want to defeat the GOP, we need to start right now.
That’s where Truth to Power comes in. We’re endorsing bold, honest candidates who fight for working families and put the public interest ahead of political ambition.

name: Royce Alexander White
subject: A free Black man who won’t kneel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Let’s finish this fight. Now. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5c8f6b92d7484f22bc79ae848f9ee82b&_e=m6Cf4KORVHVjlTYeb-YDpRnUSzdSGQn291Qlb6RefRpZoWA-KdEp9uJDCVmR448TlODkk9IOsUEUaBu6MNc6-t2ofqiBvBMfrmcs3GWoniOZdW4UuFJ8JH0M7XgQ0dY3sYbuN55Z8_TpQFoqAAZkFc0fGLMDDB1eeCx3muw6dJfAHsUzb5WUVijb04U2JGD1EuoWBpTR9SXxWfZzhTAnEXmpEyaN04seMMJ0sswPYA-xdF2XxMaaX4b18l-Tp_GGWtfxvAEajL_ZxCZP6_9TJzb6CU6D6_Cyg8_jddcr_Eij9WastQkrxFERqUvXXQZfhKkpsDhGH_eV55WM-mIEvz7p6smxhk3F-GiKjogd6rhDyEn0KKYXspDZEb48Z711O7gRPYhdjDpFj43atj_UudlVapxp9nDdN08ju7LS_umMBYWGX2_ywktgJ7Wuy-_HItyqjM8csNBqbJis8mWMgDofMn_EO37C0dGJDJ_viPalGf-bhYMZVooO9lOXCUD1I_f66Gznens_hpT0Bf54GlnN_XiLT-l85HQeOUDqSY50lWS1MIn-nOt9iJ9E6nKH)
---

Peter,

When I stepped into this race, I didn’t just enter politics—I stepped into a war.

**_A war against the lies, the labels, the machine that tells people like me to sit down and shut up._ ** I knew the media would lie. I knew the elites—on both sides—would do their best to shut me up, shut me down, and shut me out.

Because here’s the truth: I am everything they fear.

A free-thinking Black man who won’t kneel. A Republican who doesn’t beg for approval. A fighter who answers to **God, Country, and Truth** —not party bosses or corporate donors.

That’s why they’ve gone scorched earth. They’ve smeared my name. Mocked my faith. Attacked my mental health. Why? Because _**I don’t fit their box—and I never will.**_

If I win, the system cracks. The ruling class panics. The elites lose their grip. That’s why they’ll spend millions to stop one man—**me** —from standing with **YOU**.

| [ **CRACK THE SYSTEM** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5c8f6b92d7484f22bc79ae848f9ee82b&_e=m6Cf4KORVHVjlTYeb-YDpRnUSzdSGQn291Qlb6RefRpZoWA-KdEp9uJDCVmR448TlODkk9IOsUEUaBu6MNc6-t2ofqiBvBMfrmcs3GWoniOZdW4UuFJ8JH0M7XgQ0dY3sYbuN55Z8_TpQFoqAAZkFc0fGLMDDB1eeCx3muw6dJfAHsUzb5WUVijb04U2JGD1oVQhbxJsFxUGLEECFgTEk_0maNa7UzOV-EhEjqTKcqtcN5W_pmJBS6vBlnzeYI2rW2eZLTOpW_mhgG2thMY7b1eTf1AYwMcrYfUYB7qSuoXXndITffAQ4rAtnPX24DdGD5vbJSt626JB9F7Sv1bnDsd--8c8gIZApQwnBszNkeYTtnLSAgekJka__2kflAym3agRKsfUr3lIWp6riRZ0MXrsoefeCf7-B2qlEhBAlgO9ZzCg5idodW-nmJd0Mc73COTKVEdS7c_tsPoSwRLMZsk5vW6NBdmj15oC22CsGDDe-lTaFQAyyinw2DfnTBjUJVWu3kQT0QMSVLJ_2dKhCqUXCqCFMIBSKmvomQjui2kbCopDxK8jCxQeaKCUvF1o)
---

It’ll show the whole country that the people are DONE with puppets like Tina Smith. That Minnesota is ready for real change, not polished lies. And that scares them more than anything.

**[But I can’t win this fight alone.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5c8f6b92d7484f22bc79ae848f9ee82b&_e=m6Cf4KORVHVjlTYeb-YDpRnUSzdSGQn291Qlb6RefRpZoWA-KdEp9uJDCVmR448TlODkk9IOsUEUaBu6MNc6-t2ofqiBvBMfrmcs3GWoniOZdW4UuFJ8JH0M7XgQ0dY3sYbuN55Z8_TpQFoqAAZkFc0fGLMDDB1eeCx3muw6dJfAHsUzb5WUVijb04U2JGD1mr8EqqqMdfYbiebUHPYP5he4eFDk_JuqaxN_q0EZfQ9Is6DMJQT_-3meOQa-n9AdxnOgFRQHohDXRYKvW4kQJqAUjXcnVBnnVUooWwbsdbKPSdG4zIxq4igyEayyawtbtiZxxohfaVi-brVxa6dtKtHT_-8-jbF0n-sHttSd8LEvBMSOb_Yk_4GY7zgC1xTxvQbWoZM9RuiyStEO6l1Vwc0Irhs60Z5WIHagv7DwI2f78SbI0OPGpF3E4FJoRO4cWmMXWwP7rpcXJiodM8l203Bg0rLO0KfbUq1IwSHJq7UlKUrPECDprGJI2caVUyyKQGgAdwdV55b4A4g08W5F1TnT2EKEtC7tBV28HyNc6APdWu_QauPCK6dwC-y1oiN5)** I’m out here every day—town to town, shaking hands, speaking truth—and I need your help to keep going. This is it. This is our chance.

[**If just 1,000 patriots chip in $10 tonight, we can light the fuse and flip this race on its head. Will you be one of them?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5c8f6b92d7484f22bc79ae848f9ee82b&_e=m6Cf4KORVHVjlTYeb-YDpRnUSzdSGQn291Qlb6RefRpZoWA-KdEp9uJDCVmR448TlODkk9IOsUEUaBu6MNc6-t2ofqiBvBMfrmcs3GWoniOZdW4UuFJ8JH0M7XgQ0dY3sYbuN55Z8_TpQFoqAAZkFc0fGLMDDB1eeCx3muw6dJfAHsUzb5WUVijb04U2JGD1z9ka8v0_Y7sQs_KO2CVAggox0_w-KXZsTlPeU2OUOFBiEOQY2333h3FOtaU3p-6eSymEc1KcQ1-xfd7tOmYa-4Vb67UrHCdXF0DY5JGIcRT1SCDw3nlG8H9PjXI066d9lFaVw0qynFD4eRAbWXcVKX5zIWy9kGV7QmMtPwVfMpvx1XODf97Ej7XWIAUjyVDLYr5P6lupQBINJCcygjEe9YErtRheXK3bbYZQLIyjhYIiqDtoe_uVMw0k8dDPaqEy8cK4uwm0-IaiyCQX4gs5jpeK0fdYTuw1a3Pbr-DPuK5VA_NH4IK5Oc-I71rM_OKUe4R-mTin-KdADOa4Kaj1s0w-eONKdzdZVDfmnaCcCF_mDBsKHz1EITk3Z471AjfE) This isn’t Left vs. Right. This is the people vs. the machine. And I’m not here to play nice—I’m here to burn the lies down and build something real.

And I promise you this: I will never bow to the machine. Not now. Not ever.

Let’s make history. Let’s win this.

Royce Alexander White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5c8f6b92d7484f22bc79ae848f9ee82b&_e=m6Cf4KORVHVjlTYeb-YDpRnUSzdSGQn291Qlb6RefRpZoWA-KdEp9uJDCVmR448TlODkk9IOsUEUaBu6MNc6-t2ofqiBvBMfrmcs3GWoniOZdW4UuFJ8JH0M7XgQ0dY3sYbuN55Z8_TpQFoqAAZkFc0fGLMDDB1eeCx3muw6dJfAHsUzb5WUVijb04U2JGD1siIuTxBLuLi5edQKopHsZHhKFg_OvtdqCduH_CNwvrvIvimMD2PgCVFjX9RufN4cO0tUALvVKPSCVRhyZ5cxJkZr2hpxRiHnwk3Grxv7wDBUrY7hrsZloJTk84-CKmYbFY9y-710BVycdC0vffVA3wfI8zgNU-HjJ3-YCtFLes3AM5yp9yme4ARVrDaBeB-auizA1ppbifDEyiRfKfv-D7tRQ-tR4BcKLUok9mNayvL24zG0oLTgNRWo_8g3KbpCSj2jQ01ibwD0xtHdImRiiU_KtYLFqSamKK6KnP-_aKIb395z2AVDASCr9_bZ8ZWxekshiCCGfjKmBsFhMORyxB0xpwwGdo3vabntjzFA-6pxUuHUeoeKSzfk8y_5X9I_)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=5c8f6b92d7484f22bc79ae848f9ee82b&_e=m6Cf4KORVHVjlTYeb-YDpRnUSzdSGQn291Qlb6RefRpZoWA-KdEp9uJDCVmR448TlODkk9IOsUEUaBu6MNc6-t2ofqiBvBMfrmcs3GWoniOZdW4UuFJ8JH0M7XgQ0dY3sYbuN55Z8_TpQFoqAAZkFc0fGLMDDB1eeCx3muw6dJfAHsUzb5WUVijb04U2JGD15b6dR2UOMC_oSYCIP_712LrdYMhdrYK8n3fGdcW7QUkJoppFnmuKGM_oGNH9EegwAAs-sbLRDbD10hxmoDgZttkFCTZ_sQlByIAPB5Paos68BM2P42sDX7Qg99U4-ik2PNQmWEx5kqadUE2eHAja6ySHMA6tNojDEi-gLjkXnmUxLXSGTc9j6d_9chSHBk_3DwGeNN8VA_aO5kTqCep3gNlNCCNDdSBINcTchjLU3q5rtcjCRtmlzWd1a2ncRJ80_enS5CYBU94xLwl9FMMaPkhIh92pVIduYL5EcLKYsvGXli_r7ETrUTbmBoC78G49qcRp-BNxR7Ha4RjJIAj67p7I7eg2DO9oSOhl0bX59nB6WxW1lgMGYV0I28KjnWft)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Yet again — NC is the most consequential swing state on the map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Join me in the fight.
Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._
It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made.
**I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.**
As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.
And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are.
I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina.
**[I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $10 today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93992?refcode=em20250823-9315&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9315%2E614464%2EoHdk-j)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93992?refcode=em20250823-9315&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9315%2E614464%2EoHdk-j)**
Grateful to have you with me,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93992?refcode=em20250823-9315&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9315%2E614464%2EoHdk-j)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: How we stop Trump –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250823-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250823-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21059%2E9716520%2EqfYfBs)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- **if you invented a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they would look exactly like Donald Trump.**

But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $50,000 by midnight to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these early days. clean_body: | | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue. Let me make this as plain as possible: Donald Trump isn't fit to lead. We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- if you invented a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they would look exactly like Donald Trump. But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- votes to let Donald Trump have his way with our government. And that is exactly why we must take back the Senate: Republicans will never stand up to Trump, so if anyone is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us. We need your help to fight for the Senate. While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |

**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – a triple-matched gift of $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. When enough grassroots Democrats chip in a 3X-matched gift of $7, it adds up and helps Democratic candidates compete. **Reason #3:** **With the GOP pushing their extreme agenda nationwide, your $7 donation will be matched THREE times, making it even more important.** [Donate a triple-matched gift of $7 before our August deadline to help state Democrats compete against Republicans’ multi-million dollar fundraising haul. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDVi64qgX8p27lD6WAR1u3H2avA2aLPWrv6CEr-sqW92JFn6sHoIsx7tloI7MLPOr1lHrxLMvccO70fmMjYzGqzaUksOIggrSQdj05aHGfgghP2opnlkFVxSfb79etm9iW2r4BmiofwkikH4OexwaIcY4mjF2ygachQnJLNowgQRQZwByu3_vgRAyJQKDRSMwGmT_dKDj_Mu6tAv6jU3XeA4fQsQ6FKVgu2AGxtMl0XNyYd9CSGR-FcnTuUjhwCTtaLTEGpjhwTtFdHRmfDfguNLA3YvEHCPEDW3rUmIZh2chjnPIcK83wJP9nOKihrqTuymy8Bc29Eyy4aCoBKwo92SbQH-XnOaCdYVX88yPHS0k/4ja/ilJ4fg12Qia6Ytq9Rwzf2A/h0/h001.amKbbFQoF16GfDxnFJU3Rq_cbRIbVAtv4IOEV01apTw) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Trump sees a border fence and he wants to paint it black

# [A Coal Black Monument to Idiocy](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171767806&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzY3ODA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5OTEwNjIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU4MzA2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M0Og2--zBk8j3U944KUPqMlyAGDDat71HHB3q09QJtY)
### Trump sees a border fence and he wants to paint it black
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---
| Aug 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171767806&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzY3ODA2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTk5MTA2MiwiZXhwIjoxNzU4NTgzMDYyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0._DCC5Yd9-2dzD_ihUg195pluGvkHxYjo-2NRzbyPWNY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171767806&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNzY3ODA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU5OTEwNjIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODU4MzA2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M0Og2--zBk8j3U944KUPqMlyAGDDat71HHB3q09QJtY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/be25e18c-724c-488c-94ef-1e9189f120c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### _**Our work is reader supported. Which means[Your Paid Subscriptions](https://substack.com/redirect/33a73f9d-263a-4c01-ac4d-561119e7b511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) allow us to keep fighting. Please consider a [Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/33a73f9d-263a-4c01-ac4d-561119e7b511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so we can stay in the Fight**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.d6Ns-wTs_Lsv8zpWLfqxWbvbcQlFNumh3uN2JedyEh8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171767806)
**By David Shuster**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc5950ca-df58-43b5-915d-ba380dd76027?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the twilight of our declining republic, and amidst the insatiable narcissism of Donald Trump, perhaps it was inevitable that our nation's highest offices would be occupied not by [statesmen](https://substack.com/redirect/fb0c1bcb-e21e-4ecb-98d7-a8fb36520ab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but by MAGA decorators.
And not even good ones.
According to a recent pronouncement from Her Royal Majesty of I.C.E., Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem, the latest scheme from the rotting brain of Donald J. Trump is to paint the entire 1,900-mile southern border wall and fence black.
Because, we are told, that it will get so hot in the sun that no migrant would dare touch it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1363f895-92e6-4e8f-85b0-2c86072ec211?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thus continues the 21st Century tradition of Republican governance by Home Depot impulse-buy. [That Democrats don't win every election](https://substack.com/redirect/fb0c1bcb-e21e-4ecb-98d7-a8fb36520ab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when going up against **this** tells you all you need to know about our deeply broken system.
It's so bad, one can almost picture Trump waving a Sherwin-Williams color swatch in the Oval Office like a toddler demanding his favorite crayon. "Black," he says, "the hottest color. Too hot to climb. Too hot to sue me. Perfect."
And off they go--Noem, the taxidermized tribute to empty ambition, nodding along as if Trump just invented the wheel.
The arithmetic underscores the lunacy.
The U-S Mexico border wall and fence is 1,954 miles. There are some gaps in the fencing due to treaty provisions, property rights, and topography.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.d6Ns-wTs_Lsv8zpWLfqxWbvbcQlFNumh3uN2JedyEh8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171767806)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c983fa8-8c43-4e0e-a010-022cd3593af8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
During Donald Trump's first term, it took 100 military engineers an entire month to paint an anti-climb coating one just one mile of fencing near the Calexio West port of entry. At that rate, even, the whole satanic mural would require centuries of labor, unless we conscript half of Nebraska and arm them with rollers.
**The price tag? Who knows. The Stupidity? Priceless.**
What we are witnessing is not security but the death of basic reason.
This a dark monument to the fear, vanity, and theatrical [cruelty that now passes for Trump and the GOP's border policy](https://substack.com/redirect/83547838-94d5-48ab-84e3-490c6d88c49d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This isn't about deterrence. This is about optics. Black is "tough." Black looks "mean."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/56c52ff3-236e-4058-aa1c-49dc95e3ce1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's the shade of Darth Vader's cape and the under-eye circles of every sleepless White House aide trying to justify this idiocy to the press. It is the perfect color for [a country that has given up on thinking and has settled, at last, on cultish brooding](https://substack.com/redirect/83547838-94d5-48ab-84e3-490c6d88c49d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Trump, whose understanding of physics rivals his grasp of humility, seems convinced that turning the wall into a stovetop will stop migrants. One imagines Trump saying, "It's like an oven--you touch it, you're cooked."
Never mind that it's already 110 degrees in the Sonoran Desert. Never mind that the people who make the journey are not stopped by rattlesnakes, dehydration, or the vastness of the landscape, [as a better life for their families is worth any risk](https://substack.com/redirect/9e164c45-e296-4aac-a741-c51aab3a64d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But we are meant to believe that paint will do the trick.
Instead of addressing immigration with any nuance or policy, we are offered the home-improvement aisle of authoritarianism: slather the wall in black paint and pray it fries a few hands.
And Noem--plucked from her job presiding over the Mount Rushmore gift shop--smiles and now repeats this plan with the sincerity of someone reciting lines in a hostage video. Her explanation, while painting a few feet of fencing recently in yet another lifeless Noem photo-op, is that black paint "helps reduce climbing and prevents rust."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.d6Ns-wTs_Lsv8zpWLfqxWbvbcQlFNumh3uN2JedyEh8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171767806)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40ba2482-36ba-4350-a6e9-b72139a1fe15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Prevents rust?
One imagines the 19th-century immigrants at Ellis Island being told they're welcome only if the torch of Lady Liberty doesn't corrode. This is not a policy position. It's a punchline.
The Romans built aqueducts. We paint fences. Badly. Slowly. At enormous expense.
With all the competence of a drunk house painter on roller skates. At this point, the only thing we haven't tried is surrounding the wall with those retractable airport stanchions that say "DO NOT CROSS."
Oh, and lest we forget: legal and illegal border crossings are already down. Inside the United States, the Trump administration terror tactics against Latinos, foreign visa holders, and countless American citizens have convinced a lot of people to stay away.
Never mind undocumented migrants, whose border crossings have reached the lowest levels in years, international tourists are also saying "no thanks." Those legals with foreign cash are spending it elsewhere, like in Canada.
[Every decent person should be ashamed of the government we live under.](https://substack.com/redirect/fb0c1bcb-e21e-4ecb-98d7-a8fb36520ab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) And it's getting worse by the day.
We are now governed by MAGA ghouls with paint rollers, trying to blister their way [into satisfying Trump's unrelenting ego](https://substack.com/redirect/36188782-dee4-46bd-8b4d-c82be906024e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one scorched migrant at a time.
So go ahead. Paint the wall. Paint it pitch-black, blood-red, camouflage, Mar-a-Lago gold, or with zebra stripes. It won't stop migrants determined to reach the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d9777b5-11d4-4420-ba99-59080b71bf16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But it will stand forever as a multi-billion-dollar monument to [an administration that mistook cruelty for strength](https://substack.com/redirect/3e027f70-8892-41cd-bb88-ec29c503641c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), stupidity for strategy, and a can of paint for an immigration plan.
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of[our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/f9c2e18e-c897-4929-bcce-7c85b16b89b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

The arithmetic underscores the lunacy. The U-S Mexico border wall and fence is 1,954 miles. There are some gaps in the fencing due to treaty provisions, property rights, and topography. | | ---|---|--- During Donald Trump's first term, it took 100 military engineers an entire month to paint an anti-climb coating one just one mile of fencing near the Calexio West port of entry. At that rate, even, the whole satanic mural would require centuries of labor, unless we conscript half of Nebraska and arm them with rollers. The price tag? Who knows. The Stupidity? Priceless. What we are witnessing is not security but the death of basic reason. This a dark monument to the fear, vanity, and theatrical . This isn't about deterrence. This is about optics. Black is "tough." Black looks "mean." | | ---|---|--- It's the shade of Darth Vader's cape and the under-eye circles of every sleepless White House aide trying to justify this idiocy to the press. It is the perfect color for . Trump, whose understanding of physics rivals his grasp of humility, seems convinced that turning the wall into a stovetop will stop migrants. One imagines Trump saying, "It's like an oven--you touch it, you're cooked." Never mind that it's already 110 degrees in the Sonoran Desert. Never mind that the people who make the journey are not stopped by rattlesnakes, dehydration, or the vastness of the landscape, . But we are meant to believe that paint will do the trick. Instead of addressing immigration with any nuance or policy, we are offered the home-improvement aisle of authoritarianism: slather the wall in black paint and pray it fries a few hands. And Noem--plucked from her job presiding over the Mount Rushmore gift shop--smiles and now repeats this plan with the sincerity of someone reciting lines in a hostage video. Her explanation, while painting a few feet of fencing recently in yet another lifeless Noem photo-op, is that black paint "helps reduce climbing and prevents rust." | | ---|---|--- Prevents rust? One imagines the 19th-century immigrants at Ellis Island being told they're welcome only if the torch of Lady Liberty doesn't corrode. This is not a policy position. It's a punchline. The Romans built aqueducts. We paint fences. Badly. Slowly. At enormous expense. With all the competence of a drunk house painter on roller skates. At this point, the only thing we haven't tried is surrounding the wall with those retractable airport stanchions that say "DO NOT CROSS." Oh, and lest we forget: legal and illegal border crossings are already down. Inside the United States, the Trump administration terror tactics against Latinos, foreign visa holders, and countless American citizens have convinced a lot of people to stay away. Never mind undocumented migrants, whose border crossings have reached the lowest levels in years, international tourists are also saying "no thanks." Those legals with foreign cash are spending it elsewhere, like in Canada. And it's getting worse by the day. We are now governed by MAGA ghouls with paint rollers, trying to blister their way , one scorched migrant at a time. So go ahead. Paint the wall. Paint it pitch-black, blood-red, camouflage, Mar-a-Lago gold, or with zebra stripes. It won't stop migrants determined to reach the United States. | | ---|---|--- But it will stand forever as a multi-billion-dollar monument to , stupidity for strategy, and a can of paint for an immigration plan. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of Our work is reader supported. Which means allow us to keep fighting. Please consider a so we can stay in the Fight** You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?
